| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw

Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

But That’s Just the Beginning. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Trump’s Mar-a-Lago Just Deployed a Robotic Guard Dog... But That’s Just the Beginning. What looks like a futuristic toy is actually the tip of a $24 trillion tech revolution — one that could transform the U.S. economy and life as we know it. And the same cutting-edge technology now patrolling Trump’s estate could soon explode across America... making early investors obscenely wealthy. ## Winter Storms Sweep Across U.S.
Bitter cold, snow, and dangerous winds are sweeping [a wide swath of the U.S.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upSAUhZ9GOww_KpyCYhq7M-2UBmWjzCAY2B7i20-8uW9wuy9Zycpa35_3_DY--Lj9NgdodGmOUEsARMhz9REhF0z5qAbXPbpwBnMnN3PKR0IZYXK2xod77lurHQAH0YJmclRjrxgT7a45HYXlYpBCLi_hHCg6smVVi2RyXAbaev20UcYkY1QJ0b3UwJR6SUoFc5zzpqdgPabc_U0-4g4u3OkDuVvT0Qa9I56lEb8aPjV8qrV2cVmfF0_e8OnBhk9XId-UIUDEAKWQElMlLvvNW4JwnJANXhkKOYPZLiDHte7kKsTsYCzZU_DW3KQC_AOS12j40AvJ2qztWX0Ivoyy6el2GB--1uGPlH40_x8AAP__KISMig) heading into the weekend, putting 18 million people under cold weather alerts. The alerts stretch from the northern Plains and Upper Midwest through the Great Lakes and into the Appalachians and Northeast. [Forecasters warned](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOpCAURb8GdxreAwUXLCaZuKvZTDq9NFgCUkGoAF3Gv-9Y_Qm9e8k7ubnnft7mm_bBR_dP70ZVm-ZojhJMrSbPh4_V5FJT3g9d71u04Rn0meyMFIeWQgtiXrUP58ybVVlj0LDGKBCDHLgEYM2m9GIRcOnlKBgdFkv1KDX0lnMQyNE0Xl1pFEAAUMlYN8oepBwFpQwsIhJOzepryt0j-Vg3Y8OZXiZ397Q3QW21PgthfwhOBCe93C-DzqXrTXD6-E9w2vUj5fbHp30LtXt6-ejaJfvorqPUnKK7mLV1X6UWgtNFnoRNfiXsL-CIQmI_Nlmtz8OH4MsgCKdu1z68y9RfLfhS-B0AAP__TaWEnw) of snow squalls, near-whiteout bursts, and pileups on slick roads. Farther south, the chill is pressing deep into the Southeast and Florida, where freeze warnings cover most counties and wind chills are expected to dip into the 20s in northern counties. In the Northeast, the coldest readings are projected for Tuesday and Wednesday, with temperatures running 10 to 20 degrees below average. Meteorologists say the pattern is being [reinforced by a polar vortex,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ_G7rD4i8EFxTbpsu2WFmsOMbvYWIeTkLz9lW8e4ZYzGo1mvj-3-eZTTvv9t9_AUSzzDq1mIAKcW9oJsFLBrXla1j3mI_t3ibPkcmRcMGHm4FN-z7oPLgJIUD04YUY7aiuE6lfH_4ZgpBqnRXtutNVcyMukrACr_RR1n9zZxoUwQnCr1DDZi7B2MpwrEaWUneYQEhUc_pW00woxv8sTcFjK1me3Eh21U786ee3ktbU2xPJq4Gn9RE7zo9j5rZPXo2SP7FmQ4MWC3--A5VGZx4XSwnxCtpQcoBIj2A5ATw-Eyk5MgOxRWQP4X3t04Wgp51RH02l-33zK35voRyCfTn4FAAD__1pJiok) helping keep the coldest air parked over North America for the rest of January and prolonging the wintry feel.
## Trump Holds Off on Insurrection Act
President Trump said on Friday that he sees [no reason “right now”](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOnDAUhJ_GdKx8AWwXLtLQbdqUyJjD-kS-IHN20b59RF7hrz_NjOb781yeHhOW12-fwdFelwLXmYAI2nJhIWgn1ZYvTyGWPR3Jf-u-SC6nnote6GXzmL7L0G1uB5CgOnBCT2YajBCqiw5WNYTVKhUsSG1HpdfRKjVOwXjrV92hu9u4EFoIbpR6WDMKY6zmXIldSskGDhtSbY-_FQtF2NO3fqA9Qs1dcpHoOJn6xeTM5EwRIqZ0MybnWDPch5ic_Zax4EnNE9bC5DxOVnFhe2rvfPRYzndrEG7Y-0B9xlLAHzXhne6a244LU8Jz0mzgr-zx_0hHP7L2cfJfAAAA___U9IHa) to invoke the Insurrection Act after warning he might use it amid renewed unrest in Minneapolis tied to federal immigration enforcement operations. Trump’s decision to hold off came a day after a Truth Social post accusing Minnesota leaders of failing to control “agitators” who threatened ICE officers and vandalized property following a shooting involving a federal officer. The city remains tense as protests continue. The 1807 law would let [a president deploy troops domestically](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u3CAQRp_G7lgB_sEuKNK4u2lTWhgP60kwY8Gsyb59tHmFW3_Sp3POr6_1y2HE9PzpTrAcaE1QSwRmyGvFxJALUz6rY3-kEK_o3hRWLfUopBLKrLvD-F77drcBQEPXglVmnMZ-UqprDysnUJs0vh96CdvQe9g27QbvjTdhnscW7edNKmWUklPXPeZpUNM0Gyk7FbTWTS9hR6b8-E2Y-IAQ33RDfng622gP5qs03Y9GL41eaq2PQH8_Fp-90ctFERl9afTC-XVeIpFIALvAdNMfEJjKK2fwjJSE8ywyPg8Wiaq4kSIkFi4xCvQgrkwMhYs4MSUoxK7Ndr8qxohlNE0vn6fD-J-Mv5XztvpfAAAA___hPY3p), including federalizing the National Guard and potentially using active-duty forces, temporarily overriding normal limits on the military’s role in law enforcement. Even as Trump called the authority “very powerful” and cited past presidential use, some Republicans had urged caution, saying they hoped local and federal law enforcement could stabilize the situation without invoking the statute.

A new [state-by-state analysis](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGunTAQAE8DHche8wy_cJGG7qVNiRZYg5MFI3uDxe2jlyv8fjQjza_39MbA4dx-4kFOfJxOKplJhNJUwimUssR0FJRlPz1fjE_0EyiwjdKN7qcVAz9TV6_OEwGZmpzu7WC7QWtT767vvNVrZ14wv2bsV4DVG5qttQSoZqyD-9iU1r3WajCm_Rpeehi-eqWM9gBQdYrWIDG1v2M4ZSfPT7wptUs8ana7yJUr86OCsYKxlNLeIf9FXvAKghyyfMAKRsJlb7KgUG7wpoQbNYXoDz_NluJC6WnmwFzBWCe3XiUwh2z7qlPbgYH_5-Rbj24H_wIAAP__9X585g) shows significant regional disparities in grocery costs, with Hawaiian households spending $157 per week on food, 33% above the national average of $118. The new study, based on Bureau of Labor Statistics data through July 2025, found average weekly grocery bills rose 6.3% nationally. Alaska recorded the second-highest costs at $152 per week, followed by California at $127. Geographic factors drive much of the variation. Hawaii's reliance on imported goods and Alaska's remote communities push prices higher. A bag of chips costs $6.79 in Anchorage but $10.49 in rural Unalakleet. California's elevated wages, rent, and distribution costs contribute to its ranking. Southern states show the lowest grocery bills. Arkansas residents spend approximately 6% below the national average, with Oklahoma, Texas, Mississippi, and Kansas also ranking among the most affordable states for food shopping. The city remains tense as protests continue. Map: Weekly Grocery Bill State by State A new shows significant regional disparities in grocery costs, with Hawaiian households spending $157 per week on food, 33% above the national average of $118. The new study, based on Bureau of Labor Statistics data through July 2025, found average weekly grocery bills rose 6.3% nationally. Alaska recorded the second-highest costs at $152 per week, followed by California at $127. Geographic factors drive much of the variation. Hawaii's reliance on imported goods and Alaska's remote communities push prices higher. A bag of chips costs $6.79 in Anchorage but $10.49 in rural Unalakleet. body:
Today a child is waiting to be found—will you answer the call?| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=04af51e36c8f4c66b1d5377e5fe3ff3f&_e=GWlb7qUXmw5BLtHoBk_WLCNP4beT9fcq9dygiL169HvdOz5grvI20wP7FG5THarIKTdzs4MK9UWB_JiodoDGWSHS28AM2YriEOYz1Hui0JZgCUp-XdXUzljN9TiP6gQrUhE5Xuge-Xh6E6RH6KvtPzIo9JfghoWZdYMSP8AV4H-p5mcnM_3sHJ0DNYUD5KKASkiyINNzMcIsr84_zLBHJKM-wYJvcr3A-2CgntJ4TvOcjbITdIruZwAT7JuP-cwVYw9xyZL4lr-QV7mU4B_0vLaiC0VaX0TnsRwpnDD6DDeCzHpL6Vqow751MDCBoy3MS_CC-5MDultp0fhTmQZMZt11h5P2WAbksagKUvExaREEV0b0HAYTRaIwsMghhK4ZcbkLYO1vUkad3mFflML_8nYoI4R9-wbsVtfzJYhoYwGU_VQ5qBeDiUqUCZJCFO6XGIyOsUfB3xqCZwuupV-P81hktfiYcHJKPM7G0FWouz6f96it_jWl6zq21YaLlmpq3ccVb6oNU0cfwGpNpLYQKczv9Uoj_wDm5w4l_WCAExib48dNl_53jUk_IxmORqsa7RUrbSjfZP2pgi3q_69vf91W3fTgfR3xquHPkxCjy1R3NuecK5Zt8BWRALxMhjEHTdZBPKVG1Bbbsbl9eU1hUz1Xj0FYqZq6IiUKHvEtg2s-_Utq9mtX36BVOVmhO3MvasgX989wzTU3RnJ9MQs4UTUnsT0YHqkA-yD_UZ-IiUXpWBtZT8vN1bGZ1L1OffwNfDjKu7kXy4eP0RKAidMbf0I1eyoIAiolWDiWcikcR35ke6O1JO4ZPSKM9vUHra1aQZPHuDTBP04UZSwqaUAuBA%3D%3D)

Friend,
---
Every 40 seconds a child goes missing in America.* Many are lured in when they are on Snapchat or TikTok by predators who confine these children to traffic them for sex.Today, a child is waiting to be found. **[For just $25, $50, or $100, you can help reunite a child with their parents before midnight.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=04af51e36c8f4c66b1d5377e5fe3ff3f&_e=GWlb7qUXmw5BLtHoBk_WLCNP4beT9fcq9dygiL169HvdOz5grvI20wP7FG5THarIKTdzs4MK9UWB_JiodoDGWSHS28AM2YriEOYz1Hui0JZgCUp-XdXUzljN9TiP6gQrUhE5Xuge-Xh6E6RH6KvtPzIo9JfghoWZdYMSP8AV4H-p5mcnM_3sHJ0DNYUD5KKASkiyINNzMcIsr84_zLBHJKM-wYJvcr3A-2CgntJ4TvOcjbITdIruZwAT7JuP-cwVYw9xyZL4lr-QV7mU4B_0vLaiC0VaX0TnsRwpnDD6DDeCzHpL6Vqow751MDCBoy3MAFq8ry4UxXub439slQkCCbUr82CLIDhhF0wEg9LA-eNVMuaGItqWDxdfasnZq44zpw3ALJ_xcfFga8OfcHIi6TNHVEv8RkBAVdZL-PCfShhS85I9qdnL0gzUtw0jDx-I5Nu8W7lpsg9V49YwoexAxPcLdTuGEjcoN-siBpREhF_TQSn_9jaS06RJwu-ink_tYe_7bp2GbeaJe_yd3PYHiBHKU-K7EDMhWU3B5vOeKYhIq7J8W-Yh98lKzw42REiSTcj2ZjRTOQOfLXwfm_2c6yuTPrZZ2U9JFweeYxYDTJQrwPRNP7vWXARWAcCMlh7fGjyitx4PQ4Llf1NdKfLCDeFIqJjEzboRhUb9T6Dc_nypCJoSQmGR2ALfAkyVHT6vd3_JxCYzyjXoyGq--0MphG6sXMDa9Tme3q7yQcN6YQvxofmr8P5ytsc4j4ioSfac3lqylOi_u4i3JrUF5C55dAtun9uBv3TLZplb0q3Pqm5zpa69iKJWbyRUs0FOSosA-Z8BaITiT9oNcNBRL3xQWA%3D%3D)** My name is Eduardo Verastegui. I produced the movie Sound of Freedom because I couldn't stay silent anymore. I've seen these children after raids -- shaking, crying, whispering "Please don't let them take me again." They look just like my nieces and nephews. Their eyes haunt me every single night.Can you help me put an end to the nightmare for these children?
---
[ YES EDUARDO — I’LL STAND WITH YOU TODAY](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=04af51e36c8f4c66b1d5377e5fe3ff3f&_e=GWlb7qUXmw5BLtHoBk_WLCNP4beT9fcq9dygiL169HvdOz5grvI20wP7FG5THarIKTdzs4MK9UWB_JiodoDGWSHS28AM2YriEOYz1Hui0JZgCUp-XdXUzljN9TiP6gQrUhE5Xuge-Xh6E6RH6KvtPzIo9JfghoWZdYMSP8AV4H-p5mcnM_3sHJ0DNYUD5KKASkiyINNzMcIsr84_zLBHJKM-wYJvcr3A-2CgntJ4TvOcjbITdIruZwAT7JuP-cwVYw9xyZL4lr-QV7mU4B_0vLaiC0VaX0TnsRwpnDD6DDeCzHpL6Vqow751MDCBoy3MTNnYp1A8jQYoQG-aJ8sJvhoHvAtnmdXeSJ7D0Y1N-tZ8H8GqUetkLSUt02G-D-ta4sK7zuQZzqMFnR1He7ADRz4aJnNf0u0SHvEln30OYs846iQhcklVF61Y5ebbRi1MAKvRQOZoxT5kqRl4fUAyc7Y4cZh3BiGdWqV7eMlhqxDvpYXZmztR6gtuM4brn1Qix3ZuMj62sEnqUquoR_okhxP2PlJ2oZG-BLVSvYESiQd7I2Tykinkq7a4X59X-61FkxYZ4xqYdG870PGitZtHC_2L0G7WeWU_-PvxnAZyRaQaJlZASgYARJtWaxFnFtIWRk71lsbZEH5knQHGL-HdmcF2rJbKNAYyVO-gxyCYiY8C5wPPjwmRmiSMHBiqdkM87Gz0zJm3j9Y0A3tzdlOjLKmiafxbkWQrkD7AQ0gVT32DHE9w_TewgBoYBsalfY1u-6L8jVILX6IFRgguGR9o0TLtdq-EigmpMufYS9fNhlwIa74OlPwSkmLIMjqIjHLmQ-ApIfBeTda3sfRUTTsEUA%3D%3D)

I'm reaching out to you from the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** -- the organization that funds real-time rescue operations in partnership with law enforcement and former special forces to find and extract children from traffickers -- fast.When a tip comes in, the teams made up of former Navy SEALs, undercover investigators, and cyber-intelligence analysts move within hours, sometimes minutes.In partnership with local law enforcement, we pull these children out of hotels, vehicles moving across the country, and brothels.The **Sound of Freedom Foundation** team works tirelessly to protect youth from the ravages of human trafficking and exploitation. Our mission is clear - to create a world where no child ever has to live in fear of being trafficked or exploited. We don't wait.Today -- a child is waiting to be found.I'm personally asking you: will you help me rescue one before midnight?
---
[ GIVE NOW — RESCUE A CHILD WITH ME TODAY](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=04af51e36c8f4c66b1d5377e5fe3ff3f&_e=GWlb7qUXmw5BLtHoBk_WLCNP4beT9fcq9dygiL169HvdOz5grvI20wP7FG5THarIKTdzs4MK9UWB_JiodoDGWSHS28AM2YriEOYz1Hui0JZgCUp-XdXUzljN9TiP6gQrUhE5Xuge-Xh6E6RH6KvtPzIo9JfghoWZdYMSP8AV4H-p5mcnM_3sHJ0DNYUD5KKASkiyINNzMcIsr84_zLBHJKM-wYJvcr3A-2CgntJ4TvOcjbITdIruZwAT7JuP-cwVYw9xyZL4lr-QV7mU4B_0vLaiC0VaX0TnsRwpnDD6DDeCzHpL6Vqow751MDCBoy3MUkO1ziHXdj_Ks4j5Pbemvpim48rCfgHoNMV4lgrwD3OGwJo5LOl0-80Jd9byBk8kK_Ftx3ToPpoYC7d9pPuOtRxXa7CpxpKYvBJNT-kFySZplCkETeh29sf9Ie7Gn3XA-Zr0OGh0epNXRQnfq6bddJk7MnVdLjnbcVEStbzySPzXVIDmWmkvcQlQGb2ERm9GxMapBW8XLZfXO3TrtsCNjeGlCXz51Uq10tMtVfr1wC9gnflemOyZqjlB6fAfXZKpKQfffMOe-kB1-Iw51zG3dVof3zaMqZf0lXW365EZQgkZ5kFei83LFKBFqzwCQdoySGumEQ71XiI8Skc_XLu0SeHt0WLmRXn1VPHuxxqQ_Hb7tEIEyurJ3IPoEYNtbqShKy3hUPxoYLILZ6Uq3sUHWe4HVbpJr3QyE10J-FJctbsOS3Q3Tomw_iUcyqOXlIHh0sJk125X_X42z5ZjjzdXG9CpmP0YsBhN_QXo24IiW_gqUdg13SDTgJTk5E8E-6tRuo_WDnA4E-gYnv-2FViKRw%3D%3D)

Friend, the facts continue to haunt me and tear me apart every day:
---
* Most victims are only 12 years old
* 35-40 million suffer in sex trafficking worldwide every single day
* Less than 0.04% are ever found - but we can change that

---
We can't continue to stand by and let these children live in fear and terror.Your gift today goes straight to the next rescue:
---
* $25 keeps our 24/7 rescue hotline open one more shift
* $50 provides transportation to a safe house
* $100 gives one rescued child 72 hours in a safe house with a warm bed, food, and someone to hold them while they cry

---
I wish I could do this alone, but I can't.I need you with me today. Please don't close this email without helping. One child's future -- one little boy or girl who still believes someone is coming -- is hanging on what we do in the next few hours.Click below to give today - Every single dollar lands instantly where seconds save lives.
---
[ YES EDUARDO — I’LL STAND WITH YOU TODAY](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=04af51e36c8f4c66b1d5377e5fe3ff3f&_e=GWlb7qUXmw5BLtHoBk_WLCNP4beT9fcq9dygiL169HvdOz5grvI20wP7FG5THarIKTdzs4MK9UWB_JiodoDGWSHS28AM2YriEOYz1Hui0JZgCUp-XdXUzljN9TiP6gQrUhE5Xuge-Xh6E6RH6KvtPzIo9JfghoWZdYMSP8AV4H-p5mcnM_3sHJ0DNYUD5KKASkiyINNzMcIsr84_zLBHJKM-wYJvcr3A-2CgntJ4TvOcjbITdIruZwAT7JuP-cwVYw9xyZL4lr-QV7mU4B_0vLaiC0VaX0TnsRwpnDD6DDeCzHpL6Vqow751MDCBoy3MTp2EVtGriBLrirToI1-TPSeNrPnoeG5O_j0TxPbUN6h25sQMl2_P2-tmuJzrh0HNDCbWsHAW6WPlxMNQ8XP5xswPZeREAU_a3xo7HDLDM1h4L5Vi3XrOuM4LzHYuoOn480BzFkz72sMY-zX24_bz7_YrNK5aeDNMH1rhL72rtWoY6mETcHQ2JxhK4D02Tuh1WqTx0H4CkWarva1FOC84GeNPd5d7QR0v-qUz5JaJzVBf2YdgkjTrR7Abc8yvBLEoPfblrerq1lfKwJKA3qXAeOAIdgcPtztrxwbigxvylyFbmgp2w-Cx0mgYqju_A5LiSa4D_JplDmtSqAeMA0vgjneK3xyefAUSFZo7J2P4K9jRtdtXgR_W8wcqPMc2crZfId1nEdJI_mT136DiaJo4qIgs5WtDj43TRx2LMw-b6mon8ofSMNoFS-u44mVnefuE2nI46-orc56zkPYlf6FhL96GyisfJXItK0x_en6X5mEUcGZeRqzak8CjdfiUHIw07uo7Ie0-bTXRb1S7bIOevA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Today a child is waiting to be found—will you answer the call?| | | Friend, Every 40 seconds a child goes missing in America. Many are lured in when they are on Snapchat or TikTok by predators who confine these children to traffic them for sex.Today, a child is waiting to be found. My name is Eduardo Verastegui. I produced the movie Sound of Freedom because I couldn't stay silent anymore. I've seen these children after raids -- shaking, crying, whispering "Please don't let them take me again." They look just like my nieces and nephews. Their eyes haunt me every single night.Can you help me put an end to the nightmare for these children? I'm reaching out to you from the Sound of Freedom Foundation -- the organization that funds real-time rescue operations in partnership with law enforcement and former special forces to find and extract children from traffickers -- fast.When a tip comes in, the teams made up of former Navy SEALs, undercover investigators, and cyber-intelligence analysts move within hours, sometimes minutes.In partnership with local law enforcement, we pull these children out of hotels, vehicles moving across the country, and brothels.The Sound of Freedom Foundation team works tirelessly to protect youth from the ravages of human trafficking and exploitation. Our mission is clear - to create a world where no child ever has to live in fear of being trafficked or exploited. We don't wait.Today -- a child is waiting to be found.I'm personally asking you: will you help me rescue one before midnight? Friend, the facts continue to haunt me and tear me apart every day: Most victims are only 12 years old 35-40 million suffer in sex trafficking worldwide every single day Less than 0.04% are ever found - but we can change that We can't continue to stand by and let these children live in fear and terror.Your gift today goes straight to the next rescue: $25 keeps our 24/7 rescue hotline open one more shift $50 provides transportation to a safe house $100 gives one rescued child 72 hours in a safe house with a warm bed, food, and someone to hold them while they cry I wish I could do this alone, but I can't.I need you with me today. Please don't close this email without helping. One child's future -- one little boy or girl who still believes someone is coming -- is hanging on what we do in the next few hours.Click below to give today - Every single dollar lands instantly where seconds save lives. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation "Let the little children come to me." -- Jesus 2024 National Center for Missing & Exploited Children 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

## Scammer Poses As Camp Mystic Victim’s Dad
Harris County authorities allege that a single mother from Florida [posed as the father](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOpSAQBeCn0U7DIIIUFNvY3W23NCOMVxIQA-R6ffuNu4_wd5NMck6-8-e1vNAHf7x_YyRTv1taDrpKoFopLxbjGe9SvS0WY6SMAWOyeCyccdkx6EAtDn24F9E6szKnoSUDSk5yhEHpdjckLGqQG9Or1EoONHKxuQ0modwkNWu9ecIYgALO-Kh6dOCcQLauiIMdeCMYOV9T7utOlb5YtnCnD-XeptgGs9d6lmb41fC54fN1Xf2Ne0rPt-Hzw2n4jLl6G-g5t5Cyd9hdKeLRnamQ6x5p95_awTRyAM2h32sMbTbuvHwIvkjVCPaO6MO_5vqzvT6G_w0AAP__u9F_9A) of a Camp Mystic flood victim for crowdfunding donations. Maitlin White admitted she was looking for "a quick way to [make some money](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2S4yAQhJ8GZbgAyUIOCC5RtpdeqBrBYE0VPzqYtddvf-XbR9i4q7v6-_58bB9Aicr9N2R0_BXrVvDZEzJj2zzkM786k-8ecsYGCXL1UDajzCyVltpuASi9tmkIblfhpgd02s7LfNWjvQ2HC-MSlnHx16ji7TZ7tAbiBEGB9jsoO5B7jymtrTbKXO0Fgg5hArXvAKMfjZgUBuLaLnwg4xf0mF71ge3iax6SO5jPLsZfwqzCrLB7Pb4TYdazdhZmjak2CiCfNUORGYgTFfk8iFFCa9gZgzxrp3KXEfjAJt_k8htdxlRrkA_yTFk2_Pv5Xci14Evea_wsIaPsBzaKUZhVL5OetboKsw7NhfNJKVGfrZjUPQOl_7f5Z7IfzvwLAAD__76Cl5w)” by impersonating Matthew Childress, whose 19-year-old daughter Chloe died in the July 4 floods. Childress reported last year that a fraudulent GoFundMe page was using his name, leading authorities to kick off an investigation as early as July 10. The investigation revealed that White opened the GoFundMe four days after the floods. White has been charged with impersonating Childress on [two crowdfunding sites](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHyoyAQx_Gn0Q4H0GAsKK6xy7VXOiu7RObAzQCJydvfmHuEf7_znf38_tyWG4QY9vtvSGTr2_Oy01Ei1Up5cZAe6VNqcMVBSpQhQmIH-6KlNkIqocYFIcTPMrRoV4mTasmq0VzNRfXj1G52QhzGtffOXK_owYDWDi6aJkWud2DaYM-YVGpUWurL2AEqxAHkugL0rtfNIAlD5dzVjSq9ofj44RflznFqo91qfZSm_9XoudHzcRyd57c2Gz9L5f08avR8qho9e_hL4tsQPjKjeAVXQxJ39s8dRSJxmsV_tHD83AtFzsJtkUm4LUTMVEqbLT6OEGMoZmwGeU8Q4ved-rMRX1b_CwAA___l4YsX).
## The Alamo Acquires Rare Cannon From Battle
The Alamo has added to its cannon collection by acquiring a swivel cannon used during the [Battle of the Alamo](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD0O2zAMRk9jbwok-X_Q0CVbunY0KImOieonlRgnuX3hoDfo-vBAPH6_busNKFC6_4SIht9bXhO-akBmLKuD-IifyuSqgxixQICYHaRVSz0KqYSaVg8UPmvfemOlX1SLRk3jPA6qm5Z2N3aQ86ihm2er50XKbZn15q2fBoU9yqElcx6TSk1KSz1MF_DK-x6ktQCd63TTS_TEuVx4R8Y31C188oHl4nJsg9mZH7XpfjT62ujrmd9XSJA4J8qn8482-kqpMtwLnOj7iwD350kFqyhQUDhIKSexlRyFmrtRWGAOKCrEJwYR4cBC7rdwOVUsB1NOwlLxp7e3xfjHi0KgOk5NL-8RKHwb-f-WPYz-GwAA__8RKZEw) in 1836. The 90-pound cannon would have been used from a fortification to quickly swivel towards approaching soldiers and fire. The Alamo’s latest acquisition was first discovered by [Samuel Maverick](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3uozAQxJ8GOiPbEAyFi2vocu2VaFkbWJ0_InsVkrc_Jbo3-Jej0YzmN3_u6x0oUDp-Q_SWX3tek79q8My-rAjxEd-VCStCjL5AgJgR0qqlHoVUQpnVAYX3OrTObtLNqvVWmXEab6o3c3vafTOgwAw46HFG2GY17mqSOGmHWrqtJfspk0oZpaW-mQ6ccm4AuW0APfa6GaR3xLl0fHr2L6h7eOenLx3m2AZ7Mj9q0_9q9NLo5bqu7m-hys-P3ejlw9Po5RsU_8WXQ4BzVRQoXqipH8UGzMELhJRyEpzFUfJF6RAnVc6FUGAOwSNTTm2x7nFRCFRH0wzyiEDhu4d_9uLT6n8BAAD__195igA), who signed the Texas Declaration of Independence and was present during the siege. Maverick found the buried cannon in 1852 while constructing his house in the location where Hotel Gibbs now sits, near the Alamo site. Maverick set up the cannon as the base of a bird bath before it went missing in the 1950s, and was recently donated to the Alamo by a member of the Maverick family. Conservation work on the cannon includes an electrolysis bath to remove hardened sediment.
## 1,951 License Plate Messages Rejected in 2025
Nearly 2,000 personalized license plates were rejected by the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles in 2025 for failing to meet [decency standards](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO2zAQRL-G6miQK1K0ChVp1F3alMKKuz4zWUoCyVjnvw9sIF9w1RQDPLyZXx_LByZJ2-dPzDy1r9u-bHxW4da4LBHzkZ-1pVgj5swFBfMecVvAwKCN1TYshEmei-toWg2NtuPJhuE6eNuHsbtP5FfvCG7O2tXYOPg-WOcp9MQOnb12aXrBjLXBggEfLkiWyKFZV8Q-9qCcYUptL5d258ZfWG_y3B9cLnHPnUz31o6q-h8KZgXzeZ6XP4-__CoVzFhaisIK5tcuBbPsEUXB_Ab9T134N8fGpA8udd9QtKTIW2V9CDauWlJtmvJDvxwVzDCMOtycjx5WHWl02o0x6nUA0v3V-Ii-t459VyY6ziSS6hCUM58Zk7zF2_fufkzwLwAA__8-d5KX). Messages like “Y U UGLY,” “YUR2SLO,” and “UHATIN” were among [1,951 license plates](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAUhJ8Gd1j82SQFxW3c5bZbWsec44QVGAtQnOzTr5xX2G6K0fdp5us23yDEsN3_QyLXXmueNzpqpNaozB7Snt61BV89pEQFIqTsYZuVUCMXkks7I4T4nk2HbhF4lR05acfLOEhtr93DoR2u2ltU64jLsq5mQa-08agv1sCAXXAnTEhppRJqsD2gRDQglgVAe62YEYSh5dK3BzV6QV3jOz-p9D6nLrpHa3tl-h9TE1PTcRz9ml_mnHEWmJrOyNR00nmhb_KNkO9Uat4ghh9CHoOnrRLfIzSq_CPpisP9CDGGOlpmxD1BiB9l-9tRT6d-AwAA__-633_S) that authorities deemed insulting, used sexual innuendo, or were vulgar, among other violations. Other more memorable rejections included “F*OKLA,” “UCLOWN,” and "AWL HELL.” Among the most prolific months for rejected plates, October won out with 193, followed by June’s 185. This year’s [indecent plates](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGSpDAMRU9jMnXZhsZNQLAJ2Wy6IaWWReMdGbPYDMPtt-grTKZA9d9__8_H-IFBwvL6jZH78j2lceEjC5fC20gY13jmEigTxsgbCsZEuIxW2xa0AeNGj0HOsal8_9S-MxX3xrWP9m5q11Vzj_epeZj64dB1rjVTQ94_J909qHOaqK5Cf4VpY5yx2t7dDb3xvkH9fCLWVFvVaPahpO1WZi78jXmSM33xdqMUK-nnUtas6l_KDsoOx3HcSAJ92jntuaTl-lJ2uLSUHSQRirLDxVR20EbZwVzXDjmmT_ZQEpyww_6SE475hDcRNv7LVNjDwrjJCVZrDXQBIkggXjLDKlgYNv63cy4ZwgKXkLJDtfV-PYJIyK1TjX5FDPJuX362-Vdv_wcAAP__16GWXg) tally fell short of 2024’s total.
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6jAQhZ_G6UCecbCTwsWVrtKx7ZbWYA_glX9QYgi8_SpopX2Abeeb80nnfB7dkWKK5fJBmW17nqsrvC6JW-PZecq3_Fpa9IunnHmmRLl6Kg4l6p2EHRgXKKaX67tgTzKM0LEFowd9AGXG7mo1sBqQTNB-lBh6BmTZD37Qo5EjQBftJpMABlDiwewpQAg9ydOJSHmFopccYqvzvl258ZOWc3rVB897X3OX7LW1m1D_BE4Cp7qWlVPakMDp_S3UdG_ZLfU-exbq_09aoN7OW0eKl_ILXKZY3BcVMN1sw22NKcVFG9HLS6b4dnftb2M9LH4HAAD__2OTf_0) **New Data: Who You Hire to Protest Property Taxes Matters** With property taxes rising, many Texans assume any protest firm will do. That’s not the case. Ownwell’s recent 2025 market analysis reveals a startling performance gap. Other firms’ fee structures across the state are shrinking the amount homeowners retain.

A few examples... **Dallas County:**
The data reveals that [Ownwell](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6jAQhZ_G6UCecbCTwsWVrtKx7ZbWYA_glX9QYgi8_SpopX2Abeeb80nnfB7dkWKK5fJBmW17nqsrvC6JW-PZecq3_Fpa9IunnHmmRLl6Kg4l6p2EHRgXKKaX67tgTzKM0LEFowd9AGXG7mo1sBqQTNB-lBh6BmTZD37Qo5EjQBftJpMABlDiwewpQAg9ydOJSHmFopccYqvzvl258ZOWc3rVB897X3OX7LW1m1D_BE4Cp7qWlVPakMDp_S3UdG_ZLfU-exbq_09aoN7OW0eKl_ILXKZY3BcVMN1sw22NKcVFG9HLS6b4dnftb2M9LH4HAAD__2OTf_0) achieved an **88% win rate** for homes priced between $250k and $500k—significantly outpacing the **74% average** of traditional competitors. **Montgomery County** :
This disparity is even greater. Homeowners kept **2.8x more net savings ($465 vs. $166)** on mid-range homes ($500k-$750k) compared to those using top competitors. It’s becoming clear: Simply protesting isn't enough; _who you protest with_ determines your refund amount. When you open your tax bill or check your escrow for 2026 financial planning, ask yourself: “Did you get unsatisfactory results and leave money on the table compared to your neighbors?” Get your [savings estimate](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6jAQhZ_G6UCecbCTwsWVrtKx7ZbWYA_glX9QYgi8_SpopX2Abeeb80nnfB7dkWKK5fJBmW17nqsrvC6JW-PZecq3_Fpa9IunnHmmRLl6Kg4l6p2EHRgXKKaX67tgTzKM0LEFowd9AGXG7mo1sBqQTNB-lBh6BmTZD37Qo5EjQBftJpMABlDiwewpQAg9ydOJSHmFopccYqvzvl258ZOWc3rVB897X3OX7LW1m1D_BE4Cp7qWlVPakMDp_S3UdG_ZLfU-exbq_09aoN7OW0eKl_ILXKZY3BcVMN1sw22NKcVFG9HLS6b4dnftb2M9LH4HAAD__2OTf_0) today. Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Investing in The Flyover is Easier Than You Think Anyone can invest — you don’t have to be a millionaire. Step-by-step — here’s exactly how it works: Step 1: Click “Invest Now” Go to our secure investment page . Step 2: Enter your info (30 seconds) Email, first/last name, phone number. That’s it. Step 3: Choose your investment amount Type an amount (example: $1,000) or select a preset. At $2 per share, $1,000 = 500 units. Step 4: Select who is investing Choose your investor type: Individual (most common) Joint Corporation / Trust / IRA (also available) Step 5: Quick compliance questions You’ll answer simple questions regarding your income (income/net worth). If you’re not an accredited investor, that’s okay — you can still invest. Step 6: Choose payment method Pay via: Card payment Bank-to-bank transfer (ACH) Wire transfer You’ll see the total clearly before submitting. Bonus shares note: If your investment qualifies for bonus shares, they’ll appear on your official Book Entry Statement once shares are issued (they may not show in the dashboard). 👉 Ready? It’s easy. Join the movement Minimum: $486 | Price: $2/share | Open to everyone | Scammer Poses As Camp Mystic Victim’s Dad Harris County authorities allege that a single mother from Florida of a Camp Mystic flood victim for crowdfunding donations. Maitlin White admitted she was looking for "a quick way to ” by impersonating Matthew Childress, whose 19-year-old daughter Chloe died in the July 4 floods. Childress reported last year that a fraudulent GoFundMe page was using his name, leading authorities to kick off an investigation as early as July 10. The investigation revealed that White opened the GoFundMe four days after the floods. White has been charged with impersonating Childress on . The Alamo Acquires Rare Cannon From Battle The Alamo has added to its cannon collection by acquiring a swivel cannon used during the in 1836. The 90-pound cannon would have been used from a fortification to quickly swivel towards approaching soldiers and fire. The Alamo’s latest acquisition was first discovered by , who signed the Texas Declaration of Independence and was present during the siege. Maverick found the buried cannon in 1852 while constructing his house in the location where Hotel Gibbs now sits, near the Alamo site. Maverick set up the cannon as the base of a bird bath before it went missing in the 1950s, and was recently donated to the Alamo by a member of the Maverick family. Conservation work on the cannon includes an electrolysis bath to remove hardened sediment. 1,951 License Plate Messages Rejected in 2025 Nearly 2,000 personalized license plates were rejected by the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles in 2025 for failing to meet . Messages like “Y U UGLY,” “YUR2SLO,” and “UHATIN” were among that authorities deemed insulting, used sexual innuendo, or were vulgar, among other violations. Other more memorable rejections included “FOKLA,” “UCLOWN,” and "AWL HELL.” Among the most prolific months for rejected plates, October won out with 193, followed by June’s 185. This year’s tally fell short of 2024’s total. | New Data: Who You Hire to Protest Property Taxes Matters With property taxes rising, many Texans assume any protest firm will do. That’s not the case. Ownwell’s recent 2025 market analysis reveals a startling performance gap. Other firms’ fee structures across the state are shrinking the amount homeowners retain. A few examples... Dallas County: The data reveals that achieved an 88% win rate for homes priced between $250k and $500k—significantly outpacing the 74% average of traditional competitors. Montgomery County : This disparity is even greater. Homeowners kept 2.8x more net savings ($465 vs. $166) on mid-range homes ($500k-$750k) compared to those using top competitors. It’s becoming clear: Simply protesting isn't enough; who you protest with determines your refund amount. When you open your tax bill or check your escrow for 2026 financial planning, ask yourself: “Did you get unsatisfactory results and leave money on the table compared to your neighbors?” Get your today. name: NEGOP
subject: Reminder: 🚨 Your Weekly Update From The NEGOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nebraska Republican Party 1610 N St
body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
Defining Our Party: Together beyond the ballot
Have you noticed the recent shift in political branding? The Democratic Party has increasingly adopted the "We the People" slogan--a phrase many Republicans have long held dear, and one famously tattooed on the forearm of our current Secretary of War, Pete Hegseth. While imitation can be a form of flattery, I fear their version may ultimately mean "We the People of the Left." I sincerely hope they adopt the actual philosophy behind those words rather than just the optics. Closer to home, the stage is set for a pivotal 2026 election season in Nebraska. We already see several Republican vs. Republican races taking shape, both in high-stakes partisan primaries and some nonpartisan contests. While these internal debates are a natural part of our process, how we respond to the outcomes will define us more than any primary or general election ever could. Two qualified candidates may enter a ring, but only one can emerge as the winner. The true mirror of our character as the Republican Party and the NEGOP will not be who wins or loses, but how we move forward as one body after the votes are tallied. A House Divided Cannot Stand
We must learn from the 2024 primary, where internal divisions made it difficult to endorse winners who truly reflected the voice of the people. We cannot afford to ignore the biblical wisdom shared by our first Republican President, Abraham Lincoln: "A house divided against itself CANNOT stand." If we truly believe in and follow the Constitution, then the voice of We the People must be treated as sacred. There is a time for spirited debate, but once the ballots are counted, there is no room for an "I'm taking my toys and going home" attitude. Our Path Forward
To succeed in 2026, we must:
* Honor the Process: Respect the primary or general election results as the authentic voice of "We the People".
* Support the Winners: Come together under new leadership to achieve our ultimate purpose: electing Republicans who exemplify our principles.
* Reject Division: Refuse to let personal preferences outweigh the strength of the Party.

This upcoming election season will be a defining moment for the Republican Party and the NEGOP. I pray that we choose a definition of collaboration, strength, and mutual respect.
Winning in 2026 will require discipline after the vote, not just passion before it. Let us move forward beyond the ballot with shared purpose, respect for the process, and commitment to the Party's long-term strength.
Sincerely, Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party

clean_body: News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong. | | | | | | Letter from the Chair Defining Our Party: Together beyond the ballot Have you noticed the recent shift in political branding? The Democratic Party has increasingly adopted the "We the People" slogan--a phrase many Republicans have long held dear, and one famously tattooed on the forearm of our current Secretary of War, Pete Hegseth. While imitation can be a form of flattery, I fear their version may ultimately mean "We the People of the Left." I sincerely hope they adopt the actual philosophy behind those words rather than just the optics. Closer to home, the stage is set for a pivotal 2026 election season in Nebraska. We already see several Republican vs. Republican races taking shape, both in high-stakes partisan primaries and some nonpartisan contests. While these internal debates are a natural part of our process, how we respond to the outcomes will define us more than any primary or general election ever could. Two qualified candidates may enter a ring, but only one can emerge as the winner. The true mirror of our character as the Republican Party and the NEGOP will not be who wins or loses, but how we move forward as one body after the votes are tallied. A House Divided Cannot Stand We must learn from the 2024 primary, where internal divisions made it difficult to endorse winners who truly reflected the voice of the people. We cannot afford to ignore the biblical wisdom shared by our first Republican President, Abraham Lincoln: "A house divided against itself CANNOT stand." If we truly believe in and follow the Constitution, then the voice of We the People must be treated as sacred. There is a time for spirited debate, but once the ballots are counted, there is no room for an "I'm taking my toys and going home" attitude. Our Path Forward To succeed in 2026, we must: Honor the Process: Respect the primary or general election results as the authentic voice of "We the People". Support the Winners: Come together under new leadership to achieve our ultimate purpose: electing Republicans who exemplify our principles. * Reject Division: Refuse to let personal preferences outweigh the strength of the Party. This upcoming election season will be a defining moment for the Republican Party and the NEGOP. I pray that we choose a definition of collaboration, strength, and mutual respect. Winning in 2026 will require discipline after the vote, not just passion before it. Let us move forward beyond the ballot with shared purpose, respect for the process, and commitment to the Party's long-term strength. Sincerely, Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party Follow us: == | ==| ==| == Donate today: Support the NEGOP at == For more information, visit == | | | | == | == | | == | | | UPCOMING NEGOP EVENTS | | == | | | | == | | | | | Help Republicans win in 2026 and beyond. | | Peter,
---
| | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath. **

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. **_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

clean_body: This is what gave Charlie strength| | | | | Peter, | | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal. It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war. His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before... It was about the Sabbath. About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God. Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself. He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling... The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. To rest. To reflect. To return to God. This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation. 🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops 🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America I know he would've wanted you to have this book. When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. Peter, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage -- the very things Charlie gave his life for. And as you do, may the message of this book lead you -- just as it led Charlie -- to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. Charlie Kirk's final book, Stop, in the Name of God, is a heartfelt call to slow down, remember what's eternal, and rest in God. - 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Since his announcement, they've already spent MILLIONS against him, and they're fighting us tooth and nail for every inch of ground. And as this critical race is approaching, they've DOUBLED DOWN on ensuring he surrenders all because he's a MAGA Patriot. That's why I'm reaching out; he needs us ALL to have his back, now more than ever. So, will you please join my father and me in standing with Florida's next Governor, Byron Donalds? | | We need your help - Florida is MAGA's Hometurf - we have to hold it at ALL costs - we CANNOT afford them to nab the Governorship, and it starts with bolstering Byron's war chest right off the bat. We all need to be unified here, or the Democrats will ruin this; they know how important the State of Florida is to turning the country Blue. Please, join me now and let's help Byron deliver a CRUCIAL victory for MAGA: | | | | | Paid by Byron Donalds, Republican, for Governor 10941 Harmony Park Drive, Suite 4 Bonita Springs, FL 34135 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this,

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: 1776: The Year That Made the Modern World
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/alookahead-12851459?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**This year we will be celebrating 250 years since the birth of America.**

July 4th, 2026, will feel extra special. Two and a half centuries ago, Thomas Jefferson’s Declaration of Independence didn’t just launch a new nation - it proclaimed a revolutionary truth that still echoes today: Governments derive their just powers from the consent of the governed, and when any government becomes destructive of those ends, it is the right of the people to alter or abolish it.

>From that bold idea sprang a new branch of Western civilization - one rooted in individual rights, limited government, and the deep belief that ordinary people, left free, can govern themselves far better than any elite ever could.

But 1776 was even bigger than the Declaration of Independence. It was the year the modern world truly began. Three other extraordinary things happened almost simultaneously - each one a cornerstone of the world we live in now.

* **James Watt’s improved steam engine:** Finalized in 1776, this breakthrough powered the Industrial Revolution - factories, railways, steamships, and the machinery of modern prosperity.

* **Adam Smith’s The Wealth of Nations** (published March 1776): The book that laid out the blueprint for free markets, voluntary exchange, and the division of labor - the system that has lifted more people out of poverty than anything else in history.

* **Edward Gibbon’s Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire** (first volume, February 1776): A masterpiece that reconnected the West to its classical roots.

**Four extraordinary innovations, in liberty, technology, free markets and the recovery of the classics, all happened in that one year, in the English-speaking world.** Perhaps it was not really a coincidence

Nor is it a coincidence that each of these four ingredients of Western exceptionalism have been relentlessly denigrated by the progressive left. Our universities have steadily abandoned the study of the classics. The Industrial Revolution, far from being hailed as humanity’s escape from millennia of poverty, is recast as an environmental sin.

Instead of celebrating America as the bold experiment in self-government, too many young Americans are now taught to view their country as always in the wrong.

**2026 needs to be a turning point away from all that anti-Western, anti-American nonsense.**

Two hundred and fifty years ago, a radically new way of ordering society emerged in the Anglosphere - not through top-down design or elite decree, but on the simple, powerful premise that each of us should be free to think, to create, to trade, and to govern ourselves.

**Here’s to the class of 1776.**

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=91abb8a20b&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=6280d6d946) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=6280d6d946).

_Copyright © 2026 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._

When I asked who had the resolve to save us, your name was the one I heard the most. That is why you are receiving my most confidential memo.

| | Peter,

Three years ago, I was sworn in as Arkansas’s Lieutenant Governor after serving our state as Attorney General for eight years.

Since then, together, **we’ve proven what conservative leadership can accomplish**.

---
| [ ](https://leslierutledge.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=823c8070c1f32066f44b816e6&id=26ccceca6a&e=624a44d946)
---
|
Working with Governor Sanders and our conservative legislature, Arkansas is leading the nation:

• The **#1 state for inbound movers** two years in a row

• **Eliminated the grocery tax** , easing the burden on hardworking families

• **Partnered with the Trump administration** to support Arkansas farmers

• Ranked the**most pro-life state in America** for the sixth straight year

_These accomplishments matters._

Not just today, but for the next generation of Arkansans who deserve opportunity, freedom, and a strong future here at home.

I’m running to keep Arkansas on the right track, but I need your help to finish the job.

name: Team TFVC
subject: Why Privacy Matters More Than Ever for Medical Freedom
body:
| |
---
Register Now for This Free Webinar | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTc2ODUxMjAwNDQzOTQyMDYwLFwiclwiOjE3Njg1MTMxNDI2NzkxNTI4OX0iLCJzIjoiODUyNmVjZmZmMDBjZjc0YSJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTc2ODUxMjAwNDQ4MTM2MzY1LFwiclwiOjE3Njg1MTMxNDI2NzkxNTI4OX0iLCJzIjoiNjZhYzAxMTc0NmRmYmM2YyJ9)
---
|
---
Peter,__ Do you ever wonder how much of your personal information is being collected and who has access to it? Privacy is one of the most important and least understood issues of our time. For families who care about **medical freedom** , it’s especially critical. When personal data is collected, shared, or monetized without meaningful consent, medical privacy and individual autonomy are put at risk. Today, **Big Tech companies profit from personal data** , building detailed profiles that influence what people see, hear, and believe online. Many Texans feel uncomfortable with this level of surveillance—but aren’t sure what practical steps they can take to protect themselves. That’s why I’m inviting you to a [free webinar with Glenn Meder](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTc2ODUxMjAwNDU0NDI3ODIyLFwiclwiOjE3Njg1MTMxNDI2NzkxNTI4OX0iLCJzIjoiYmRiYTFmYjRlZjU0NTI3ZiJ9), a respected privacy and security expert who specializes in helping everyday people better understand and protect their digital lives. **Privacy is foundational to medical liberty.** Texans do not have to accept a surveillance state as inevitable, and you don’t need to be a tech expert to take meaningful action. [](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTc2ODUxMjAwNDU4NjIyMTI4LFwiclwiOjE3Njg1MTMxNDI2NzkxNTI4OX0iLCJzIjoiYWMwMjZkY2Q3YmY0ODNmMCJ9)
| | | [ ****Register Now!**** ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTc2ODUxMjAwNDYyODE2NDMzLFwiclwiOjE3Njg1MTMxNDI2NzkxNTI4OX0iLCJzIjoiMGJhMGFlM2MxYjgwNDQ0NSJ9)
---
|
---
This is about empowerment and ensuring Texans can make informed decisions about their privacy in an increasingly digital world. I hope you’ll join us!

|
---
| | | **Gratefully,
Rebecca Hardy
President, TFVC**

---|---|---

| |
---
|
---
|
##### Texans for Vaccine Choice

clean_body: | | Register Now for This Free Webinar | | | | | | Peter,__ Do you ever wonder how much of your personal information is being collected and who has access to it? Privacy is one of the most important and least understood issues of our time. For families who care about medical freedom , it’s especially critical. When personal data is collected, shared, or monetized without meaningful consent, medical privacy and individual autonomy are put at risk. Today, Big Tech companies profit from personal data , building detailed profiles that influence what people see, hear, and believe online. Many Texans feel uncomfortable with this level of surveillance—but aren’t sure what practical steps they can take to protect themselves. That’s why I’m inviting you to a , a respected privacy and security expert who specializes in helping everyday people better understand and protect their digital lives. Privacy is foundational to medical liberty. Texans do not have to accept a surveillance state as inevitable, and you don’t need to be a tech expert to take meaningful action. | | | | This is about empowerment and ensuring Texans can make informed decisions about their privacy in an increasingly digital world. I hope you’ll join us! | | | | Gratefully, Rebecca Hardy President, TFVC ---|---|--- | | | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice 1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | You received this email because you signed up or made a purchase from us. |

We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." / / MATERIAL TIE DISCLOSURE: You should presume the sender of this email has an affiliate or other financial relationship with the entities or persons noted in this message and may be compensated for purchases made on associated websites. name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: Sounding the alarm on ICE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RAJA FOR ILLINOIS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123500812/595661731/2072070277?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.17_Sounding-Alarm-ICE_B1_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDUzNDhlOS1hZWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hZH9fQ8-Sg5txWjKnyedodgRpUrYe_JxDDTo5cMnV2g=)
These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer, you can [unsubscribe here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/K-_-4uI0EkWyg9pVsZKBKQ2?unsubscribedata=SX34xBsO%2BHl03QNZmKN%2FahTZyinTI0EOagdV8tXtsZJkBpC%2B226MuFYZl6my3FFdmK2%2BHAsffqA8D0i2c7La6Rd2Y9yZStVR3oDtEfic8xPsXcGhdEwl2Y5htPfd5hZu76yjfIVLl7W9ebQhhWvtf7QAmN5tYDYnhdLhFcbRB6EfXcjOUVRR6DQTy2sLN3zoheJLAYIvMqEm6bJlEmm0raQORqOInFKJApyWDFJmeso6zlMLbTwjlcIHxE7vAq41L9eiCeivA4Zw0u%2FB%2FpXinVsWVd%2FbMmX8yJ8T1q6orZz6pk3QsK1ClgaiyzZC23oTt4H0VSWylBLEfrX66t0krSgtSUtj5uwBvYyswAt0TePJTiz%2BT3hGeVgepRTM7x6ijd70YfJgoB8ij2M0Ce5vJeY5d9RykqFEV7XeVrBIl1kCKJEyDyXRdXdyLoV6qlhp).
ICE’s reign of terror across our country has been horrific, unacceptable, and absolutely lawless. I’m Democrat Raja Krishnamoorthi. For months, ICE agents have been wreaking havoc on our communities and operating without ANY accountability. And in front of our very eyes, this lawlessness has turned deadly. **That’s why I’ve been sounding the alarm on ICE since day one — and taking action.** _It’s why_ I put it all on the line to demand access to ICE facilities. And even when ICE agents evicted me and called the police for “trespassing”, I stood my ground. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123500815/595661734/-2026962184?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.17_Sounding-Alarm-ICE_B1_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDUzNDhlOS1hZWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hZH9fQ8-Sg5txWjKnyedodgRpUrYe_JxDDTo5cMnV2g=) _It’s why_ I introduced legislation to restrict the use of force by ICE and to literally unmask them. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123500817/595661736/-2026962184?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.17_Sounding-Alarm-ICE_B1_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDUzNDhlOS1hZWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hZH9fQ8-Sg5txWjKnyedodgRpUrYe_JxDDTo5cMnV2g=) _And it’s why_ I’ve called for Kristi Noem to testify before the Oversight Committee and answer for the actions of ICE agents. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123500819/595661738/-2026962184?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.17_Sounding-Alarm-ICE_B1_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDUzNDhlOS1hZWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hZH9fQ8-Sg5txWjKnyedodgRpUrYe_JxDDTo5cMnV2g=) Look, this is personal to me. My parents immigrated to this country when I was a baby. Things weren’t always easy, but they believed more than _anyone_ in the promise of this country. That’s what the American story is all about. **I’m running for Senate because I won’t stand by while Donald Trump wreaks havoc on everything that made my story possible.** [**_But I can’t do this alone, Peter. So if you’re with me, please rush $10 or $25 to my campaign to help fight back against Trump’s cruel agenda >> _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123500821/595661740/-2026962184?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.17_Sounding-Alarm-ICE_B1_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDUzNDhlOS1hZWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hZH9fQ8-Sg5txWjKnyedodgRpUrYe_JxDDTo5cMnV2g=) | | [ DONATE $10 → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123500823/595661742/-2026962184?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.17_Sounding-Alarm-ICE_B1_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDUzNDhlOS1hZWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hZH9fQ8-Sg5txWjKnyedodgRpUrYe_JxDDTo5cMnV2g=)

clean_body: = These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer, you can . ICE’s reign of terror across our country has been horrific, unacceptable, and absolutely lawless. I’m Democrat Raja Krishnamoorthi. For months, ICE agents have been wreaking havoc on our communities and operating without ANY accountability. And in front of our very eyes, this lawlessness has turned deadly. That’s why I’ve been sounding the alarm on ICE since day one — and taking action. It’s why I put it all on the line to demand access to ICE facilities. And even when ICE agents evicted me and called the police for “trespassing”, I stood my ground. = It’s why I introduced legislation to restrict the use of force by ICE and to literally unmask them. = And it’s why I’ve called for Kristi Noem to testify before the Oversight Committee and answer for the actions of ICE agents. = Look, this is personal to me. My parents immigrated to this country when I was a baby. Things weren’t always easy, but they believed more than anyone in the promise of this country. That’s what the American story is all about. I’m running for Senate because I won’t stand by while Donald Trump wreaks havoc on everything that made my story possible. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with me, Raja Krishnamoorthi | Democrat Raja Krishnamoorthi is running for Senate in Illinois to fight back against Donald Trump and the far-right MAGA movement, protect critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, and rebuild the middle class. Peter, In the wake of the assassination attempt on my father's life - and the assassination of my friend Charlie Kirk - the opposition has made things clear:

**Violence is all they have left.** They don't want to talk. Or debate. Because they know they'll lose. So how do we as patriots live in an America where so many people openly despise us... and wish us harm? Well, that's something the Trump family knows a lot about. In fact, I've had so many people ask me how our family has endured living under constant attack for a decade that I decided to write a book about it. **It 's called _Under Siege: My Family 's Fight to Save Our Nation._**_ _
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d75c0e38f29945faa481b9460a207d07&_e=5IQsRZKj_6V2jfnROc705j7ojl3uexMYyQQz1D2bDAsM_CAEvTEYIA8wgemrm9a4HisEjp8sbGo5NmD3eWSIV1MnucZaanUHvEyAUiDFvn0EvxiPkuCVjj1mXxgZU79JdTkl6xPEARIkGDlOYYvCj1kYNiAYh_jG_iu9P-eQzQGviq-hdGdefDu5HW7T2vzXcEM-7h3ORWxwH-PuGmehin_5CVEwXRSg3g40XFaAVmJPyZ4Cgy5xzRohnBhTS7HHMwRvPZzlvqEuMpcsWcngEi3WFv5vN50F0jo0JhDIyj0AAwZxi4S5hcvrxe01pSC7RcmIOXyO6uiuxW4VJrPVL6hvF7Y2eMMRvhp5Z1s16TPuBR8sdwmdLJ1cevuD06fTS6XmE00QMYVkZiL2E_-JDhzwtHUlW2Cz0To621ovZvKbi3GbGIHOilH8-CG_eOi87jMioxbywFAveDeznpEtB0nxyC8oebQD-HWHN5RnKdsZAi0_c1mh8zYa5uJgupkMmle8rcHfzgnMwBMwqCkg92QOKrEqP7rCnL7LPOrYxk2VCGAeWTJTP20cPVMuC0KpLx5ojZHTFyPviUHyU1YKmOWnQJdZL5zWTqPZQEMLC47-ERybgKJjGhYipUb5sTCbeo3BZim9L-y7a6C3QI0aWvZdU-YQve2F7GSyv229lS-GiqGx9ts4o2VwrISguoCl8eMt2ICgBzmAc810HQvuAFDRXvjlOaZ4gnrZf-Ys4G0%3D)

That's what patriots did in the days and weeks after Charlie's murder. And it's what my family did after my father was almost assassinated last year in Butler, Pennsylvania. That day I was watching the rally at home. Both my 4-year-old daughter and my 6-year-old son were sitting on my lap. We stared in shock at the TV as "Grandpa" dropped to the ground behind the podium. I remember thinking that he was gone. But the worst attacks on my dad have resulted in his greatest triumphs. **When he stood up with blood running down his face, pumped his fist in the air, and challenged us to "Fight! Fight! Fight!" you and I witnessed a "turning point" in American history.** Sometimes I can't believe what we've all been through. Not just my dad and the entire Trump family... but all of us patriotic Americans. Think about it: _The millions of illegals dumped off in our small towns and cities..._ _The "mail-in ballots" and rigged census numbers..._ _Billions of our tax dollars laundered through fake "USAID" programs to rig elections and fund left-wing propaganda..._ It was all designed to break us. Demoralize us. **And silence us.** We watched as Steve Bannon and Peter Navarro were marched off to prison... As our schools and churches were shut down. **Members of the Legacy Media repeatedly call us "fascists" and "Nazis" for supporting my dad. ** But you know, when he stood up after that assassin's bullet tore through his ear, I think it clicked for millions of people: Donald Trump will fight with his last breath to save this nation. It was a moment of true courage and true leadership. And it spurred a generation of young men and women who've been told their whole lives that there's nothing good about this nation to suddenly stand up a little taller and say, "Donald Trump is right. America is worth fighting for." **Charlie Kirk reached millions of Americans with the same message. A message of courage, hard work, and Christian values that cost him his life.** Under Charlie's leadership, **Turning Point Action** became the top group, training, and organizing conservatives to promote freedom across the country. And that's not going to stop. Charlie's wife, Erika, has vowed to make sure that Turning Point Action will become stronger, bolder, louder, and greater than ever before. _Charlie 's voice will become millions of voices._ I'm proud to be one of them. That's why I'm writing you on behalf of Turning Point Action today. Thirteen years ago when Charlie looked at our college campuses, he saw teenagers from good, Christian, conservative homes being indoctrinated with leftist contempt for America. And he realized, just like my dad did, that America was going to be destroyed from the inside out unless our young people were taught to love this country again... the way our grandparents were. **Turning Point Action is inspiring a new wave of conservatism across our country.** It's why my dad believes in Turning Point Action. Because Donald Trump knows that one administration alone can't save this nation. We need millions of Americans to have their own "turning point" moment and realize that our country will survive only if citizens value freedom more than left-wing Socialism and race-baiting politics. The attacks on my father and Charlie are proof that the Left wants to destroy this nation. **Peter will join with me in supporting Turning Point Action by sending a one-time gift of any amount today?** Just as light pushes back darkness, a stronger Turning Point Action will defeat the America haters. [**I’ll send you a hardback copy of Under Siege as my personal thanks for your gift of $50 or more today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d75c0e38f29945faa481b9460a207d07&_e=5IQsRZKj_6V2jfnROc705j7ojl3uexMYyQQz1D2bDAsM_CAEvTEYIA8wgemrm9a4HisEjp8sbGo5NmD3eWSIV1MnucZaanUHvEyAUiDFvn0EvxiPkuCVjj1mXxgZU79JdTkl6xPEARIkGDlOYYvCj1kYNiAYh_jG_iu9P-eQzQGviq-hdGdefDu5HW7T2vzXcEM-7h3ORWxwH-PuGmehin_5CVEwXRSg3g40XFaAVmJPyZ4Cgy5xzRohnBhTS7HH9aNwbQtBAh5phKOvIWfNlSppzbzHvqaLzJSNP1bN7uZ6mzAVoUStwASM7ryU5WNLy8T4BxiXlaJN03-1Ecer08d5VJ3sq9LJ6IapHyJ1aNVexP4xZChVon5YYvCVi1Hh2unaEacsBfCokgu03qhUuQiCI2Aptv0kT_Zp6EerFSQuhclrRA5NWy3wmCvWSp8rzg4htGdllO_IvOQ1RhnMCT-WThKblH9qeguWgFPdmvbJYEzlN6axIdQ3jSYqDqOptWS8V4FTTx5n0tfj-hBN58LIYXVx-NbRa3QtBFYDFVQ1ldgbL-D4Rrg9CQ76yhOgfENXhE9FHuT3cEhz8hohgOFYaDzaAkysJxk76gTEXhlSazAklmja0VG2Ovx5j4L28qIlmP1KCuNy-MLoJgQm2yUwMloWrG1fAGFb97811PFRTbDtdhr5xQK4wq8ofNL29rrAcQDrp_EDSVzdK50EvlkVN_C-mfW4YYOWId1dS54%3D)

It 's called Under Siege: My Family 's Fight to Save Our Nation. Written before Charlie was taken from us, this book already highlighted that America is truly under siege. Now with him gone, I believe it's more relevant than ever. I'd like to send you a copy, Peter. Because we all need to know how to look evil in the eye - and overcome it. That's what patriots did in the days and weeks after Charlie's murder. And it's what my family did after my father was almost assassinated last year in Butler, Pennsylvania. That day I was watching the rally at home. Both my 4-year-old daughter and my 6-year-old son were sitting on my lap. We stared in shock at the TV as "Grandpa" dropped to the ground behind the podium. I remember thinking that he was gone. But the worst attacks on my dad have resulted in his greatest triumphs. When he stood up with blood running down his face, pumped his fist in the air, and challenged us to "Fight! Fight! Fight!" you and I witnessed a "turning point" in American history. Sometimes I can't believe what we've all been through. Not just my dad and the entire Trump family... but all of us patriotic Americans. Think about it: The millions of illegals dumped off in our small towns and cities... The "mail-in ballots" and rigged census numbers... Billions of our tax dollars laundered through fake "USAID" programs to rig elections and fund left-wing propaganda... It was all designed to break us. Demoralize us. And silence us. We watched as Steve Bannon and Peter Navarro were marched off to prison... As our schools and churches were shut down. Members of the Legacy Media repeatedly call us "fascists" and "Nazis" for supporting my dad. But you know, when he stood up after that assassin's bullet tore through his ear, I think it clicked for millions of people: Donald Trump will fight with his last breath to save this nation. It was a moment of true courage and true leadership. And it spurred a generation of young men and women who've been told their whole lives that there's nothing good about this nation to suddenly stand up a little taller and say, "Donald Trump is right. America is worth fighting for." Charlie Kirk reached millions of Americans with the same message. A message of courage, hard work, and Christian values that cost him his life. Under Charlie's leadership, Turning Point Action became the top group, training, and organizing conservatives to promote freedom across the country. And that's not going to stop. Charlie's wife, Erika, has vowed to make sure that Turning Point Action will become stronger, bolder, louder, and greater than ever before. Charlie 's voice will become millions of voices. I'm proud to be one of them. That's why I'm writing you on behalf of Turning Point Action today. Thirteen years ago when Charlie looked at our college campuses, he saw teenagers from good, Christian, conservative homes being indoctrinated with leftist contempt for America. And he realized, just like my dad did, that America was going to be destroyed from the inside out unless our young people were taught to love this country again... the way our grandparents were. Turning Point Action is inspiring a new wave of conservatism across our country. It's why my dad believes in Turning Point Action. Because Donald Trump knows that one administration alone can't save this nation. We need millions of Americans to have their own "turning point" moment and realize that our country will survive only if citizens value freedom more than left-wing Socialism and race-baiting politics. The attacks on my father and Charlie are proof that the Left wants to destroy this nation. Peter will join with me in supporting Turning Point Action by sending a one-time gift of any amount today? Just as light pushes back darkness, a stronger Turning Point Action will defeat the America haters. Charlie was taken from us - but his missionlives on in us. His courage is an example to all of us. So is his patriotism. Thank you for helping Turning Point Action ensure that everything he fought for - and everything our forefathers fought for - will endure for future generations. For Charlie & America,Eric Trump On behalf of Turning Point Action P.S. We were all under siege. And I hope my book reminds you that evil will not prevail when patriots stand together. Thank you again for standing with the Trump family and all the patriots at Turning Point Action. And with Charlie. | | TURNING POINT ACTION, INC. IS A 501(C)(4) NONPROFIT ORGANIZATION DEDICATED TO PROMOTING SOCIAL WELFARE THROUGH RAISING AWARENESS ABOUT FREE MARKETS AND CAPITALISM, INITIATING CIVIC ACTION AMONGST THE YOUNGER GENERATION, AND EDUCATING YOUTH IN ORDER TO ESTABLISH FREE MARKET POLICIES INTO LAW. DONATIONS ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE. NO GOODS OR SERVICES WERE PROVIDED IN EXCHANGE FOR YOUR CONTRIBUTION UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED. PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION.COM) AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. | | 4930 East Beverly RoadPhoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: Our health care system is broken, Peter
body:
We need change.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
When people have to choose between paying for medicine and keeping their lights on, it’s clear our system is broken.
When I’m Governor, I’ll insure a million new Texans and lower health care costs for every Texan. It’s what we deserve.
**[If you’re with me, will you pitch in $5 toward my campaign’s $100,000 goal before the Jan. 22 pre-primary fundraising deadline?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260117_1_healthcare.DsV5lB&refcode=em20260117-431&amount=5&t=1&akid=431%2E299639%2E4dAq4h)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260117_1_healthcare.DsV5lB&amount=5&refcode=em20260117-431&t=20&akid=431%2E299639%2E4dAq4h)
We’ve already seen that Greg Abbott will not rein in the insurance companies.
I don’t have a problem with people making money, but I _do_ have a problem with those in power taking our money and not giving us what we pay for.
We need change — for our kids, our families, and our communities.
And we have the power to make that change.
We have a huge fundraising deadline coming up, so I’m asking:
[**Can you donate $5 or anything at all to help reach our $100,000 goal?**](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260117_1_healthcare.DsV5lB&refcode=em20260117-431&amount=5&t=21&akid=431%2E299639%2E4dAq4h)
Thank you for your support,
Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260117-1&t=22&refcode2=431_299639_4dAq4h&akid=431%2E299639%2E4dAq4h)

Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
