name: Ro Khanna
subject: Tell Congress: Stop Wall Street Landlords
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
America has a housing crisis—and Wall Street is making it worse.
Private equity firms are buying up single-family homes nationwide, jacking up rents and making it harder for working- and middle-class families to buy homes. Nearly half of renters [https://www.cnn.com/2024/09/12/economy/us-housing-costs-survey/index.html] are now spending more than 30 percent of their income on housing. That’s not affordable.
Tell Congress: Protect the American Dream and stop Wall Street landlords. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/privatization-of-housing-petition?contactdata=40n1nsCBw5kzo6V9AqEw+PyHJDJ1eyGOxnT3A0rMqBacHcvF8xHAJXADJ0ZU0psOEY66QQaqbzPJcWcGbO5bDwwLzhWR+F71r53EW1EYgSqDoqlmNbFUNNTevni7aHTZlCcaJlblUcWg3q7oQLuOyJFllsGKGcExGkJsZNyTlARyu5am5REphwuc3JdNZUiR]
https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/2009040853864468903 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/2009040853864468903]
I’ve just reintroduced the Stop Wall Street Landlords Act , which would ban private equity firms from using taxpayer-funded loans to purchase single-family homes. By blocking these loans, we’d provide Americans with greater access to affordable housing and an opportunity to build wealth through homeownership, bringing us closer to restoring the American Dream.
Housing is not a luxury. It’s a human right. Let’s make sure every American, whether they own or rent, has a safe, secure, and affordable place to call home.
SIGN THE PETITION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/privatization-of-housing-petition?contactdata=40n1nsCBw5kzo6V9AqEw+PyHJDJ1eyGOxnT3A0rMqBacHcvF8xHAJXADJ0ZU0psOEY66QQaqbzPJcWcGbO5bDwwLzhWR+F71r53EW1EYgSqDoqlmNbFUNNTevni7aHTZlCcaJlblUcWg3q7oQLuOyJFllsGKGcExGkJsZNyTlARyu5am5REphwuc3JdNZUiR]
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
Onward,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!
DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20260117-wall-st-landlords&amount=3]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20260117-wall-st-landlords]

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: One month to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240611%2E444211%2ElN8B3p)
Early voting for the Texas primaries begins in one month.
That’s all the time we have to reach, register and turn out the voters who will decide our nominees for every position on the ballot. The more people who vote, the stronger our candidates for Senate, Governor and these critical Congressional seats will be and the more invested those voters will be in turning out for the general election in November.
That’s why I’m on the ground across Texas now, working with our volunteers to meet these voters where they are. When grassroots supporters like you step up today, we have the resources to organize in every part of the state.
[**So here’s my ask: will you chip in $3 to Powered by People’s organizing program today? Help us register voters, train volunteers, host community events, and meet the people who will determine the future of our state—before early voting even begins.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260117-1.tnpW8P&refcode=ema20260117-240611&t=3&akid=240611%2E444211%2ElN8B3p)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260117-1.tnpW8P&refcode=ema20260117-240611&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=240611%2E444211%2ElN8B3p)**
Thank you,
Beto

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20260117-240611-footer&t=23&refcode2=240611_444211_lN8B3p&akid=240611%2E444211%2ElN8B3p)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I am humbly asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
All I need is a minute to explain.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em260117-1-b&t=1&akid=11185%2E3935704%2Eb5cdw-)
---
Hello,
I am humbly asking you to pitch in your first donation of $15 to GIFFORDS PAC before midnight. This month marked 15 years since my shooting in Tucson, Arizona, and I am hoping to get the largest number of individual donations we can in our fight against gun violence.
If that is all you need to hear — and you are fired up like I am — you can use this link to donate:
**[https://go.giffords.org/go/Jan2026](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em260117-1-b&t=2&akid=11185%2E3935704%2Eb5cdw-)**
While you probably didn’t wake up this morning thinking you would chip in to help end gun violence, that is the ask I have of you today. Let me explain.
Poll after poll shows that an overwhelming majority of voters support commonsense gun safety legislation. Our politicians must find the courage to act and protect our communities.
If they fail to do so, then we must vote them out and elect leaders who will.
That’s why I am asking:
$15 to help mobilize and reach persuadable voters — online and at their doorstep.
$15 to fight back against any overreach from the Trump administration and Republicans, including efforts to pass a nationwide concealed carry mandate.
$15 to help us elect a gun safety majority.
Our gun lobby adversaries will spend whatever it takes to drown out our movement. The only way we can overcome their attacks is with your support.
**So I am asking you directly:** [**Will you contribute $15 (or more, if you can afford it) to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/64441?c0=giffords-em-q12026.xDd1B-&refcode=em260117-1-b&t=3&akid=11185%2E3935704%2Eb5cdw-)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q12026.zbDOw9&amount=3&refcode=em260117-1-b&t=22&akid=11185%2E3935704%2Eb5cdw-)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-q12026.GT2W2m&refcode=em260117-1-b&t=23&akid=11185%2E3935704%2Eb5cdw-)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-q12026.xIe8uE&refcode=em260117-1-b&t=24&akid=11185%2E3935704%2Eb5cdw-)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-q12026.rrR0ZT&refcode=em260117-1-b&t=25&akid=11185%2E3935704%2Eb5cdw-)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-q12026.yDhc38&refcode=em260117-1-b&t=26&akid=11185%2E3935704%2Eb5cdw-)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q12026.zbDOw9&refcode=em260117-1-b&t=27&akid=11185%2E3935704%2Eb5cdw-)**
---
****
Thank you.
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=11185%2E3935704%2Eb5cdw-) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Bohannan HQ
subject: Mariannette Miller-Meeks' top wellness tips
disclaimer_text: paid for by big pharma
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123517632/595710588/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjgxZTdjMC1jMWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xZL95B54MtFmv2Dh_aPCSvA2h-waJT1MuuAW352DfAk=)

Peter, when it comes to lowering healthcare costs, Mariannette Miller-Meeks has what she probably thinks is a _brilliant_ plan. Ready for it? 🥁

**She thinks healthcare should actually stay expensive, in her own words: "When there is a co-pay and a deductible, there's some skin in the game. Patients don't overutilize."**

According to Mariannette Miller-Meeks, the solution isn't lowering costs or taking on big pharmaceutical companies. It's telling her constituents that _maybe_ they should just change their behavior. _Eat better. Buy those organic groceries and keep paying more at the register. Exercise more and go sign up for a gym membership instead of saving that money for the medication you need to stay alive. Drink more water._ Because clearly it's your personal habits that are standing between you and affordable healthcare, right? **It makes no sense to us either.**

Christina, on the other hand, lives in the real world. She understands two very simple truths:

**First,** raising healthcare costs helps no one except Big Pharma and corporate executives who are already doing just fine. And **second,** sometimes you can do everything right and still get sick or need to go to the hospital. **Sh*t happens, and Christina believes Iowans should be able to afford healthcare when it does.**

[**IA-01 deserves better than lectures from an out-of-touch politician who is bought and paid for by big pharma. It's time for real leadership that actually understands what people are dealing with. Will you stand up today to support someone who will fight for affordable healthcare and stand up to corporate interests? Chip in to support Christina Bohannan >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123517633/595710589/-2011951990?refcode=em26_260117_FRHCQ_fnd_gq_act___BHQ_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260117_FRHCQ_fnd_gq_act___BHQ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a681e7c0-c1f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjgxZTdjMC1jMWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xZL95B54MtFmv2Dh_aPCSvA2h-waJT1MuuAW352DfAk=)

clean_body: | = Peter, when it comes to lowering healthcare costs, Mariannette Miller-Meeks has what she probably thinks is a brilliant plan. Ready for it? 🥁 She thinks healthcare should actually stay expensive, in her own words: "When there is a co-pay and a deductible, there's some skin in the game. Patients don't overutilize." According to Mariannette Miller-Meeks, the solution isn't lowering costs or taking on big pharmaceutical companies. It's telling her constituents that maybe they should just change their behavior. Eat better. Buy those organic groceries and keep paying more at the register. Exercise more and go sign up for a gym membership instead of saving that money for the medication you need to stay alive. Drink more water. Because clearly it's your personal habits that are standing between you and affordable healthcare, right? It makes no sense to us either. Christina, on the other hand, lives in the real world. She understands two very simple truths: First, raising healthcare costs helps no one except Big Pharma and corporate executives who are already doing just fine. And second, sometimes you can do everything right and still get sick or need to go to the hospital. Sht happens, and Christina believes Iowans should be able to afford healthcare when it does. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: body:
Donald Trump is weaponizing the federal government to target his political opponents
| | | | Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat taking on Lauren Boebert in Colorado's 4th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Trisha. However [if you'd like to unsubscribe,](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001XvBc3bsHgRWXLyJfHoB0-w%3D&ch=005337f2-e4bf-11f0-bd14-0242b661c010&ca=cdbe96ab-ba68-4ba2-992c-591fcf87de8a) you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.

| After I reminded our servicemembers of their obligations to uphold their oaths to the Constitution, Donald Trump called for me to be arrested, tried for treason, and executed.
Then the President and his MAGA lackeys launched a bogus FBI inquiry into me and other veteran Members of Congress who dared to speak out against this corrupt administration.
Now, Trump is sending his political cronies at the Justice Department, including former Fox News host Jeanine Pirro, the U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia, to try and threaten and intimidate me.
I served three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. I took an oath to defend the Constitution as a paratrooper, Army Ranger, and now Member of Congress. It's a lifetime oath, and I intend to keep it.
Donald Trump has picked a fight with the wrong people. I refuse to be intimidated, and I won't stand for our democracy to be dismantled. None of us want to live in an America where the President can weaponize the government against their perceived enemies.
[With Trump's FBI and DOJ coming after me, will you split a contribution between Trisha Calvarese and my campaign today to help defend against these attacks and show Donald Trump we won't be silenced?](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jOKYvErPFk7hFhLFp6PO83y6wPms6uayMFuerKaewVCTlFvVYNAmEDo7CY2ok_zcDolprBXbXEZBSeyYn2QwBoOYVoJwczkC1SsoymwIm9grbgDtBFZ8vIf7chzoEDX2nnRdrtmYTOcMYHpYLONym2SfX1scjz0MaOpQ0e8vlnzmZI7faUzH-6NLy4KelRcgkVGbGaO0_w3EXsux556J0OnoUIPGGorcjqYCKCb3WrY=&c=o_9WZAld6VINZ7bk1Kg6WDpgz6D59xztuaylGF5YSDIjQi8EflZBYQ==&ch=rjf_DG0aQlXCyDXoMzkYpwMDxZuV3dVMgDh4upGIFMaSaPWrVVeBmg==)

Trisha is a labor leader, federal public servant, and native daughter of the district. Trisha fought for working Americans as the speechwriter of the National AFL-CIO and will carry that fight to D.C. as the next Congresswoman for CO-4. | | == Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado | | | | 9609 S University Blvd, PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Fri, Jan 16, 2026
Subject: We will not be silenced
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
You and our peaceful resistance to this authoritarian regime give me hope.
Immediately after ICE killed Renee Good in Minneapolis, our communities organized more than 1,200 ICE Out rallies and vigils across the country. Hundreds of thousands of people spoke out with an estimated 6,500 in Seattle, Washington; 3,000 in St. Cloud, Minnesota; and more than 350 people outside of the Alligator Alcatraz ICE black site detention camp in the remote Florida Everglades.
**Today, I am in Minnesota to expose the truth about ICE terrorizing our neighborhoods. Together, we are holding them accountable.**
This is what resistance looks like. More people are rising up to defend their neighbors of all races and ethnicities. Now, public opinion polls show that more Americans want to abolish ICE than keep it in place—and that combined with public pressure could shift more of my colleagues in Congress to join me in demanding an end to ICE.
The American people are clear in rejecting Trump’s unconstitutional power grabs and his attempts to put his hateful agenda over our rights and our laws.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxewXXSWu898dZ-6Pr1Y9JZunjuG1vHk-SPai_uaqg2VhLvkjXOuPIOy9-RJ2bbINLRd7MXJ2BqeXlqWztEkKuzsWNz2ABPmC-Ele2R0a3X4CJfDf7LfPK-otKHVX5LP2rjqXZJnouxhTDU62sNQbQmKLhjj-_5qoPLFEL5gqfcc7vQdLtR3peBvhNhn-ns0c4yXC5UkSdu1KNup8Av5TcpyQlgRf-YcfmXFtnLwk5suOPx10MPzHKYpR-d9tKqOGZK-3ceNInPDohxzxhJfr3b3sc3PPB7rfMvoNZmPq7wmrICtYN6j5xN6u1JJuEojQ/4nd/JLZkBQlCRbyaY6h50h30ig/h15/h001.y-kUo3oR8b0c7Qxt-JO4wJMI57G8n5QxgADT9wi0XWA)
We reject Trump’s tax cuts for billionaires and his handouts to billion-dollar corporations. We demand a government that works for the _people_.
We reject his racist travel ban and his crackdown on free speech―including pro-Palestine speech. We demand a true multi-racial democracy where everyone’s rights are respected, people get to have a say in where their tax dollars go, and lawmakers actually act in alignment with the American people who voted them into office.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxewXXSWu898dZ-6Pr1Y9JZunjuG1vHk-SPai_uaqg2aokeNSccAuhgFxZDnFazTIrc0V6KiMEVsubbfD9f5vnhxM_bY99RAhWm2JqC2fF0u4UNjY_UsGtOoftLBOscvYCvLASWI5UdKCjVzenZjkaeHxs4siYEgIhd5A7MEDPrwUiUghvRRKBgsUQSvHFUYG3qNhm7jnRlq5R0lFRydKdqiPxbYx9rwu1a7yBiw-pbOXnnni4xMJk77CwEskj-1Of2HsbyDJwXv4tZX1awXcmuPz_P9J2FOA5u_MwMZ2L1a6XTDXNnCyktSVQD5ebFnk/4nd/JLZkBQlCRbyaY6h50h30ig/h16/h001.j11qvMyCoH5uoIO6xvfgHxeG6TStjGbVM2PwVMTyZBU)
We reject imperialism and the imperial boomerang, where the U.S. government practices oppressing people in places like Palestine and Venezuela―and then brings that oppression home.
We reject Trump and Republicans’ cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security, SNAP, and more. Instead we demand a more expansive social safety net with universal healthcare, housing and food for all, debt cancellation, and monthly direct cash assistance for people and families in need.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxewXXSWu898dZ-6Pr1Y9JZunjuG1vHk-SPai_uaqg2RIV6FvCbTANhAlSJ6UGw4WWRWYVRC5QC8o-8XGGPJSPuWN9NZRhrpGYQUZn0TsQrqRZlNk0VTjymtJ5Y9MTQitQGV6QgO1FsieOujuKBz3CvDPWop3UL1kzgsQ0quckw4Cas58wuyVepMbEatfP5ExhQQXvPrCbZ1XyTOZ0QyiX_8qMiRd2uuaRFzS3GFIdQnnCh76bd_vxzsH5Fbh0-bERDVl2G8sexCCShCQOS4WNyrwsX21RMsBNUgf7egVrkjEV_vAEWjPYDBYD51vAyiU/4nd/JLZkBQlCRbyaY6h50h30ig/h17/h001.YldOWvrq_F735rFesuchMlMOFMgU1DffIAmBuXAwR5g)

clean_body: While congressional Republicans continue to bow to Trump’s will, the American people refuse to be bullied. | | | Friend, Resistance can take many forms. It can include rallying with our neighbors to demand democracy rather than oligarchy, or demand Palestinian liberation. Resistance can involve demanding the government protect and expand lifesaving programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. It can include participating in and holding Know Your Rights workshops, joining community ICE watch teams, or training the next generation of leaders. It can involve supporting workers and rallying with labor leaders. It can also mean simple acts of kindness, community service, or mutual aid. Together we’re showing that even in the face of relentless attacks, we are strong and connected, and we will defeat hate with love. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Together, we will resist and we will prevail. -Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, Jan 16, 2026 Subject: We will not be silenced To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, You and our peaceful resistance to this authoritarian regime give me hope. Immediately after ICE killed Renee Good in Minneapolis, our communities organized more than 1,200 ICE Out rallies and vigils across the country. Hundreds of thousands of people spoke out with an estimated 6,500 in Seattle, Washington; 3,000 in St. Cloud, Minnesota; and more than 350 people outside of the Alligator Alcatraz ICE black site detention camp in the remote Florida Everglades. Today, I am in Minnesota to expose the truth about ICE terrorizing our neighborhoods. Together, we are holding them accountable. This is what resistance looks like. More people are rising up to defend their neighbors of all races and ethnicities. Now, public opinion polls show that more Americans want to abolish ICE than keep it in place—and that combined with public pressure could shift more of my colleagues in Congress to join me in demanding an end to ICE. The American people are clear in rejecting Trump’s unconstitutional power grabs and his attempts to put his hateful agenda over our rights and our laws. We reject Trump’s tax cuts for billionaires and his handouts to billion-dollar corporations. We demand a government that works for the people. We reject his racist travel ban and his crackdown on free speech―including pro-Palestine speech. We demand a true multi-racial democracy where everyone’s rights are respected, people get to have a say in where their tax dollars go, and lawmakers actually act in alignment with the American people who voted them into office. We reject imperialism and the imperial boomerang, where the U.S. government practices oppressing people in places like Palestine and Venezuela―and then brings that oppression home. We reject Trump and Republicans’ cuts to Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security, SNAP, and more. Instead we demand a more expansive social safety net with universal healthcare, housing and food for all, debt cancellation, and monthly direct cash assistance for people and families in need. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Together, we will not be silent as Trump terrorizes our communities and attacks the foundations of our democracy. We will stand on the shoulders of everyday people who fought for this country to live up to its ideals and promises of democracy—and we continue their fight for better. name: Karen Hamilton
subject: LEGISLATIVE SESSION 2026 is underway!
body:
---
|
---
| |
---
| VIRGINIA IS FOR PATRIOTS!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Patriots, Greetings from Richmond! The 2026 Session of the Virginia General Assembly got underway Wednesday, and we hit the ground running. We got sworn in at noon...
---
|
---
Then, the newly-enlarged Democratic majority immediately initiated the process to push through four proposed amendments to the Virginia Constitution, setting the stage for them to appear on a ballot sometime this year. The proposed amendments are: ● HJ1: Add a nebulous “right to reproductive freedom” to the Constitution, which would void most of our laws on parental consent and notification for minors, as well as allow for abortion practically to the moment of birth.
● HJ2: Automatically restore the voting rights of ALL felons (even violent felons such as murderers and child rapists) once they’re out of jail, regardless of whether they’re still on probation or have paid their fine and restitution.
● HJ3: Remove Virginia’s same sex marriage ban from the Constitution. The clause is moot due to a U.S. Supreme Court ruling. However, language in this amendment embeds gender ideology into our Virginia Constitution and threatens religious liberty.
● HJ4: Let Democrats in the legislature bypass our nonpartisan redistricting laws and gerrymander our Congressional delegation to send as many as 10 Democratic members to Congress in a state that splits about down the middle most years. Here in Richmond, our team has done everything we can to stop these changes. Republicans argued, questioned, cajoled, and otherwise annoyed the majority party on these amendments for two sessions in a row. While things are still subject to change, you’ll likely see THREE of these amendments on the ballot in November: Abortion, Same Sex Marriage, and Voting Rights Restoration. The fourth, the redistricting amendment, is rumored to have its own special election sometime this Spring.
Now, the power is in your hands. We can stop this power grab as well as the other terrible amendments, but only if YOU get to the polls and vote! So I'm asking again that everyone sign up for[ABSENTEE VOTING](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/09Pl7Aq_U/c?w=8rpeenNE9fP9QptoCrnLV9F3ypXkTpYPBUv_EMru-Yk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly92b3RlLmVsZWN0aW9ucy52aXJnaW5pYS5nb3YvUmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uL0Rtdkxvb2t1cCIsInIiOiIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ) Here's Why: Democrats have figured out how to maximize turnout in these special elections. While we are frantically trying to notify our base and push voters to the polls on an unexpected Election Day, a significant portion of Democrat voters are mailed a ballot directly to their home, every single election, without their party having to spend a single dime or minute of effort. When you receive your absentee ballot in the mail, it serves as a REMINDER. If you are opposed to mail in voting, you may take your uncompleted ballot and turn it in, then proceed to vote in person, if that is your preference. Here's What I Know:We cannot continue operating with the status quo and expecting different results. Please understand that our opposition wants to drive our perspectives and influence into PERMANENT EXTINCTION in Virginia. We will be up against an enormous war chest of funding from the Democrats, so we have to outwork them on the ground. I am hopeful that the lessons we learned last November will serve as a catalyst to motivate each of us to do everything we can to stop these amendments dead in their tracks!
|
---
| In other news, I received my committee assignments: Public SafetyandCommunication, Technology & Innovation This allows me the opportunity to voice concerns and ask questions on a variety of issues that matter to you-- from our 2A rights to data centers to artificial intelligence.
---
|
---
I look forward to the work ahead and want to thank each of you for entrusting me with the privilege to fight for you down in Richmond. I hope to see some of you on Lobby Day this upcoming Monday! Defending Liberty, Delegate Hamilton P.S. If you want daily updates and behind the scenes snapshots of the day to day happenings, be sure follow me on Facebook, X (Twitter), and Instagram! (links below)
|
---
|
---
| "THE FUTURE BELONGS TO THOSE WHO REFUSE TO REMAIN SILENT."-CHARLIE KIRK
---
|
---
| | |
---

clean_body: | | | | VIRGINIA IS FOR PATRIOTS! | | | | Patriots, Greetings from Richmond! The 2026 Session of the Virginia General Assembly got underway Wednesday, and we hit the ground running. We got sworn in at noon... | Then, the newly-enlarged Democratic majority immediately initiated the process to push through four proposed amendments to the Virginia Constitution, setting the stage for them to appear on a ballot sometime this year. The proposed amendments are: ● HJ1: Add a nebulous “right to reproductive freedom” to the Constitution, which would void most of our laws on parental consent and notification for minors, as well as allow for abortion practically to the moment of birth. ● HJ2: Automatically restore the voting rights of ALL felons (even violent felons such as murderers and child rapists) once they’re out of jail, regardless of whether they’re still on probation or have paid their fine and restitution. ● HJ3: Remove Virginia’s same sex marriage ban from the Constitution. The clause is moot due to a U.S. Supreme Court ruling. However, language in this amendment embeds gender ideology into our Virginia Constitution and threatens religious liberty. ● HJ4: Let Democrats in the legislature bypass our nonpartisan redistricting laws and gerrymander our Congressional delegation to send as many as 10 Democratic members to Congress in a state that splits about down the middle most years. Here in Richmond, our team has done everything we can to stop these changes. Republicans argued, questioned, cajoled, and otherwise annoyed the majority party on these amendments for two sessions in a row. While things are still subject to change, you’ll likely see THREE of these amendments on the ballot in November: Abortion, Same Sex Marriage, and Voting Rights Restoration. The fourth, the redistricting amendment, is rumored to have its own special election sometime this Spring. Now, the power is in your hands. We can stop this power grab as well as the other terrible amendments, but only if YOU get to the polls and vote! So I'm asking again that everyone sign up for Here's Why: Democrats have figured out how to maximize turnout in these special elections. While we are frantically trying to notify our base and push voters to the polls on an unexpected Election Day, a significant portion of Democrat voters are mailed a ballot directly to their home, every single election, without their party having to spend a single dime or minute of effort. When you receive your absentee ballot in the mail, it serves as a REMINDER. If you are opposed to mail in voting, you may take your uncompleted ballot and turn it in, then proceed to vote in person, if that is your preference. Here's What I Know:We cannot continue operating with the status quo and expecting different results. Please understand that our opposition wants to drive our perspectives and influence into PERMANENT EXTINCTION in Virginia. We will be up against an enormous war chest of funding from the Democrats, so we have to outwork them on the ground. I am hopeful that the lessons we learned last November will serve as a catalyst to motivate each of us to do everything we can to stop these amendments dead in their tracks! | | In other news, I received my committee assignments: Public SafetyandCommunication, Technology & Innovation This allows me the opportunity to voice concerns and ask questions on a variety of issues that matter to you-- from our 2A rights to data centers to artificial intelligence. | I look forward to the work ahead and want to thank each of you for entrusting me with the privilege to fight for you down in Richmond. I hope to see some of you on Lobby Day this upcoming Monday! Defending Liberty, Delegate Hamilton P.S. If you want daily updates and behind the scenes snapshots of the day to day happenings, be sure follow me on Facebook, X (Twitter), and Instagram! (links below) | | | "THE FUTURE BELONGS TO THOSE WHO REFUSE TO REMAIN SILENT."-CHARLIE KIRK | | | | | | | You can find out more about me at: General Jason Miyares Member Joe Short, Town of Culpeper for AmericaPolice Benevolent AssociationNRAVirginia Society for Human Life | | | Find me on social media! | | | | | | | This email was sent from .

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Fixing what’s broken
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I know firsthand that the government only works well if it works for the people.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1369%2E181023%2EJswuqn)
Friend,
Did you know that, when I first took office as Secretary of State, Michigan’s election administration **ranked 31st** in the nation?
**Today, we are ranked number two.**
Together, hand-in-hand with the Michigan clerks and poll workers who administer safe, secure, and accurate elections, we’ve worked to improve voter turnout and voting access for _millions_ of eligible Michigan voters.
**I know firsthand that the government only works well if it works for the people.****[That’s why I’ve worked to protect the voices of Michigan voters as secretary of state, and it’s what I’ll continue doing as Michigan’s governor. If you’re with me, will you chip in today?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/2224?c0=jmb-em-q12026.GtzdDm&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1369%2E181023%2EJswuqn)**

As Michigan’s next governor, I will bring real solutions to Lansing — not political games, conspiracy theories, or inaction.
I will work to make our government more efficient for everyone, and ensure it saves people time, money, and makes your life easier. **I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work — and that means both listening to the concerns of Michiganders and then actually taking action to fix them.**
**[Any amount you can contribute today will help us create a winning campaign that works for all of us. Will you donate today?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/2224?c0=jmb-em-q12026.GtzdDm&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=1369%2E181023%2EJswuqn)**

Jocelyn

healthcare premiu...wait.' The post Abdul quoted says 'JUST IN - Boeing
awarded $8.6 billion contract by Pentagon for 25 F-15 jets for Israel —
Reuters'

While working people struggle with rising healthcare costs, Washington
keeps finding billions of dollars to fuel war and genocide abroad.

This is the broken system Abdul is fighting to change.

Our campaign centers around policies that will support working people and
build a government that actually delivers for us:

* Getting money out of politics and putting money in your pockets
* Investing our taxpayer dollars in improving our communities, not
dropping bombs overseas
* Passing Medicare for All

But none of this will matter if we lose to our corporate and AIPAC-backed
opponent.

That’s why we’re counting on grassroots support to fuel our organizing
efforts so that every Michigander hears from Abdul and knows the stakes of
this race.

subject: Want to help me make history in Minnesota?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Peggy could be the first Native American woman in the Senate.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123518752/595713623/1328794144?refcode=ea.2e2969b2-c4f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&ms=ea.2e2969b2-c4f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMjk2OWIyLWM0ZjMtZjAxMS04ZDRjLTAwMGQzYTU0YjU2MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JYorX2Z7MknoHryE1-xl1_XgGviAwKkjx9Gkb-o8HBw=&emci=ad029e90-1df3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&emdi=2e2969b2-c4f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&ceid=4823105)
---
It's impossible to ignore what's happening in this country right now. Whether it's militarized ICE operations terrorizing communities across Minnesota, or Trump handing the same greedy fossil fuel executives who bankrolled his campaign everything they could ever dream — _we are watching authoritarianism unfold in real time._ **The actions we take in moments like these define what kind of country we choose to be. And they demand leaders who refuse to sit on the sidelines while Trump consolidates power.** **[That’s why JanePAC is proud to endorse Peggy Flanagan for U.S. Senate in Minnesota. Will you please use this link to split a donation of any amount today to directly support Peggy’s campaign and help us send even more bold, unapologetic leaders like her to Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123518753/595713624/89281171?refcode=ea.2e2969b2-c4f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&ms=ea.2e2969b2-c4f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMjk2OWIyLWM0ZjMtZjAxMS04ZDRjLTAwMGQzYTU0YjU2MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JYorX2Z7MknoHryE1-xl1_XgGviAwKkjx9Gkb-o8HBw=)** | [SPLIT A DONATION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123518754/595713625/89281171?refcode=ea.2e2969b2-c4f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&ms=ea.2e2969b2-c4f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMjk2OWIyLWM0ZjMtZjAxMS04ZDRjLTAwMGQzYTU0YjU2MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JYorX2Z7MknoHryE1-xl1_XgGviAwKkjx9Gkb-o8HBw=)
---
Peggy is exactly the kind of leader I had in mind when I launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC.
While too many politicians look the other way as ICE agents terrorize our neighbors, Peggy shows up. She’s traveled across the state, protested alongside community members, and stood with parents and teachers to demand ICE stay out of schools.
She knows that Minnesotans are resilient. They take care of one another, and that when things get tough, they face it _together._ It's the same courage she's brought to another fight: taking on the fossil fuel industry that's been poisoning our air and water while buying off politicians.
As Lieutenant Governor, Peggy helped make Minnesota one of the first states to require 100% carbon-free energy by 2040. She secured over $1 billion for climate resilience and clean energy. She publicly opposed the Line 3 pipeline. And she's rejected fossil fuel money her entire career.
But I want to be clear: Peggy’s race isn’t going to be an easy win. She’s up against an opponent that has raised over $4 million, with coffers filled to the brim with special interest money from insurance companies, Big Pharma, banks, and the energy industry. **There's even a PAC funded by Chevron that spent over $600,000 on digital ads to boost her opponent’s campaign.**
Big Oil knows exactly what's at stake. They're terrified of leaders like Peggy who can't be bought.
And that’s why your grassroots support today could not be more necessary. We not only have a real opportunity to send a true fighter to the U.S. Senate, but if elected, **Peggy will be the first Native American woman ever to serve in the U.S. Senate.**
Now that’s something worth fighting for.
**[So what do you say? clean_body: Peggy could be the first Native American woman in the Senate. | It's impossible to ignore what's happening in this country right now. Whether it's militarized ICE operations terrorizing communities across Minnesota, or Trump handing the same greedy fossil fuel executives who bankrolled his campaign everything they could ever dream — we are watching authoritarianism unfold in real time. The actions we take in moments like these define what kind of country we choose to be. And they demand leaders who refuse to sit on the sidelines while Trump consolidates power. = | = Peggy is exactly the kind of leader I had in mind when I launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. While too many politicians look the other way as ICE agents terrorize our neighbors, Peggy shows up. She’s traveled across the state, protested alongside community members, and stood with parents and teachers to demand ICE stay out of schools. She knows that Minnesotans are resilient. They take care of one another, and that when things get tough, they face it together. It's the same courage she's brought to another fight: taking on the fossil fuel industry that's been poisoning our air and water while buying off politicians. As Lieutenant Governor, Peggy helped make Minnesota one of the first states to require 100% carbon-free energy by 2040. She secured over $1 billion for climate resilience and clean energy. She publicly opposed the Line 3 pipeline. And she's rejected fossil fuel money her entire career. But I want to be clear: Peggy’s race isn’t going to be an easy win. She’s up against an opponent that has raised over $4 million, with coffers filled to the brim with special interest money from insurance companies, Big Pharma, banks, and the energy industry. There's even a PAC funded by Chevron that spent over $600,000 on digital ads to boost her opponent’s campaign. Big Oil knows exactly what's at stake. They're terrified of leaders like Peggy who can't be bought. And that’s why your grassroots support today could not be more necessary. We not only have a real opportunity to send a true fighter to the U.S. Senate, but if elected, Peggy will be the first Native American woman ever to serve in the U.S. Senate. Now that’s something worth fighting for. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s make history. xx Jane = | Follow along: | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: That’s not us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ots_header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ots_header]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q12026_powered-by-people-split?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q12026_powered-by-people-split?amount=]

Hi,

I’ve been all over Texas, recruiting candidates across the ballot, raising volunteers for our voter registration work, and working with those volunteers to register and stay in touch with new voters across the state.

Meeting folks who are stepping into the fight for the first time, joining old friends who’ve been there from the beginning, and talking with new voters to understand their perspectives and what it will take to bring more of them into the next election – all of that makes me feel confident that what we’re doing is key to winning big elections in Texas in 2026.

There’s a place for consultants, pollsters, social media, and TV (I guess), but that’s not us. Powered by People is focused on meeting people where they’re at, showing them the respect they deserve, and working with them to overcome the most intense voter suppression in the country so that we can win power back for the people.

But (you knew this part was coming): we can’t do this without you. This movement is going to take all of us, the organizer, the volunteer, the voter, and you.

I’d like to show all those volunteers out there the kind of support we’ve built behind them. Every dollar keeps us on the ground, helps us bring new voters onto the rolls, and ensures that we can do the essential work needed for 2026 and beyond.

Will you split a $ donation between Off the Sidelines PAC and Powered by People today? Every donation will help Powered by People reach more voters in Texas in 2026 and elect Democrats up and down the ballot. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q12026_powered-by-people-split?amount=]

Friend,

This is a longer message about the rising stakes in this race. I hope you’ll read it the whole way through, but if you’re short on time, can I count on you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123519316/595715982/-1228673924?refcode=em-1.17.26-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDg2MzMxMS1jNmYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u9w2acqY5jeRzT2aGTokSpWlFILWUZpXqUjT9GonEO0=)** today?

It’s not an exaggeration to say that the start to this year has been tumultuous -- from the devastating ICE shooting, to Trump’s unlawful action in Venezuela.

Despite the chaos of this Administration, Democrats have notched real wins: The House passed ACA tax credit extensions that would give working families relief on their healthcare premiums -- it now heads to the Senate. I’m also proud to share that the House passed a bill including nearly $28 million in federal funding for local projects in IL-13.

**This moment demands real action. And with two months until the primary in Illinois, we have the chance to make our voices heard.**

We’re rapidly increasing our on-the-ground voter outreach efforts across the district -- knocking on doors, planting yard signs, and meeting folks where they are at.

We know that Republicans will go to extreme lengths to keep their House majority, and with three seats separating control, IL-13 is a must-win. It’s why we’re facing early attacks.

**[I’m fighting to be your voice in Washington -- for working families, farmers, veterans, and all of Central and Southern Illinois. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/26b13d45-a3f2-493e-b2d1-6835f360a00a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/26b13d45-a3f2-493e-b2d1-6835f360a00a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**By David Shuster**_
We've just gotten another reminder that history, under Trump, is both morbid and mischievous. At this very moment in Greenland, amidst the icebergs and desolation, the great powers of the Western world are assembling - not to repel the Hun or confront Lenin's Bolsheviks, but to gently, awkwardly, and incredulously discourage the President of the United States from behaving like an intoxicated real estate speculator at a polar auction.
Britain, France, Germany, Norway, and Sweden have dispatched soldiers, ships, and warplanes to the Arctic, ostensibly to reassure the world that the Arctic has not been "abandoned," as Donald J. Trump has alleged. The unspoken purpose, of course, it so make it abundantly clear that any Trump notion of seizing Greenland by force would be met not with applause but with a military clash.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/26b13d45-a3f2-493e-b2d1-6835f360a00a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
While the once unfathomable situation has the air of farce, the props are real. Troops are arriving. Warplanes are flying. Naval vessels are cutting through frigid seas.
And again, among the military uniforms heading to Greenlandic ice are those of Germany. That's right. Germany is deploying troops and aircraft to Greenland to fight fascism and imperialism.
* * *
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.GVtLo1nIq8leEH9SG45qPoyhn4l8twf3fk9oX8GfygI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=184718836)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/26b13d45-a3f2-493e-b2d1-6835f360a00a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What a time to be alive.
Republican Senator Mitch McConnell is still breathing. And the tensions have even perked up him -- the Senate's most durable fossil.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/26b13d45-a3f2-493e-b2d1-6835f360a00a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
McConnell this week rose on the Senate floor, or was propped up, and reminded his colleagues in a slow and raspy voice that Greenland has been assisting the United States since World War 1.
McConnell and other lawmakers also noted that Greenland is part of Denmark and Denmark is part of NATO. This means that Greenland is protected not by vibes or polite Scandinavian smiles, but by the collective military obligation of the entire North Atlantic Treaty Organization alliance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/26b13d45-a3f2-493e-b2d1-6835f360a00a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Russia and China understand this perfectly well. An attack on Greenland would trigger NATO's response faster than one could say "Article Five." Yet Donald Trump persists in ignoring NATO and mocking Denmark's defenses. Trump recently claimed Denmark had bolstered the protection of Greenland with "one additional dog sled." In reality, Denmark has deployed additional troops, including specialized Arctic units that--brace yourself--sometimes use dogs because dogs are useful in frozen wastelands. This, apparently, is too subtle a concept for Donald Trump.
On Capitol Hill, the reaction to Trump's rhetoric has ranged from alarm to open disbelief.
* * *
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=184718836&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg0NzE4ODM2LCJpYXQiOjE3Njg2NzEzNTAsImV4cCI6MTc3MTI2MzM1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.SiCwTKGqKkfu0kAjD2V7-EoYdG7OODzsIZrbIuNTGJY)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/26b13d45-a3f2-493e-b2d1-6835f360a00a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Republican Congressman Don Bacon of Nebraska is warning that an actual U.S. military invasion of Greenland would end Trump's presidency, with Republicans joining Democrats in impeachment. An anonymous Republican senator told reporters he "has no understanding how the Trump Greenland thing ever became an idea at all." The key words are "no understanding." It's a concise summary of Trumpism itself. No understanding is the foundation of most Trump ideas.
Meanwhile, a bipartisan Senate delegation is flying to Denmark to reassure the Danish government that even a Republican controlled Senate will block any U.S. military action against Greenland. This is what passes for damage control in the Age of Trump. Sending Senators abroad to explain the U.S. Constitution's war and budget powers and to remind foreign leaders that the United States does not plan to mug it's allies in the snow.
Unfortunately, diplomacy has not been helped by the recent meeting in Washington, D.C. between Danish and Greenlandic officials and Trump stooges including Vice President J.D. Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/26b13d45-a3f2-493e-b2d1-6835f360a00a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Even though Trump himself was not in the room, the absence of Dementia Don did nothing to improve the atmosphere. Officials on both sides described the meeting as adversarial and strange.
Denmark and Greenland declared their sovereignty a red line. Trump, from a distance, announced that America would "do something" in Greenland whether they liked it or not.
The American public does not like it. According to a Reuters/Ipsos poll, only 17 percent of Americans support a U.S. takeover of Greenland, and a microscopic four percent favor doing it by force. Trump, faithful to form, remains undeterred by polling, precedent, alliances, or reality.
And so we now have the ultimate irony and insult.
* * *
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=184718836&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg0NzE4ODM2LCJpYXQiOjE3Njg2NzEzNTAsImV4cCI6MTc3MTI2MzM1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.SiCwTKGqKkfu0kAjD2V7-EoYdG7OODzsIZrbIuNTGJY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/26b13d45-a3f2-493e-b2d1-6835f360a00a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
European troops are being deployed to Greenland, not to defend it from Russia or China, but--if necessary--to protect Greenland from the United States of America. One imagines future historians pausing over this episode, scratching their heads and wondering, _What in the hell were they thinking?_
The answer is, just another day under Trump.
* * *

Europe moves troops north--not for Russia, but for America | | and | Jan 17 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- By David Shuster We've just gotten another reminder that history, under Trump, is both morbid and mischievous. At this very moment in Greenland, amidst the icebergs and desolation, the great powers of the Western world are assembling - not to repel the Hun or confront Lenin's Bolsheviks, but to gently, awkwardly, and incredulously discourage the President of the United States from behaving like an intoxicated real estate speculator at a polar auction. Britain, France, Germany, Norway, and Sweden have dispatched soldiers, ships, and warplanes to the Arctic, ostensibly to reassure the world that the Arctic has not been "abandoned," as Donald J. Trump has alleged. The unspoken purpose, of course, it so make it abundantly clear that any Trump notion of seizing Greenland by force would be met not with applause but with a military clash. | | ---|---|--- While the once unfathomable situation has the air of farce, the props are real. Troops are arriving. Warplanes are flying. Naval vessels are cutting through frigid seas. And again, among the military uniforms heading to Greenlandic ice are those of Germany. That's right. Germany is deploying troops and aircraft to Greenland to fight fascism and imperialism. | | ---|---|--- What a time to be alive. Republican Senator Mitch McConnell is still breathing. And the tensions have even perked up him -- the Senate's most durable fossil. | | ---|---|--- McConnell this week rose on the Senate floor, or was propped up, and reminded his colleagues in a slow and raspy voice that Greenland has been assisting the United States since World War 1. McConnell and other lawmakers also noted that Greenland is part of Denmark and Denmark is part of NATO. This means that Greenland is protected not by vibes or polite Scandinavian smiles, but by the collective military obligation of the entire North Atlantic Treaty Organization alliance. | | ---|---|--- Russia and China understand this perfectly well. An attack on Greenland would trigger NATO's response faster than one could say "Article Five." Yet Donald Trump persists in ignoring NATO and mocking Denmark's defenses. Trump recently claimed Denmark had bolstered the protection of Greenland with "one additional dog sled." In reality, Denmark has deployed additional troops, including specialized Arctic units that--brace yourself--sometimes use dogs because dogs are useful in frozen wastelands. This, apparently, is too subtle a concept for Donald Trump. On Capitol Hill, the reaction to Trump's rhetoric has ranged from alarm to open disbelief. | | ---|---|--- Republican Congressman Don Bacon of Nebraska is warning that an actual U.S. military invasion of Greenland would end Trump's presidency, with Republicans joining Democrats in impeachment. An anonymous Republican senator told reporters he "has no understanding how the Trump Greenland thing ever became an idea at all." The key words are "no understanding." It's a concise summary of Trumpism itself. No understanding is the foundation of most Trump ideas. Meanwhile, a bipartisan Senate delegation is flying to Denmark to reassure the Danish government that even a Republican controlled Senate will block any U.S. military action against Greenland. This is what passes for damage control in the Age of Trump. Sending Senators abroad to explain the U.S. Constitution's war and budget powers and to remind foreign leaders that the United States does not plan to mug it's allies in the snow. Unfortunately, diplomacy has not been helped by the recent meeting in Washington, D.C. between Danish and Greenlandic officials and Trump stooges including Vice President J.D. Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio. | | ---|---|--- Even though Trump himself was not in the room, the absence of Dementia Don did nothing to improve the atmosphere. Officials on both sides described the meeting as adversarial and strange. Denmark and Greenland declared their sovereignty a red line. Trump, from a distance, announced that America would "do something" in Greenland whether they liked it or not. The American public does not like it. According to a Reuters/Ipsos poll, only 17 percent of Americans support a U.S. takeover of Greenland, and a microscopic four percent favor doing it by force. Trump, faithful to form, remains undeterred by polling, precedent, alliances, or reality. And so we now have the ultimate irony and insult. | | ---|---|--- European troops are being deployed to Greenland, not to defend it from Russia or China, but--if necessary--to protect Greenland from the United States of America. One imagines future historians pausing over this episode, scratching their heads and wondering, What in the hell were they thinking? The answer is, just another day under Trump. | | ---|---|--- You're currently a free subscriber to . In North Carolina, the right to vote is under direct attack, which is why it is critical we flip the balance of the court in 2028. That begins with reelecting **Justice Anita Earls** in 2026. She’s dedicated her career to upholding the rule of law and defending equality and voting rights for all North Carolinians.

In Wisconsin, progressives have a narrow majority – thanks to the victories of EMILYs List-endorsed women Justice Janet Protasiewicz and Justice Susan Crawford in 2023 and 2025 – but it’s critical we expand it. We know **Judge Chris Taylor** has what it takes to flip the court’s open seat and protect the rights of Wisconsinites for years to come.

**It has never been more important to have justices with histories of respecting reproductive rights on our highest courts.** With the increasing number of abortion bans from coast to coast, state supreme courts play a critical role in protecting our reproductive freedom and deciding whether those bans can be implemented.

clean_body: | = Peter, with the chaos coming out of Washington, state supreme courts are at the forefront of the fight to protect Americans’ rights and freedoms. That’s why our State and Local Campaigns team is investing heavily in state Supreme Court races this year, starting with Justice Anita Earls’ race in North Carolina and Judge Chris Taylor’s race in Wisconsin. = | = In North Carolina, the right to vote is under direct attack, which is why it is critical we flip the balance of the court in 2028. That begins with reelecting Justice Anita Earls in 2026. She’s dedicated her career to upholding the rule of law and defending equality and voting rights for all North Carolinians. In Wisconsin, progressives have a narrow majority – thanks to the victories of EMILYs List-endorsed women Justice Janet Protasiewicz and Justice Susan Crawford in 2023 and 2025 – but it’s critical we expand it. We know Judge Chris Taylor has what it takes to flip the court’s open seat and protect the rights of Wisconsinites for years to come. It has never been more important to have justices with histories of respecting reproductive rights on our highest courts. With the increasing number of abortion bans from coast to coast, state supreme courts play a critical role in protecting our reproductive freedom and deciding whether those bans can be implemented. = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Emily Parés (she/her/hers) Deputy Chief Campaigns Officer of State and Local Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Deb Haaland
subject: Friend, can I send you my recipe for Biscochitos?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
I've been making a lot of cookies.

| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=6864%2E400544%2E6zCn-B)
---
Friend, one thing you might not know about me beyond the fact that I'm running to be New Mexico’s next governor, is that my first job was in a bakery in Southeast Albuquerque. I honed my work ethic in that bakery, and today I LOVE to cook and bake.
One of my favorite ways to show appreciation is by sharing something homemade. I make biscochitos, New Mexico’s state cookie, for friends, family, and my campaign staff. Baking them always brings me back to home, to my family, our traditions, and the values that shaped me.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4212?t=2&akid=6864%2E400544%2E6zCn-B)
**For me, cooking has always been about more than food. It’s how I show care, build connections, and bring people together around a table. My grandmother woke up every day before the sun, and gave me my true love of cooking New Mexican cuisine. She taught me that service starts at home and extends outward to the community, and that everyone deserves dignity, care, and a seat at the table.
**
I’ve carried that lesson with me ever since. Back when I was in law school at UNM, I’d make green chile chicken posole for student gatherings. During the protests against the Dakota Access Pipeline, I cooked chile and rolled tortillas for the water protectors, and later on for my congressional colleagues during the 2019 winter holiday season, I shared red chile and tamales.
**Food has the power to bring people together. There is something unifying about sharing a home-cooked meal or baked goods, even with those you don't know well or don't always agree with.**
Since launching this campaign, I have traveled across the state — breaking bread with New Mexican families from all walks of life. I've sat at kitchen tables and heard all about people's struggles and their hopes for the future. New Mexicans want a governor who will fight for affordable healthcare, child care, public safety, and housing; a governor who will strengthen our schools, and protect our environment.
[**That’s the kind of governor I will be.**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4212?t=3&akid=6864%2E400544%2E6zCn-B)

Like making biscochitos, being that kind of governor takes patience and determination. It means listening closely, respecting every ingredient, and doing the work carefully, by hand, step by step, until it comes together the right way.
I am ready on day one to get to work. We will start by raising wages and making sure every community has access to affordable healthcare. We will make it easier for neighborhood markets to open, eliminating food deserts across our state, and for grocery stores to carry New Mexico grown food.

We will ban price gouging and make up for federal cuts to Medicaid so families can stay healthy. We will help kids read better and earlier. We will expand access to mental health programs, get drugs off our streets, and keep our communities safe.
**If we get the ingredients right, we can build a New Mexico where every family can thrive. That’s a recipe worth fighting for: [That is why I'm asking you to invest in this campaign to make sure we have the resources we need to stand up to GOP attacks and win. When you click this link and donate, I'll share my family's biscochito recipe so you can have a little piece of New Mexican joy!](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4212?t=4&akid=6864%2E400544%2E6zCn-B)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4213?t=5&akid=6864%2E400544%2E6zCn-B)
---
| | [Donate $35 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4214?t=6&akid=6864%2E400544%2E6zCn-B)
---
| | [Donate $50 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4215?t=7&akid=6864%2E400544%2E6zCn-B)
---
| | [Other Amount >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4212?t=8&akid=6864%2E400544%2E6zCn-B)
---
Thank you, friend.

💛 Deb

P.S. Throughout my life, cooking has always been a source of comfort and a way to bring my community together — and bringing people together is exactly how we’ll win this race. **[If you make a donation of any amount through this link, I’ll be sure to send you my recipe for biscochitos so you can share them with your friends and family.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4212?t=9&akid=6864%2E400544%2E6zCn-B)**
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4217?t=10&akid=6864%2E400544%2E6zCn-B)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?t=11&akid=6864%2E400544%2E6zCn-B)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?&t=12&akid=6864%2E400544%2E6zCn-B)
[**Update Your Information**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/?&t=13&akid=6864%2E400544%2E6zCn-B)
[**Unsubscribe**](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?&t=14&akid=6864%2E400544%2E6zCn-B)
Email us: info@debhaaland.com

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: my birthday wish
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/jdEBiciREuQsyqCvwA0kEw~~/AAPPABA~/kMizWHmk89pLVxP2N_RkdEtUXe-GZmSuIRLv-_qp8rdW6VLdOHOrYaW46oMFlf4u1E0vOrTM18Mj1V2DyCsLob99fXL3Bq6bXwYlVqkkZze9BSVmRqDy3Ptb4WpuU2zFqSgaMJqdL66h2ZqWOzqO93dI7PVhHWpXPx2rRxYoX7FWRCHEOzDLNkTQiBBfKQoMk_v69GCULF86Kt07Ni_TILQGvJsBkdsUeo2wPYbQw8NK4ymREl98d9TQdrrYlWb2l5j-lYaMgPyxv26010q6wEqsQUAzrKVJChAfkkhtR2kU26GjlmYQAxmLGs5ksNYv2k3Pb7dS2roSq2qhSxktTakzXuxoU4eBqgTuTGGkk8c~)
---
**Peter, today's my birthday!** [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/3m53NgL1KbWTbmXYZjZiFw~~/AAPPABA~/kMizWHmk89pLVxP2N_RkdEtUXe-GZmSuIRLv-_qp8rdW6VLdOHOrYaW46oMFlf4u1E0vOrTM18Mj1V2DyCsLob99fXL3Bq6bXwYlVqkkZze9BSVmRqDy3Ptb4WpuU2zF0a_QepR3t75zuEL4esl6Vpih4BRyaVd36j1Q_U9nd2eQTxMBa-cPwWT8K99jjcBhxTNvU8Y-ADI_OJ_m5S4tPmLsCep1YADVWA2TOuzq4DQ3edseOLCR4lTTeyT_rKEWKhOT9QDS6_DMJonSRLJjWfm2lrE-jtjPlNGfSBlsUk2YH-eO_5sNvzABm4t8Il3-W_8-SiJrBdqLIloaTLnMP_taep8VjaPy6PxFQuwHs0s~) When I was 24, I launched my campaign for Congress. A lot of people said I was too young — that I didn’t have the experience to make a difference.

People like you proved them wrong. Because of grassroots support, we made history together.

Five years later, I’m still the youngest member of Congress (by a few years), focused on delivering real results for people who’ve been shut out of politics and helping bring more young, dynamic leaders into the process.

This birthday feels different, Peter, because the stakes are higher.

Republicans know they’re in trouble. That’s why this spring they’re preparing to redraw maps in Florida to protect their power. If they succeed, it could lock in control of the House and make it harder to hold them accountable — for years.

This is one of those moments where what we do right now matters.

So instead of gifts or cake, I’m asking for one thing for my birthday this year: **your support for the work ahead.** [**_My birthday wish is to build the strongest grassroots operation heading into 2026 — one that can fight voter suppression, flip the House, and elect bold, young leaders across the country. clean_body: | ~ Peter, today's my birthday! ~ When I was 24, I launched my campaign for Congress. A lot of people said I was too young — that I didn’t have the experience to make a difference. People like you proved them wrong. Because of grassroots support, we made history together. Five years later, I’m still the youngest member of Congress (by a few years), focused on delivering real results for people who’ve been shut out of politics and helping bring more young, dynamic leaders into the process. This birthday feels different, Peter, because the stakes are higher. Republicans know they’re in trouble. That’s why this spring they’re preparing to redraw maps in Florida to protect their power. If they succeed, it could lock in control of the House and make it harder to hold them accountable — for years. This is one of those moments where what we do right now matters. So instead of gifts or cake, I’m asking for one thing for my birthday this year: your support for the work ahead. ~ That’s only possible with people like you stepping up. If you can, please donate $29 today to help us raise $2,900 before midnight and keep this campaign moving full speed ahead. This work isn’t easy, but I believe that when we show up for each other and stay grounded in our values, we can win. We’ve done it before. I’m not taking today off, because the work doesn’t pause. One thing is clear: 20+ years of Republican rule has failed Hoosiers. That’s why winning this year is so important. = | | | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = We’re less than a month into the 2026 legislative session, and the Republican Braun supermajority is already proposing more bills that will kick vulnerable Hoosiers off their healthcare and make the affordability crisis even worse. = Thanks, INDEMS [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., Suite #1110 E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Do not be afraid. Do not be silent. Speak out.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
We all remember what happened five years ago this month.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123521668/595723725/-2000534896?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.17_Mark-Kelly_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODNlYzg5OS1jOGYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72bEp8Uq1BmOXjH6tdC4m4Sv6do8LClqtWgG_fMhygs=) Hey folks, it's Mark.

We all remember what happened five years ago this month. Donald Trump sent a mob to the Capitol to steal an election.

He had just lost an election, fair and square, and he didn’t like the result. So he decided he was going to try to silence the voices of 81 million people.

It was one of the darkest days in the history of our country, but we made it through.

Now he’s back, five years later, and it’s the same scheme. **His Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth, is trying to silence me as we speak. He thinks he can make an example out of me, and intimidate others into staying quiet.**

But here’s the thing: Americans really like freedom of speech. You sign an oath to defend it when you join the military. Trying to silence people into compliance is just about the most un-American thing you can do. Period.

There is nothing Trump or Hegseth or anybody in that administration can do to shut me up. I am going to keep fighting for our people, our democracy, and our Constitution.

We’re not going to let him win. Not a chance. So, five years on from January 6th, I want you to take this to heart: **Do not be afraid. Do not be silent. Speak out.**

We’re going to get through this the same way we did back then: together. | [**_Please, split a grassroots donation between Maggie Hassan and me to help support our fight against Trump. This is our toughest yet, and I need a huge team behind me._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123521669/595723726/-2000534896?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.17_Mark-Kelly_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODNlYzg5OS1jOGYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72bEp8Uq1BmOXjH6tdC4m4Sv6do8LClqtWgG_fMhygs=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123521670/595723727/-2000534896?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.17_Mark-Kelly_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODNlYzg5OS1jOGYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72bEp8Uq1BmOXjH6tdC4m4Sv6do8LClqtWgG_fMhygs=)

Fresh FEC filings show Trump-aligned super PACs heading into 2026 with nearly $300 million cash-on-hand.
That's massive— _but it doesn't knock doors, chase mail-in ballots, or turn out conservatives in the trenches._
**Turning Point PAC does...**
We're the grassroots force that built the most ambitious ballot-chasing operation in conservative history: over 315,000 ballots chased in Arizona alone in 2024, flipping key states and securing America First wins.
Now, with socialists dumping dark money to reclaim Congress, we're laser-focused on the most critical swing districts and states: AZ, GA, NC, MI, PA, WI, NV—where Senate and House races will be decided by hundreds of votes.
The midterm election on November 3, 2026? It won't be won that day.
**It will be won months earlier—through relentless preparation: voter lists, app tech, door-to-door chasing, and getting every disengaged conservative ballot returned.**
**[We need your urgent support to scale this up and surpass 2024. As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Can I count on you, Peter??
body:
$15, Peter.
That’s how much I’m asking you to chip in today to help us reach our $25,000 goal and win in Ohio. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=011726_1] Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=011726_1]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=011726_1]
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could guarantee we flip this Senate seat and defeat my opponent, wouldn’t you donate immediately?
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could help us fight back against misleading attack ads and reach more voters with the truth, wouldn’t you chip in?
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could make real progress for working people and upend a status quo that only serves billionaires and big corporations, wouldn’t it be the best $X you ever spent?
I know that $15 doesn’t feel like it can do all of these things and more. But in a race like this, every dollar counts.
But by the time you get to this point in the email, thousands of folks have already given their $15 – and now, they’re counting on you to do the same.
With a new poll showing me 1 point ahead of my opponent, we can flip this seat – but not unless we capitalize on our momentum and hit our critical grassroots fundraising goals.
So please, Peter, will you chip in $15 or more to Real Texas PAC and me today to help reach our $25,000 goal, power this campaign forward, and win in Ohio? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=011726_1]

name: David Hogg
subject: We’re challenging these Dems who thanked ICE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Thanking ICE is their legislative priority??
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260117-1&t=1&akid=3062%2E587540%2E2XzwIq)
Peter,
Last summer, Democratic Reps. Shri Thanedar and Steve Cohen both voted for a resolution in Congress to “express gratitude” for ICE. While Thanedar and Cohen were voting to thank ICE, Trump was actively deploying the US military to Los Angeles to crush peaceful anti-ICE protests. These are our Democratic lawmakers in action!
That’s why Leaders We Deserve is proud to support Democratic primary challengers in both of these districts and usher in a new wave of Democrats who don’t fold when it matters most. We can’t keep electing Democrats who are _this_ out of touch. We need young bold leaders like **Donavan McKinney** and **Justin J. Pearson** who are the best of what the next generation has to offer — not more of the status quo.
ICE is terrorizing our communities. And we need Democrats who are actively fighting back.
That's why this cycle we’re challenging Democrats who have truly failed to meet this moment and are in safe congressional seats that in no way risk us losing the House. Our party cannot be seen as complicit in the invasion of our communities by masked federal agents who are there purely to terrorize communities and be Trump's paramilitary force. Our party cannot just stand by and applaud communities standing up to ICE while the Democratic Members of Congress with the real power to make change do little to nothing to stop ICE and even make it a priority to thank ICE.
If you are tired of having a party that says it can’t do anything because it’s in the minority and then miraculously still claims it can't do anything because of Republicans even when we have all three branches of government, now is the time to join us in this movement and build a party that actually fights back.
**[Peter, make a $5 contribution now, split between Donavan, Justin, and Leaders We Deserve. We deserve better Democrats — so we’re electing them.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260117_1_ice.Ii7eId&refcode=em20260117-3062&amount=5&t=2&akid=3062%2E587540%2E2XzwIq)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260117_1_ice.Ii7eId&amount=5&refcode=em20260117-3062&t=21&akid=3062%2E587540%2E2XzwIq)**
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260117-1&t=22&refcode2=3062_587540_2XzwIq&akid=3062%2E587540%2E2XzwIq)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=23&akid=3062%2E587540%2E2XzwIq)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3062%2E587540%2E2XzwIq)

If you are tired of having a party that says it can’t do anything because it’s in the minority and then miraculously still claims it can't do anything because of Republicans even when we have all three branches of government, now is the time to join us in this movement and build a party that actually fights back. Thank you, David Hogg

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I am not going to break
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I am going to fight this with everything I have. But don’t make the mistake of thinking this is just about me. It’s about every person who has the courage to speak out against Trump.
#

Team: I’m writing to ask you for $5.
That’s right: just $5.
$5 because I’ve had enough of Trump and Hegseth’s attacks on our Constitution.
$5 because Donald Trump wants to stamp out any and all opposition, and he’s willing to undermine your First Amendment rights to do it.
$5 because he’s sent Pete Hegseth after me, and he’s moving ahead with a sham investigation to drag my name through the mud and destroy what I fought for during my 25 years in uniform.
I am not going to break. I am going to fight this with everything I have. But don’t make the mistake of thinking this is just about me. It’s about every person who has the courage to speak out against Trump.
Trump wants us living in fear. I don’t intend to let him win. I need your help.
