body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123521986/595724719/1895761198?refcode=email_011726_doublingdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODg2NmUyMS1jYWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4IV1_2eYAigUp2uQiBlc_MdWrr1yFyiRew3_HvqxNKs=&emci=3f83c463-5ff2-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=98866e21-caf3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&ceid=13185894) Derek, Donald Trump is doubling down on his attacks against me. And I’m not backing down. Over a month ago, several of my colleagues and I released a video restating the law and a simple truth: When you serve our country, your oath to the Constitution comes above all. Above politics. Above power. Above any one man. That was enough to send Trump into a meltdown. He called for my arrest. He called for my hanging. He called for me to go to jail. **Now he’s sent the DOJ after me.** This is lawless, unhinged behavior—and it’s exactly what you’d expect from a bully who can’t stand being challenged. Let me make something clear to the president: I will not be intimidated. I swore an oath to the Constitution, and I will honor it—no matter what threats Trump makes or who he sends after me. **[I will keep doing my job for the people of Western Pennsylvania, and I will keep standing up for our democracy against any attack or pathetic threats. If you’re with me in this fight to stand up to this bully and defend our Constitution, chip in right now and help me keep fighting →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123521987/595724724/-1542703181?amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=email_011726_doublingdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODg2NmUyMS1jYWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4IV1_2eYAigUp2uQiBlc_MdWrr1yFyiRew3_HvqxNKs=)** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123521988/595724726/-1542703181?refcode=email_011726_doublingdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODg2NmUyMS1jYWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4IV1_2eYAigUp2uQiBlc_MdWrr1yFyiRew3_HvqxNKs=)

The oath to the Constitution is sacred, and it binds us all to the rule of law.
I first swore that oath in the Naval Academy when I was just a teenager. I swore it again when I was elected to represent Western PA in Congress. It’s not an oath I took lightly, and I intend to keep it—no matter what.
I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump. I won’t back down from doing my job. And I won’t be bullied into silence by the president and his political enforcers.
**[I’m standing up for our democracy, our Constitution, and our country—because America is worth fighting for. name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eduardo_Ver=C3=A1stegui=2C_Sound_of_Freedom_Foundation?=
subject: I’ve never seen it this bad in Mexico City
body:
I can’t forget what I saw in Mexico City
There are no ICU beds left. That's what we're changing, right now.

| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1d485242956148ab85bc613d6552c78d&_e=p_-c2gv2LJ_soWRCsJghefY16K8JEQTCp9SMHIWd-JfZt9kMMemUsiEu0ao_hto7poVxiu8VsHM-tVks2ENzCXuHJ14TDas0im4MW7EgIrxO09bk4B_FKq6yCtIfyZEncxUMqoAGH1MDGTgbulwweYZyP9qh3YkXUlUzMLtuulK58dS0wuj0qeXL9lAtbEpgbt79Bc3Z1MkfsgLgj7EdL6iGD7CsJlu82muLS5Atg2xLOnZ6HgL25FVjlmhEV0U9pjHAG4iOmwiZPkbdEOuwCuil8JH8ZukKq97Xuquwrz6xYZdCayU14uIiGY-iJY6cUnGHzeV12V5Fp6ZaSyw5tqRhoKGxjCiQjHfynHOAdDHo9znwe8RabH5d69KJHWRYKRZSpCm3qtzkSWJ71xZPFy5J3MSFqDYhuRlvaM5_O_in-gfJ4urc04mxB2_bVo3KxVIR7UwUR1p_iT9-8bKZt71F0F5xn75yjj2muJqeik67lgl6O-n3LTZcIQZUH-wI5z4oJhUARkqf5qqZbe_ezT_pztYbTaUbsdqZJSEw03eFiuC4q6QZIJmVCLupl62LmxzEn7CmjePUGNM0POC8tyrnGyVxIaBqRZhWWQ6XPNTsGEvpKPrL9OV-LOsg031QpKySR8UrXyXGOYP0H5zz2vPS8ZpU34MTV706qUpw6ML5PT_iQfdgef7qJizW4SPzqHOdmLBNdhcXVrlI2rx1s9LfxsTxADwfnQaqbWLjfO5OIK1wfxeEksqGV5rI7AkqszDzXkBjjKpwNryMQWGKJ9U3tHQrPV8FXI9jEwr-ds1jllpSEVgBsThs6HyljasC)
---
Friend,
---
Mexico City is my home. It's where I was born, where I learned to believe in God's purpose, and where I first saw the kind of poverty and pain that can break your heart.When I speak with our partners there, the stories of children in need make my heart ache.You may know me as the producer of the blockbuster film _Sound of Freedom._ But what you may not know is that the film became the foundation for a massive movement, the **Sound of Freedom Foundation.** A humanitarian organization that rescues children from sex trafficking, supports their recovery, and helps stop exploitation before it begins. In hospitals across Mexico city, vulnerable children, including those rescued from trafficking and abuse, are now fighting to survive. But there aren't enough ICU beds to care for them.Some lie on stretchers or floors, waiting for a chance at healing that may never come.That's why I've set a goal:

**I want to raise $20,000 to deliver $200,000 worth of ICU beds** to hospitals and medical centers that serve God's children in Mexico City.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1d485242956148ab85bc613d6552c78d&_e=p_-c2gv2LJ_soWRCsJghefY16K8JEQTCp9SMHIWd-JfZt9kMMemUsiEu0ao_hto7poVxiu8VsHM-tVks2ENzCXuHJ14TDas0im4MW7EgIrxO09bk4B_FKq6yCtIfyZEncxUMqoAGH1MDGTgbulwweYZyP9qh3YkXUlUzMLtuulK58dS0wuj0qeXL9lAtbEpgbt79Bc3Z1MkfsgLgj7EdL6iGD7CsJlu82muLS5Atg2xLOnZ6HgL25FVjlmhEV0U9pjHAG4iOmwiZPkbdEOuwCuil8JH8ZukKq97Xuquwrz7vjjh5V4V3HE1khse6RCCn3ban8ELEdeQV-nbbf6QzNXogXS9e7doSCv5thOvK6_5iALFD6CwzO7K7k6rTSbvT6QLFB7LkINW6snpgKchvAd9pU1xXeGOZ8N0jxYFP1fKv3vrF6kf82wV2i98ROYPqGJ4A6a7VVRWJ7WTqQODnsZw8jG23j116mHQjLW5C6JZmz8k_yayl1wcZ5__9um57y8zdL620KwbizOOxjHni4Voj2yxdPxvcRbgasgxG7RRF3mY7el2T9Lo9eZceQsjm6Hxp5a7iTTbJb2ffAeLoX2KTTetOEyswS1jSaaU2WEH0cBqQYwM-cbU4RFuBsD9x3rVZqGFYmasbY0JPekTTCk0l-g1BISsIPUAAPFH-U5gXpTfjK3g45gY73hA4URUlZYYG5pZFWuMx0ZuOr8GGEO_HFr9gk0woHAcOR-So2zTRFo4RCovjug7KNIYJFZ30n6wuVJIz4iS3-oCkKU5DpeGKc3iWK703pCq0MSG6qU6NKhCM4Ule32wD1WwqTlCn)

clean_body: I can’t forget what I saw in Mexico City There are no ICU beds left. That's what we're changing, right now. | | | Friend, Mexico City is my home. It's where I was born, where I learned to believe in God's purpose, and where I first saw the kind of poverty and pain that can break your heart.When I speak with our partners there, the stories of children in need make my heart ache.You may know me as the producer of the blockbuster film Sound of Freedom. But what you may not know is that the film became the foundation for a massive movement, the Sound of Freedom Foundation. A humanitarian organization that rescues children from sex trafficking, supports their recovery, and helps stop exploitation before it begins. In hospitals across Mexico city, vulnerable children, including those rescued from trafficking and abuse, are now fighting to survive. But there aren't enough ICU beds to care for them.Some lie on stretchers or floors, waiting for a chance at healing that may never come.That's why I've set a goal: I want to raise $20,000 to deliver $200,000 worth of ICU beds to hospitals and medical centers that serve God's children in Mexico City. These beds are lifelines. They are where a fragile heartbeat stabilizes, where a child's breathing grows stronger, where healing happens. Every $1 you give becomes $10 of real medical value.How?Because through the Sound of Freedom Foundation's partnerships with trusted humanitarian distributors, we're able to secure bulk discounts on high-need medical equipment. That means every dollar raised helps unlock $10 worth of ICU beds, monitors, and lifesaving hospital supplies. enough to care for children who are sick, weak, and desperately in need of help.$25 -> provides $250 worth of ICU equipment and supplies. $50 -> provides $500 toward children's ICU beds. $100 -> provides $1,000 in needed ICU supplies. $250 or more -> helps equip an entire hospital ward for rescued children. When these beds arrive, they will go straight into hospitals that have been praying for help, to doctors who refuse to give up, and nurses who comfort frightened children through the night.And the impact doesn't end there. Because when desperate families can access medical care for their children, they no longer face the unthinkable choice of selling a son or daughter just to survive.In communities where poverty and sickness make children vulnerable to traffickers, a single hospital bed can mean the difference between a child staying with their loving family or being trafficked and abused. This is what we can change together.We have the plan. We have the partners. But this mission can't launch without you.Friend, the next few days will decide how many children we can help, how many will have a bed instead of the floor, and hope instead of fear. If we reach our goal, those hospital rooms will be transformed. The caregivers will have the tools they need. And the children will finally be able to rest, to heal, and to live, safe from the predators who prey on desperation.If we fall short, vulnerable children will not receive the medical care they need and their families may be forced into the kind of impossible decisions that result in more children being trafficked and exploited for profit. For God's children, Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

ICE agents in Chicago recently jumped a non-verbal autistic man, violently detaining him for being "non-compliant." His disability made it impossible to process and comply with their commands. _They didn't care._ This isn’t an isolated mistake - it’s a business model.
* **Emmanuel, 14:** A boy with autism in Houston went missing. Instead of helping, ICE snatched him and caged him for 48 days, even forcing him into surgery without his mother.

* **George Retes:****** A disabled U.S. Army veteran and US citizen was pepper-sprayed and dragged from his car at gunpoint during a raid at his employer. He was denied a lawyer and held for three days, missing his daughter’s birthday, all for "failing to move his car" fast enough.

_It’s getting more dangerous._ ICE is blowing billions to hire 12,000 new agents in a "manpower surge." They’ve slashed training from five months to just six weeks (some reports say 47 days as a "nod" to the 47th President). clean_body: | | | ICE is targeting people with disabilities. ICE agents in Chicago recently jumped a non-verbal autistic man, violently detaining him for being "non-compliant." His disability made it impossible to process and comply with their commands. They didn't care. This isn’t an isolated mistake - it’s a business model. Emmanuel, 14: A boy with autism in Houston went missing. Instead of helping, ICE snatched him and caged him for 48 days, even forcing him into surgery without his mother. George Retes:**** A disabled U.S. Army veteran and US citizen was pepper-sprayed and dragged from his car at gunpoint during a raid at his employer. He was denied a lawyer and held for three days, missing his daughter’s birthday, all for "failing to move his car" fast enough. It’s getting more dangerous. ICE is blowing billions to hire 12,000 new agents in a "manpower surge." They’ve slashed training from five months to just six weeks (some reports say 47 days as a "nod" to the 47th President). They are flooding our streets with unvetted "thugs" who haven't even cleared basic background checks. They target the most vulne rable because they think we’re easy targets for their quotas. Able Dems is electing leaders who will end this lawlessness and restore human decency. We need to take back the House to shut this down. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. We won't let them target the most vulnerable in silence. In solidarity, \- Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I have to ask
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
Hi folks, it’s Jon. If you’ve been considering chipping in to my reelection campaign, now’s the time. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but if you’re ready to join the fight right now, you can split a donation between my reelection campaign and John Hickenlooper’s here: _[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email_hickenlooper-ossoff**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123522136/595725070/723805127?refcode=email_011726_ossoff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWMyNmIyNy1jYWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ifaW_pMZbtH8UacoebUdeeKaTJhGpPrM0ypm4LQavE=)_ Here’s the deal: Republicans have been spending big in Georgia ... and much earlier than usual. They’re already running ads to attack me and lie about my record because they know flipping this Democratic Senate seat is their best chance to lock in a pro-MAGA Senate majority for the long-term. There’s no doubt about it: I’m the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot in the midterm elections. But I have you. Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the Senate majority. Now, I need you more than ever: **I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.** Yes, this election will be tough. But we know how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before. _Let’s do it again._ So if you can, please chip in any amount to my campaign and John Hickenlooper’s today. Here’s the link again: _[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email_hickenlooper-ossoff**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123522137/595725071/723805127?refcode=email_011726_ossoff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWMyNmIyNy1jYWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ifaW_pMZbtH8UacoebUdeeKaTJhGpPrM0ypm4LQavE=)_ Thank you, Jon

I’ll explain more in just a moment, but if you’re ready to join the fight right now, you can split a donation between my reelection campaign and John Hickenlooper’s here: = Here’s the deal: Republicans have been spending big in Georgia ... and much earlier than usual. They’re already running ads to attack me and lie about my record because they know flipping this Democratic Senate seat is their best chance to lock in a pro-MAGA Senate majority for the long-term. There’s no doubt about it: I’m the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot in the midterm elections. But I have you. Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the Senate majority. Now, I need you more than ever: I am literally MAGA’s #1 target. Yes, this election will be tough. But we know how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before. Let’s do it again. So if you can, please chip in any amount to my campaign and John Hickenlooper’s today. name: Trey Trainor for Texas
subject: Jan 18 Wimberley Meet & Greet at VFW: Come Visit with Me & Ask Anything
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TREY TRAINOR FOR TEXAS
body:
Jan 18 4-7PM at Wimberley VFW: Bring a dish & ask me your toughest questions

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us10.campaign-archive.com/?e=4d3fe76c62&u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=2bdc15a383)
---
[|
---](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=213e579d44&e=4d3fe76c62)
| | | | | | Peter,
January is flying by with great events across the district, and I’m especially looking forward to a relaxed, grassroots gathering this **Sunday** in Wimberley.
The **Wimberley Valley Conservatives** are hosting a **Candidate Meet & Greet Potluck** at the **Wimberley VFW** – the perfect chance to visit one-on-one with candidates up and down the ballot.
---
[|
---](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=0dea6c5622&e=4d3fe76c62)
| |

**Sunday, January 18, 2026****4:00 PM – 7:00 PM****Wimberley VFW Post 6441****401 Jacob’s Well Rd, Wimberley, TX**
I’ll be there the full time because I love these opportunities to listen, answer anything on your mind, and explain why I’m running: to take my proven America First fight – from serving as President Trump’s FEC Chairman – straight to Congress for TX-21.
Whether it’s the border, cutting wasteful spending, protecting our 2nd Amendment, or supporting our veterans, I’m ready to talk it through. As a husband, father of six, and lifelong Texan, I’m in this to earn your trust one conversation at a time.
Bring your family, neighbors, and appetite – let’s enjoy some good food and even better conservative fellowship at the VFW!
I can’t wait to see you Sunday.
For Texas,
**Trey Trainor** Husband, Father of 6, Proven Conservative Fighter for TX-21
P.S. It’s a potluck, so bring your favorite dish if you can – and definitely bring your questions!
---
| [Support Trey](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=40503b4741&e=4d3fe76c62)
---
|
---
| |
**Early voting: February 17 – 27, 2026****Election Day: March 3, 2026**
---
|
---

name: Doug Lloyd for MI Attorney General
subject: Let's Put These Rumors to Bed
body:
Before Convention, Please Review the Record
| | |
---
| | [](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012FhcBExcMYDMq4PlG55QDhQ7H-ypnXe3iAZ2UP0NzKRy1BWvKv1AZyQ0mccK7Qa0GbSjRMydz8Fhe9sEFsHhPCpMP30fQGpjka4_H6-hqUMIg5PPOhTWKTfqqvtpeV7f77BgkBiDE9yurAp3LeD1dGW_7-NgayRsmtZoT3MarHg=&c=VNnNP4hV1o0nbCEgoCEqvsyM3vYnZNQ7HYjCHC-ZiaKU1GOqNISdNQ==&ch=ijQA-3zRadZWmU9UA6wx0-pUrBxXs33PrS-ttpY-zkGnE23yvVzEgA==)
---
| | | [](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012FhcBExcMYDMq4PlG55QDhQ7H-ypnXe3iAZ2UP0NzKRy1BWvKv1AZyQ0mccK7Qa0GbSjRMydz8Fhe9sEFsHhPCpMP30fQGpjka4_H6-hqUMIg5PPOhTWKTfqqvtpeV7f77BgkBiDE9yurAp3LeD1dIuG5_Ske-DiKCf14TERQvk=&c=VNnNP4hV1o0nbCEgoCEqvsyM3vYnZNQ7HYjCHC-ZiaKU1GOqNISdNQ==&ch=ijQA-3zRadZWmU9UA6wx0-pUrBxXs33PrS-ttpY-zkGnE23yvVzEgA==)
---
| | [](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012FhcBExcMYDMq4PlG55QDhQ7H-ypnXe3iAZ2UP0NzKRy1BWvKv1AZ7Lo6JxptygOsT3cU_QXtfNHu0jrV2leC3Ogf8H4nOc4Vb_K4lm8totIrAxlu9jYTQIaua3X8yhBc_F2bj2f6PBkjSToxhuYM3q-SqyIk1sla2Jv6kWz_yDRYgEJO_TzGkYhfp2IyD47A4_2ZTLNpKY=&c=VNnNP4hV1o0nbCEgoCEqvsyM3vYnZNQ7HYjCHC-ZiaKU1GOqNISdNQ==&ch=ijQA-3zRadZWmU9UA6wx0-pUrBxXs33PrS-ttpY-zkGnE23yvVzEgA==)
---
| | Friends and Delegates,
I understand that rumors continue to persist about how my office handled the COVID-related mandates in Eaton County. At the top of this email, you will find a short video with a brief explanation. As discussed in the video, there was only one instance early in the pandemic involving law enforcement protecting a closed business, and any COVID-related charge was incidental to the arrest and far more serious charges for Possession of Methamphetamine. The matter was driven by public safety concerns and the need to protect a closed business, not COVID enforcement.
Although my office had the authority to act, our policy was firm. We did not turn ordinary, law-abiding citizens or business owners into criminals over COVID mandates. My office did not have a "snitch" hotline. My staff deliberately identified COVID-related tickets written by law enforcement that were filed with the courts and dismissed them. My office did not participate in any MDHHS civil cease and desist actions, and the Eaton County Prosecutor's Office was not legal counsel for MDHHS.
We focused on real crime, real victims, and public safety.
One of the advantages of serving as an elected public official is simple. Your record is public. Nothing is hidden. Every decision is documented. That is why I invite you to look up my record as Eaton County Prosecutor and judge it for yourself.
You will not find a single instance where I, or my office, shut down a business, targeted job creators, or enforced Governor Whitmer's COVID mandates against law-abiding citizens. In the Eaton County courthouse, I stood firm in defense of the constitutional rights of my constituents.
By contrast, my opponent, while serving as superintendent of Detroit's Catholic schools, publicly discussed and supported compliance with Governor Whitmer's COVID mask mandates for school children. I have included an article below so you can review his own words and draw your own conclusions.
Read Article: [For Catholic school students, wearing a mask is a way to imitate Jesus' sacrifice](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012FhcBExcMYDMq4PlG55QDhQ7H-ypnXe3iAZ2UP0NzKRy1BWvKv1AZ7Lo6JxptygOG3WBHmDXFzrl6gYWj-q3a9wV47XQEjgZa8Ht6zK70H7GIKxNWKa8NepTCjETbMiIJwI7IZPTtVP7cKz8tMY4f-KOhhmRIuSan_biWa1izM-YLklbVGsdcQCnQMmItzp9HFmk4wW686mUR06rMal4WHx0qa067MK_9IvYIKhRxW38o-OTPRlY7I0zITTw0dDX2d5hgavTY0aFpeVl6ImQcA==&c=VNnNP4hV1o0nbCEgoCEqvsyM3vYnZNQ7HYjCHC-ZiaKU1GOqNISdNQ==&ch=ijQA-3zRadZWmU9UA6wx0-pUrBxXs33PrS-ttpY-zkGnE23yvVzEgA==)
This distinction matters, especially as Republicans decide who should carry our banner into the general election.
I don't just talk about conservative principles, I have defended them in court, when it counted. My record is proven, public, and transparent.
I have worked hard to keep this campaign positive and focused on the future of Michigan. But when misinformation is spread in an effort to undermine my integrity, I cannot remain silent.
Before you cast your vote at convention, I respectfully ask that you review the record, consider the facts, and decide who has demonstrated the judgment, independence, and constitutional resolve required to win in November.
Sincerely,
Doug Lloyd Eaton County Prosecuting Attorney Candidate for Michigan Attorney General
P.S. The facts are public. The video explains the context. The record speaks for itself.

[Become a Delegate for Doug](https://jrhsf9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012FhcBExcMYDMq4PlG55QDhQ7H-ypnXe3iAZ2UP0NzKRy1BWvKv1AZyQ0mccK7Qa0GbSjRMydz8Fhe9sEFsHhPCpMP30fQGpjka4_H6-hqUMIg5PPOhTWKTfqqvtpeV7f77BgkBiDE9yurAp3LeD1dH010INg16AbwgXSxc0gP3I=&c=VNnNP4hV1o0nbCEgoCEqvsyM3vYnZNQ7HYjCHC-ZiaKU1GOqNISdNQ==&ch=ijQA-3zRadZWmU9UA6wx0-pUrBxXs33PrS-ttpY-zkGnE23yvVzEgA==)

clean_body: Before Convention, Please Review the Record | | | | | == | | | == | | == | | Friends and Delegates, I understand that rumors continue to persist about how my office handled the COVID-related mandates in Eaton County. At the top of this email, you will find a short video with a brief explanation. As discussed in the video, there was only one instance early in the pandemic involving law enforcement protecting a closed business, and any COVID-related charge was incidental to the arrest and far more serious charges for Possession of Methamphetamine. The matter was driven by public safety concerns and the need to protect a closed business, not COVID enforcement. Although my office had the authority to act, our policy was firm. We did not turn ordinary, law-abiding citizens or business owners into criminals over COVID mandates. My office did not have a "snitch" hotline. My staff deliberately identified COVID-related tickets written by law enforcement that were filed with the courts and dismissed them. My office did not participate in any MDHHS civil cease and desist actions, and the Eaton County Prosecutor's Office was not legal counsel for MDHHS. We focused on real crime, real victims, and public safety. One of the advantages of serving as an elected public official is simple. Your record is public. Nothing is hidden. Every decision is documented. That is why I invite you to look up my record as Eaton County Prosecutor and judge it for yourself. You will not find a single instance where I, or my office, shut down a business, targeted job creators, or enforced Governor Whitmer's COVID mandates against law-abiding citizens. In the Eaton County courthouse, I stood firm in defense of the constitutional rights of my constituents. By contrast, my opponent, while serving as superintendent of Detroit's Catholic schools, publicly discussed and supported compliance with Governor Whitmer's COVID mask mandates for school children. I have included an article below so you can review his own words and draw your own conclusions. Read Article: == This distinction matters, especially as Republicans decide who should carry our banner into the general election. I don't just talk about conservative principles, I have defended them in court, when it counted. My record is proven, public, and transparent. I have worked hard to keep this campaign positive and focused on the future of Michigan. But when misinformation is spread in an effort to undermine my integrity, I cannot remain silent. Before you cast your vote at convention, I respectfully ask that you review the record, consider the facts, and decide who has demonstrated the judgment, independence, and constitutional resolve required to win in November. Sincerely, Doug Lloyd Eaton County Prosecuting Attorney Candidate for Michigan Attorney General P.S. The facts are public. The video explains the context. The record speaks for itself. == | | | | | == == == == == == | | | | == == == == | | | | | == | | | | Doug Lloyd for MI Attorney General | PO Box, 80536 | Lansing, MI 48906 US | | | | | | | |

name: Katie Porter
subject: California needs to step up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
California needs to follow New York’s lead on child care.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40719%2E3422442%2EUKzXDo)
Peter,
California needs to follow Zohran Mamdani and Kathy Hochul’s lead on child care.
I’m running to bring universal child care to the Golden State. **[I’ll tell you why, but first can you take a moment to chip in to my campaign?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260117_1_ak.Aa1yFq&refcode=em20260117-40719&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40719%2E3422442%2EUKzXDo)**
New York is showing us _exactly_ what leadership looks like. While the Trump administration tries to freeze progress, New York is stepping up to fund child care for 2-year-olds.
California _needs_ to follow New York’s lead and treat child care as the essential infrastructure it is. The cost of child care is often more than a college education, meaning parents have to choose between starting a family or pursuing their career.
**If we want to grow our economy and step up for parents, we have to fund child care.**
It’s time to stop penalizing working families who are trying to make ends meet. California needs universal child care now.
**[I’m ready to follow Mayor Mamdani and Governor Hochul’s lead, but I need your help to win this race. Can you chip in $5 to help me get there?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260117_1_ak.Aa1yFq&refcode=em20260117-40719&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40719%2E3422442%2EUKzXDo)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260117_1_ak.Aa1yFq&refcode=em20260117-40719&t=23&akid=40719%2E3422442%2EUKzXDo)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260117-40719&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40719_3422442_UKzXDo&akid=40719%2E3422442%2EUKzXDo)**

| | For Immediate Release | CC'd The White House, White House Deputy Chief of Staff for Policy January 17, 2026 – Grand Rapids, Michigan EXPOSED: Denmark's Child Experiments on Greenland's Inuit Tribes. While Denmark parades itself as the ultimate utopia of peace, love, and kumbaya sing-alongs with Greenland's indigenous Inuit tribes, trying desperately to fool the world, nothing could be further from the ugly truth. Denmark continues to prey on the innocent children of Greenland's Indigenous Inuit Tribes, treating them like lab rats in a twisted colonial nightmare. The infamous "Little Danes" experiment, for instance, saw Danish authorities remove 22 Inuit children, aged just 5–9 years old, from their loving families and transported them to Denmark for a "social experiment" to assimilate them into what was deemed superior Danish culture and forge a puppet elite among the Inuit. These children were banned from uttering a single word in their native tongue and placed into cold orphanages, never to see their homes or families again. The result? Shattered lives, crushing trauma, cultural annihilation, and premature graves for most. By the 2020s, only six survivors remained, a damning testament to Denmark's cruelty.And this atrocity isn't ancient history, it's alive and ongoing today. Danish social services still wield discriminatory "parental competency" tests that disregard sacred Inuit cultural norms, removing Tribal children at rates 5–7 times higher than ethnic Danes. Hundreds of families have been torn apart, with Inuit parents branded "unfit" because of language hurdles or traditional communal ways. It's modern-day ethnic cleansing, disguised as "welfare." This is Denmark's real legacy in Greenland: a festering wound of domination, deception, and destruction that bleeds into the present. Greenland doesn't belong to Denmark, they stole it from the Indigenous Inuit Tribes and continue to terrorize the Natives. Denmark is small without Greenland. Something many in Greenland have come to realize. For example, Popular Greenland Youtuber Qupanuk Olsen said "Many Greenland people now realize how powerful they can be and how small Denmark is without Greenland." As the President has repeatedly said, we would prefer to make a fair deal for Greenland, but we are not obligated to and if Denmark continues this charade, we can also do it the hard way. America needs Greenland for national security purposes, while Denmark needs Greenland to continue its twisted colonial games of subjugating so-called "savage tribes." We must take Greenland, like it or not. Austin ChengeUS Army VeteranFormer Republican Candidate for Governor of Michigan For more information, contact:
The Office of Austin Chenge
Website: [www.austinchenge.com](https://austinchenge.com/so/48PlD7G-i/c?w=s-NzI_vv11uNXyPiXcm-k72cNrHvTyQGPlszZfbxAkU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL3d3dy5hdXN0aW5jaGVuZ2UuY29tIiwiciI6Ijg2MjcyYTIwLWEwNzYtNGU1ZC1iMDYwLThlMDIzZWZlZjQ1MiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6Ijg5ZDQwODBhLTEyOGQtNDlmZi1iZTVkLTExM2QyNTk5NmExNiJ9) The Office of Austin Chenge.

clean_body: For Immediate Release | CC'd The White House, White House Deputy Chief of Staff for Policy January 17, 2026 – Grand Rapids, Michigan EXPOSED: Denmark's Child Experiments on Greenland's Inuit Tribes. While Denmark parades itself as the ultimate utopia of peace, love, and kumbaya sing-alongs wit | | Can 't see this message? | | | | | | EXPOSED: Denmark's Child Experiments on Greenland's Inuit Tribes. "While Denmark parades itself as the ultimate utopia of peace, love, and kumbaya sing-alongs with Greenland's indigenous Inuit tribes, trying desperately to fool the world, nothing could be further from the ugly truth..." Austin Chenge, US Army Veteran and Former Republican Candidate For Governor of Michigan. | | | | | | | | | For Immediate Release | CC'd The White House, White House Deputy Chief of Staff for Policy January 17, 2026 – Grand Rapids, Michigan EXPOSED: Denmark's Child Experiments on Greenland's Inuit Tribes. While Denmark parades itself as the ultimate utopia of peace, love, and kumbaya sing-alongs with Greenland's indigenous Inuit tribes, trying desperately to fool the world, nothing could be further from the ugly truth. Denmark continues to prey on the innocent children of Greenland's Indigenous Inuit Tribes, treating them like lab rats in a twisted colonial nightmare. The infamous "Little Danes" experiment, for instance, saw Danish authorities remove 22 Inuit children, aged just 5–9 years old, from their loving families and transported them to Denmark for a "social experiment" to assimilate them into what was deemed superior Danish culture and forge a puppet elite among the Inuit. These children were banned from uttering a single word in their native tongue and placed into cold orphanages, never to see their homes or families again. The result? Shattered lives, crushing trauma, cultural annihilation, and premature graves for most. By the 2020s, only six survivors remained, a damning testament to Denmark's cruelty.And this atrocity isn't ancient history, it's alive and ongoing today. Danish social services still wield discriminatory "parental competency" tests that disregard sacred Inuit cultural norms, removing Tribal children at rates 5–7 times higher than ethnic Danes. Hundreds of families have been torn apart, with Inuit parents branded "unfit" because of language hurdles or traditional communal ways. It's modern-day ethnic cleansing, disguised as "welfare." This is Denmark's real legacy in Greenland: a festering wound of domination, deception, and destruction that bleeds into the present. Greenland doesn't belong to Denmark, they stole it from the Indigenous Inuit Tribes and continue to terrorize the Natives. Denmark is small without Greenland. Something many in Greenland have come to realize. For example, Popular Greenland Youtuber Qupanuk Olsen said "Many Greenland people now realize how powerful they can be and how small Denmark is without Greenland." As the President has repeatedly said, we would prefer to make a fair deal for Greenland, but we are not obligated to and if Denmark continues this charade, we can also do it the hard way. America needs Greenland for national security purposes, while Denmark needs Greenland to continue its twisted colonial games of subjugating so-called "savage tribes." We must take Greenland, like it or not. Austin ChengeUS Army VeteranFormer Republican Candidate for Governor of Michigan For more information, contact: The Office of Austin Chenge Website: The Office of Austin Chenge. | | | | | | | | This email was sent from .

name: Matias, United We Dream
subject: Recapping Powered by the People: ICE out of our Communities
body:
The moment we’re facing demands courage. We can face it — together. | | | Peter, What we've witnessed these past weeks are warning signs. During this moment, we must reclaim our collective power to build a future where everyone is free to live, speak, and be themselves. That’s why United We Dream called on our community to join “Powered by the People: ICE out of our Communities,” where over 350 people connected to take a mental break, learn how to bring their communities together, and discover strategies for building non-violent resistance. The moment we’re facing demands courage. It demands our renewed commitment as a community to come together in the face of rising terror and to instead choose peace, choose each other, choose community. **We can face it — together.** [**If you are able to support United We Dream’s work during this time, your contribution will help us empower immigrant youth, demand accountability from those in power, and keep our communities informed. Will you make an impactful contribution clean_body: The moment we’re facing demands courage. We can face it — together. | | | Peter, What we've witnessed these past weeks are warning signs. During this moment, we must reclaim our collective power to build a future where everyone is free to live, speak, and be themselves. That’s why United We Dream called on our community to join “Powered by the People: ICE out of our Communities,” where over 350 people connected to take a mental break, learn how to bring their communities together, and discover strategies for building non-violent resistance. The moment we’re facing demands courage. It demands our renewed commitment as a community to come together in the face of rising terror and to instead choose peace, choose each other, choose community. We can face it — together. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. Thank you, Matias, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

name: AZ Dems
subject: Juan Ciscomani’s broken healthcare promises
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123524713/595733847/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTA5ZTcyNWYtZDJmMy1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAwZDNhNTRiNTYwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xdafo2cWU0hrTrrAw36_JCs4ZX1Zong1OjmIt7lhGo4=)
---
Team,

Rural Arizonans deserve better than broken promises and shuttered hospitals. But thanks to the inaction of Rep. Juan Ciscomani, that’s exactly what they got.

Ciscomani voted in favor of slashing Medicaid, using an abhorrently underfunded “rural health fund” as an excuse for why he left Arizona hospitals, healthcare staff, and their patients behind. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123524714/595733848/-1013392651?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTA5ZTcyNWYtZDJmMy1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAwZDNhNTRiNTYwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xdafo2cWU0hrTrrAw36_JCs4ZX1Zong1OjmIt7lhGo4=)**His math just isn’t adding up, and everyday people will be forced to foot the bill because of it.

[**Juan Ciscomani needs to be shown the door, and we've got strong Democratic candidates in AZ-06 ready to take him on. body:
Friend,
This morning, the U.S. Supreme Court heard a case that could change everything
for girls’ and women’s sports – including right here in New Hampshire.

<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/girls-sports-scotus-email-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260114_girls-sports-scotus-email_sb?&utm_medium=GFY2&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260116_girls-sports-scotus-email_indirect>
If the Court sides with the Left, girls could lose their spots, their
scholarships, and any hope of fair competition.

As a former girls’ basketball coach and, more importantly, as a dad, this hits
close to home.

<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/girls-sports-scotus-email-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260114_girls-sports-scotus-email_sb?&utm_medium=GFY2&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260116_girls-sports-scotus-email_indirect>
I coached my daughter’s team. I watched those girls push themselves, support
each other, and give everything they had on the court. They earned every win,
and they played by the rules.

But now, the Left is trying to rewrite the rules and erase fairness for girls
like my daughter. And they’re using the courts to do it.

That’s one of the many reasons I’m running for U.S. Senate.

New Hampshire needs someone who won’t be afraid to tell the truth. Who won’t
bend to the woke mob. Who will fight like hell for fairness, biology, and
common sense.

But I can’t do this alone. This race is already one of the most competitive
in the country. National Democrats are pouring in millions to defend this seat
and keep another strong conservative voice out of the Senate.

If we’re going to flip this seat and keep the Senate, I need a grassroots team
behind me. Can I count on you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to
help us fight back and WIN, Friend?
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/girls-sports-scotus-email-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260114_girls-sports-scotus-email_sb?&utm_medium=GFY2&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260116_girls-sports-scotus-email_indirect>
TAKE A STAND
<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/girls-sports-scotus-email-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260114_girls-sports-scotus-email_sb?&utm_medium=GFY2&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260116_girls-sports-scotus-email_indirect>
This campaign isn’t about me. It’s about protecting opportunity, protecting
our daughters, and protecting the values we believe in.

Let’s build a team that fights as my girls did with heart, grit, and
everything we’ve got.

Thank you for standing with me,

<https://secure.winred.com/scott-brown-for-new-hampshire-inc/girls-sports-scotus-email-acs/?recurring=true&utm_medium=pemail&utm_source=rs_acs&utm_campaign=20260114_girls-sports-scotus-email_sb?&utm_medium=GFY2&utm_source=rcl&utm_campaign=20260116_girls-sports-scotus-email_indirect>

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: When democracies flicker out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
As a former CIA officer, I've seen democracies flicker out.

| Team -

Several weeks ago, myself and five other Members of Congress with service and veteran backgrounds made a video directly quoting the Uniform Code of Military Justice about the military’s responsibility to reject illegal orders.

In response, President Trump called for my arrest, trial and death by hanging.

**Last week I learned that former Fox News host Jeanine Pirro, U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia, asked to interview me.**

This is on top of the FBI’s Counterterrorism Division’s inquiry at the end of last year.

As a former CIA officer, I've seen democracies flicker out. I’ve seen what life is like when a government is rigged. I’ve studied this kind of political authoritarianism in other countries where you can't criticize the guys in charge without getting a knock at the door in the middle of the night.

It’s hard to believe I am talking about it in my own country, and the knock is happening on my door.

I've always tried to be straight with you in these emails. When these threats happen, it requires a strategy -- because no American wants to live in a country where the president can weaponize the government against his perceived enemies.

Sean Hannity **[destroyed Democrat ICE basher Rep. Ro Khanna live on Fox News](https://substack.com/redirect/3fd0ab38-7a8c-47c9-8ce3-6566612cddeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for refusing to admit the truth about the shooting of Renee Nicole Good.
"EXCUSE ME! You're out there demonizing them, calling them Nazi Gestapo fascist!" Hannity exploded at the Democrat. "It's gotta stop!!"
## [Watch the Fox News beatdown here:](https://substack.com/redirect/3fd0ab38-7a8c-47c9-8ce3-6566612cddeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3fd0ab38-7a8c-47c9-8ce3-6566612cddeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3fd0ab38-7a8c-47c9-8ce3-6566612cddeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **House Oversight investigates Ilhan Omar 's wealth surge amid fraud scandal**
The House Oversight Committee is investigating "Squad" Rep. Ilhan Omar's family wealth **[after it reportedly skyrocketed from nearly broke to up to $30 million in just one year](https://substack.com/redirect/ca701e2d-8cd2-473b-91e0-286e99fc7cea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** according to her 2024 disclosure forms, with Chairman James Comer saying staff lawyers are exploring subpoenaing Omar's husband Tim Mynett over allegedly shady business practices, telling The NY Post "There are a lot of questions as to how her husband accumulated so much wealth over the past two years. It's not possible. It's not. I'm a money guy. It's not possible."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ca701e2d-8cd2-473b-91e0-286e99fc7cea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Investment firm Rose Lake Capital raises red flags:** Mynett's investment firm Rose Lake Capital, formed in 2022, had only $42.44 in its bank account in late 2022 but rocketed in value from zero to up to $25 million in just a year, with Wall Street sources expressing shock they'd never heard of the firm despite its website boasting "billions of dollars of assets under management," while the firm is not registered with the SEC despite claiming to do private equity work that would typically require registration.
* **FBI briefed on suspicions during Biden administration:** Federal law enforcement is probing Omar and her politically-connected husband, with a source saying "We are investigating all politicians potentially connected to any of this [fraud] in Minnesota," while associates brought information to the FBI's attention in 2024 about alleged irregularities and questions about where the money was coming from, wondering whether the businesses--including a winery--"might be up to something improper, since none had a public track record."
* **Former advisors claim they weren 't told about listing:** The firm scrubbed prominent names from its website including former Sen. Max Baucus, who told The Post he had a single phone call in 2022 and was never asked permission to be listed as an "advisor," saying the emails "sounded a little bit fishy," while former Trump Special Envoy J. Peter Pham said he had one meeting and "can't say anything" about Mynett and Omar's "sudden coming into riches," as the company recently deactivated its LinkedIn page and removed partner Will Hailer's listing.

# **DOJ investigating Walz and Frey for obstruction of ICE operations**
The Department of Justice is **[reportedly investigating Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz and Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey](https://substack.com/redirect/4d0a8c70-c978-4c08-9e05-619e160d0043?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for obstruction, focusing on whether they violated federal law prohibiting conspiracy "to prevent, by force, intimidation, or threat, any person from accepting or holding any office, trust, or place of confidence under the United States, or from discharging any duties thereof," with both officials reportedly subpoenaed as part of the probe.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4d0a8c70-c978-4c08-9e05-619e160d0043?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Officials denounced ICE shooting despite video evidence:** Both Walz and Frey denounced the fatal Jan. 7 ICE shooting of Renee Nicole Good as murder, despite cell phone video showing Good appeared to ignore commands before backing up her car, looking at the agent, and accelerating toward him after her girlfriend shouted "Drive, baby, drive!" with the agent receiving hospital treatment for internal bleeding after being struck by her vehicle.
* **Walz urged residents to film ICE, called operations an "occupation":** Walz urged Minnesota residents in a Wednesday livestream to "take out that phone and hit record" to "create a database of the atrocities against Minnesotans" and "bank evidence for future prosecution," calling Trump and DHS Secretary Kristi Noem's actions an "occupation" claiming ICE was "dragging pregnant women," while Frey told WCCO that Minneapolis police would not cooperate with federal immigration enforcement and was criticized for failing to respond when anti-ICE rioters attacked federal agents and journalists.

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123525416/595735768/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA0MjQ5Yy1kNWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GIWHda3jhhMeQQnF5hD2ZTQAvfo-X3ZTStzkhrHFtvM=&emci=1c6623d6-03f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&emdi=0f04249c-d5f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&ceid=252045)

Hey there, I don’t often wade into other states’ primaries. In fact, I’ve only done it in three states so far this cycle. But today, I want to tell you why I’m endorsing Mallory McMorrow — and why I’d appreciate you joining me to support her. Some folks in D.C. have decided they’re going to try and sway this race. The kind of establishment meddling that drives people crazy: _Washington insiders thinking they know better than voters who should represent them. _ I can’t stand that kind of politics. And I refuse to sit on the sidelines and watch it happen. **That’s why I’m endorsing Mallory McMorrow. ** **If I’ve already told you enough, and you’re ready to support Mallory too, you can split a donation with my personal link here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-em-mcmorrow](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123525417/595735769/1164759976?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA0MjQ5Yy1kNWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GIWHda3jhhMeQQnF5hD2ZTQAvfo-X3ZTStzkhrHFtvM=)** Mallory has fought to expand the earned income tax credit in Michigan, held the line on clean water access, and taken on price gouging that’s squeezing working families. She doesn't just talk about fighting for people, she actually does it – even when it's hard, and especially when it matters most. Michiganders couldn’t ask for a stronger champion for their rights and freedoms, and I couldn’t imagine a better partner to join me in the U.S. Senate. But if you need some more info, here’s what’s at stake: Republicans see Michigan as their golden ticket to flipping a Democratic seat **red**. They’ve seen that Mallory was outspent last quarter by Mike Rogers, and they’ve seen the polling that shows she’s the only candidate in this primary who can beat him in a head-to-head general election match up. So yeah, they’re scared. And on top of that, she’s built a movement of people who are fed up with the BS they’ve seen in Washington. A movement of people who are ready to fight for a government that actually works for them. People who are sick and tired of the Washington establishment misreading the moment and running scared instead of being bold. [_**Please help me make sure Mallory has what she needs to win by splitting a donation between our campaigns today. Every bit helps — seriously.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123525418/595735770/1164759976?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA0MjQ5Yy1kNWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GIWHda3jhhMeQQnF5hD2ZTQAvfo-X3ZTStzkhrHFtvM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mallory McMorrow and Martin Heinrich will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123525419/595735771/1164759976?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA0MjQ5Yy1kNWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GIWHda3jhhMeQQnF5hD2ZTQAvfo-X3ZTStzkhrHFtvM=)

When I first ran for office, I didn’t have a long background in politics or a family history of campaigning.
I saw my community needed someone to step up, and I couldn’t sit back.
That’s the kind of leader Mallory is. She’s not backed by corporate donors; she’s counting on grassroots supporters who believe in her vision for the New American Dream.
I know that Mallory will be an incredible champion for her state in the U.S. Senate, just as she’s been in the State Senate. Now more than ever, we need strong voices who aren’t afraid to speak out and call out the BS when they see it. _That’s Mallory. _
[_**Join me in supporting Mallory for Senate. Can you split a donation between our campaigns today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123525425/595735777/1164759976?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA0MjQ5Yy1kNWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GIWHda3jhhMeQQnF5hD2ZTQAvfo-X3ZTStzkhrHFtvM=)
Thanks for being part of this. We’re in it together.
Martin

The kind of establishment meddling that drives people crazy: Washington insiders thinking they know better than voters who should represent them. I can’t stand that kind of politics. And I refuse to sit on the sidelines and watch it happen. That’s why I’m endorsing Mallory McMorrow. If I’ve already told you enough, and you’re ready to support Mallory too, you can split a donation with my personal link here:= Mallory has fought to expand the earned income tax credit in Michigan, held the line on clean water access, and taken on price gouging that’s squeezing working families. She doesn't just talk about fighting for people, she actually does it – even when it's hard, and especially when it matters most. Michiganders couldn’t ask for a stronger champion for their rights and freedoms, and I couldn’t imagine a better partner to join me in the U.S. Senate. But if you need some more info, here’s what’s at stake: Republicans see Michigan as their golden ticket to flipping a Democratic seat red. They’ve seen that Mallory was outspent last quarter by Mike Rogers, and they’ve seen the polling that shows she’s the only candidate in this primary who can beat him in a head-to-head general election match up. So yeah, they’re scared. And on top of that, she’s built a movement of people who are fed up with the BS they’ve seen in Washington. A movement of people who are ready to fight for a government that actually works for them. People who are sick and tired of the Washington establishment misreading the moment and running scared instead of being bold. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mallory McMorrow and Martin Heinrich will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = When I first ran for office, I didn’t have a long background in politics or a family history of campaigning. I saw my community needed someone to step up, and I couldn’t sit back. That’s the kind of leader Mallory is. She’s not backed by corporate donors; she’s counting on grassroots supporters who believe in her vision for the New American Dream. I know that Mallory will be an incredible champion for her state in the U.S. Senate, just as she’s been in the State Senate. Now more than ever, we need strong voices who aren’t afraid to speak out and call out the BS when they see it. That’s Mallory. = Thanks for being part of this. We’re in it together. Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, . Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 United States

I’m the proud daughter of immigrants who fled Iran’s authoritarian regime of fear and repression. Arizona raised me, and I’m ready to continue the fight for everyone who calls it home.
I carried that fight from the United Nations, where I helped to deliver the historic Paris Climate Agreement, to Phoenix, where, as the Vice Mayor, I expanded housing options, invested in clean, affordable transportation, and created good-paying jobs.
And last year, I was sworn in as the youngest woman in the 119th Congress — part of a new generation of leadership.
I’ve held the powerful to account — demanding answers for Epstein survivors, and exposing corruption and insider trading at the highest levels. When Trump defied the Supreme Court, I went to El Salvador to defend our Constitution.
As Trump pours billions into ICE, I see the fear it creates in our neighborhoods. That’s why we trained thousands of our neighbors to know their rights, and worked with community leaders to keep families safe.
I’ve gone inside detention centers to demand humane treatment. And I’ve fought for my constituents — like Yari, a woman battling leukemia — demanding that ICE provide the care she desperately needs.
**Because no one should be left to suffer in U.S. custody.**
I’m leading the fight against Big Oil’s greed — so families pay less for their utilities. I don’t take corporate PAC money. I don’t own or trade stocks.
And with my affordability agenda, we’ll make housing, health care, and AC bills more affordable. This is the fight of our lives — and Arizona is at the center of it.
[**Pitch in right now to become a founding donor for our re-election campaign — when we win here, we can take back the House majority from the Republican majority that is leaving working families behind.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123525681/595737028/514881826?refcode=AU_YA_FR_LAU_GEN_NO_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTU2NTY5MC1kNmYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MuqDReVlP7QYIf8uZsRZ8mi74-FkkOrfQoWMHludNJ8=)

name: Rose Penelope Yee
subject: Injustice Anywhere is a Threat to Justice Everywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Rose for Congress](https://roseforcongress
body:
This is a campaign for a just, humane, and peaceful America.

| | | | | [|
---](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=c1939c0337&e=8c53948e4c)
| | | | | |

# “**Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere.** ”
-_Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr._
---
| |
Dear Friends,This is my favorite quote from Dr. King, and it rings just as true now as when he said it.>From Minneapolis to Portland and beyond, we are witnessing a brutal and dangerous demonstration of power that we never thought we’d see in our country. This past week, a U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agent fatally shot **Renee Nicole Good** , a 37-year-old mother of three, in Minneapolis. Just a day later, federal agents in Portland fired on two people during an immigration enforcement operation, wounding both.These incidents have sparked protests and vigils, and raised urgent questions about the use of force by federal agents. But also underlying the sense of outrage are deep feelings of disbelief, unease, and even fear.
Here in Redding, last Sunday, we held protests at noon against ICE, fascism, and militarism. That evening, we gathered for a vigil in honor of Renee. Her death has cast a long shadow over families and communities nationwide.

At the vigil, I shared a part of my own story: growing up under the Marcos dictatorship in the Philippines. My father was a lawyer who defended students, workers, and farmers who dared to challenge an authoritarian regime. Because of his work, he became a target himself and was detained in a military stockade. I remember the weekends my mom would bundle all four of us and we would visit him in prison.
That experience at a young age clearly showed me the might of power and ways it is wielded against those who challenged it. But my father’s example also taught me something else: that we need to stand up and fight for justice, despite what it might cost us. That lesson informs why I stand against war, against violence, and for peace. It is the foundation of my campaign rooted in **People , Peace, and Planet**: because without peace, we cannot care for people, and without peace, we cannot leave a livable planet for future generationsThis moment calls out to all of us. It calls for a new path forward grounded in:
* **Justice under the rule of law;**
* **Humane and ethical immigration policy, and enforcement reform;**
* **Compassion and dignity for all; and**
* **A commitment to peace.**

We must reject the normalization of violence, be it abroad or here at home. We must vigorously challenge the expansion of militarism that undermines our sense of safety and security.I will be sharing in days ahead the **Peace Dividend** I’m proposing to shift resources away from endless wars and toward our needs here at home. It is one step we can immediately take to start reversing this path to continued militarism.This is a campaign for _**a just, humane, and peaceful America**_**.** And we need to meet this moment with strength and in community with each other.With gratitude and resolve,
Rose Penelope Yee
Candidate for Congress, CA-02
**PS**. Challenging violence and militarism takes courage, and it takes resources. Your donation helps us challenge power.

clean_body: This is a campaign for a just, humane, and peaceful America. | | | | | | | | | | | “Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere. ” -Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. | | Dear Friends,This is my favorite quote from Dr. King, and it rings just as true now as when he said it.>From Minneapolis to Portland and beyond, we are witnessing a brutal and dangerous demonstration of power that we never thought we’d see in our country. This past week, a U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agent fatally shot Renee Nicole Good , a 37-year-old mother of three, in Minneapolis. Just a day later, federal agents in Portland fired on two people during an immigration enforcement operation, wounding both.These incidents have sparked protests and vigils, and raised urgent questions about the use of force by federal agents. But also underlying the sense of outrage are deep feelings of disbelief, unease, and even fear. Here in Redding, last Sunday, we held protests at noon against ICE, fascism, and militarism. That evening, we gathered for a vigil in honor of Renee. Her death has cast a long shadow over families and communities nationwide. At the vigil, I shared a part of my own story: growing up under the Marcos dictatorship in the Philippines. My father was a lawyer who defended students, workers, and farmers who dared to challenge an authoritarian regime. Because of his work, he became a target himself and was detained in a military stockade. I remember the weekends my mom would bundle all four of us and we would visit him in prison. That experience at a young age clearly showed me the might of power and ways it is wielded against those who challenged it. But my father’s example also taught me something else: that we need to stand up and fight for justice, despite what it might cost us. That lesson informs why I stand against war, against violence, and for peace. It is the foundation of my campaign rooted in People , Peace, and Planet: because without peace, we cannot care for people, and without peace, we cannot leave a livable planet for future generationsThis moment calls out to all of us. It calls for a new path forward grounded in: Justice under the rule of law; Humane and ethical immigration policy, and enforcement reform; Compassion and dignity for all; and A commitment to peace. We must reject the normalization of violence, be it abroad or here at home. We must vigorously challenge the expansion of militarism that undermines our sense of safety and security.I will be sharing in days ahead the Peace Dividend I’m proposing to shift resources away from endless wars and toward our needs here at home. It is one step we can immediately take to start reversing this path to continued militarism.This is a campaign for a just, humane, and peaceful America. And we need to meet this moment with strength and in community with each other.With gratitude and resolve, Rose Penelope Yee Candidate for Congress, CA-02 PS. Challenging violence and militarism takes courage, and it takes resources. Your donation helps us challenge power. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Rose for Congress 3335 Placer St # 288 Redding, CA 96001-2364 * USA or |

Peter,
---
Mexico City is my home. It's where I was born, where I learned to believe in God's purpose, and where I first saw the kind of poverty and pain that can break your heart.When I speak with our partners there, the stories of children in need make my heart ache.You may know me as the producer of the blockbuster film _Sound of Freedom._ But what you may not know is that the film became the foundation for a massive movement, the **Sound of Freedom Foundation.** A humanitarian organization that rescues children from sex trafficking, supports their recovery, and helps stop exploitation before it begins. In hospitals across Mexico city, vulnerable children, including those rescued from trafficking and abuse, are now fighting to survive. But there aren't enough ICU beds to care for them.Some lie on stretchers or floors, waiting for a chance at healing that may never come.That's why I've set a goal:

**I want to raise $20,000 to deliver $200,000 worth of ICU beds** to hospitals and medical centers that serve God's children in Mexico City.

$100 -> provides $1,000 in needed ICU supplies.

When these beds arrive, they will go straight into hospitals that have been praying for help, to doctors who refuse to give up, and nurses who comfort frightened children through the night.And the impact doesn't end there. Because when desperate families can access medical care for their children, they no longer face the unthinkable choice of selling a son or daughter just to survive.In communities where poverty and sickness make children vulnerable to traffickers, **a single hospital bed can mean the difference between a child staying with their loving family or being trafficked and abused.** This is what we can change together.We have the plan.
We have the partners.
But this mission can't launch without you.Peter, the next few days will decide how many children we can help, how many will have a bed instead of the floor, and hope instead of fear. If we reach our goal, those hospital rooms will be transformed. The caregivers will have the tools they need. And the children will finally be able to rest, to heal, and to live, safe from the predators who prey on desperation.If we fall short, vulnerable children will not receive the medical care they need and their families may be forced into the kind of impossible decisions that result in more children being trafficked and exploited for profit.**[Will you give $25, $50, $100, or more today to help us deliver these ICU beds to Mexico City before time runs out?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=95d54929c30a40d582d905ad81574472&_e=4LS_0gu3XyYLI07rS0tjKNSO9hWgbvXWm3gXtc3lS2xSWyaLyy7V5z4PYY-l2GnA-1M2DcwdOdUTp54PwhgZmSmcUWbP-5_PzJiJRwx5-EplSMVBRQgje1_amRrOWxfPquUYaP7gsK5Qrs87b5zQUZAePFhmSypLd6ul32ByGx_WzJVaTOB9JQems3l2VsdX5ou5vi4GrL8JpWid2pvbIrwR2oh_yJ42xOJc4lF_QbFELhWB9kXzmLXMTJ59Zm3__WmJ-3vuUfMQXmttOgJeKN-nY6GzXPopQ_Y7_SgutB-K_uSOkLZ6pj9vy740arm8-WCCPBjYrd6DtYLuAWb-EpMdRxjx99iW-_p7eNQ2KHucUAqJTovTj6Ub292oHbW2QhFKirPHcRbq6-P7A4NjRXItYoDz1YMzrc11zaGbVevylBbSBMOgrplYS9cfp2GcCIf9RZ1M6EXHF_CkYzSXPtEp1nV3l4R5TZuSXxV2BqbZ6B-wh6x4BEEuAALJ5DJB7BPPVBxYrkHiJlvb9INjUuzBs5Xol3BYrfnPiRA1K3R5n3WqkCvN6FJ-v9ePW_ZAIRNDtBfH95qytgEKVjFO5qLicoCyxA9FZbLQgDIWF1FQra14aWyzTYuJdJqYtIe2kFoCFiSPbIUTaNW9oxmcf7ZEJGUwbbWrJ-5Kvl3oTySILkD5-zCkCP0UH6UBOA6VkH5dVkaWNATWcKaN8A0NCWNsii2B_qs-UiOnV7wWNRGZrQN_BFkvpnVxcydbheq9plVaPuQNnwIzDEUhkDtfU_s1C26VqKPfd_q0XLz5FUnW1dY4vLL579uUdycBlzQG)**

clean_body: A hospital bed can stop a child from being trafficked There are no ICU beds left. That's what we're changing, right now. | | | Peter, Mexico City is my home. It's where I was born, where I learned to believe in God's purpose, and where I first saw the kind of poverty and pain that can break your heart.When I speak with our partners there, the stories of children in need make my heart ache.You may know me as the producer of the blockbuster film Sound of Freedom. But what you may not know is that the film became the foundation for a massive movement, the Sound of Freedom Foundation. A humanitarian organization that rescues children from sex trafficking, supports their recovery, and helps stop exploitation before it begins. In hospitals across Mexico city, vulnerable children, including those rescued from trafficking and abuse, are now fighting to survive. But there aren't enough ICU beds to care for them.Some lie on stretchers or floors, waiting for a chance at healing that may never come.That's why I've set a goal: I want to raise $20,000 to deliver $200,000 worth of ICU beds to hospitals and medical centers that serve God's children in Mexico City. These beds are lifelines. They are where a fragile heartbeat stabilizes, where a child's breathing grows stronger, where healing happens. Every $1 you give becomes $10 of real medical value.How?Because through the Sound of Freedom Foundation's partnerships with trusted humanitarian distributors, we're able to secure bulk discounts on high-need medical equipment. That means every dollar raised helps unlock $10 worth of ICU beds, monitors, and lifesaving hospital supplies. enough to care for children who are sick, weak, and desperately in need of help.$25 -> provides $250 worth of ICU equipment and supplies. $50 -> provides $500 toward children's ICU beds. $100 -> provides $1,000 in needed ICU supplies. $250 or more -> helps equip an entire hospital ward for rescued children. When these beds arrive, they will go straight into hospitals that have been praying for help, to doctors who refuse to give up, and nurses who comfort frightened children through the night.And the impact doesn't end there. Because when desperate families can access medical care for their children, they no longer face the unthinkable choice of selling a son or daughter just to survive.In communities where poverty and sickness make children vulnerable to traffickers, a single hospital bed can mean the difference between a child staying with their loving family or being trafficked and abused. This is what we can change together.We have the plan. We have the partners. But this mission can't launch without you.Peter, the next few days will decide how many children we can help, how many will have a bed instead of the floor, and hope instead of fear. If we reach our goal, those hospital rooms will be transformed. The caregivers will have the tools they need. And the children will finally be able to rest, to heal, and to live, safe from the predators who prey on desperation.If we fall short, vulnerable children will not receive the medical care they need and their families may be forced into the kind of impossible decisions that result in more children being trafficked and exploited for profit. For God's children, Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

name: Team In This Together PAC
subject: Voters don't want slogans, they want solutions.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Peter,

Gov. Andy Beshear has a piece of advice for anyone running for governor right now — and honestly, it's pretty straightforward: _**Listen to your voters.**_

That means _actually_ listening to what they're struggling with, and actually finding real solutions that make life easier. That's it.

Across the country, families are feeling squeezed. Costs are higher, healthcare is harder to access, schools are underfunded, and too often, the version of politics that makes it to cable news channels feels disconnected from the real problems people face every day.

Voters aren't asking for a perfect speech or a shiny new slogan; they're asking for leaders who pay attention — and who show up ready to govern. That's how Andy won as a Democrat in deep-red Kentucky, and it's how more Democrats will win governorships in 2026.

At In This Together PAC, we're supporting commonsense candidates who understand that governing isn't about selling an "ideal." It's about delivering results, from lower costs, better schools, healthcare access, and a government that actually works for people. These races matter. Governors make decisions every day that shape the lives of the people in their state.

**[If you believe in backing leaders who listen first and lead with solutions—not division—chip in anything you can today to help us support key gubernatorial races across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123526497/595739627/1338299492?refcode=em26_260117_gov_fndd_gq_act___tittp_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em26_260117_gov_fndd_gq_act___tittp_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=c3e5763d-d8f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&refcode2=c3e5763d-d8f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzNlNTc2M2QtZDhmMy1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAwZDNhNTRiNTYwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7fkvMsN0rAsxBCy5dBD4xYdaUq0aJYFutiE93LWSHKw=)** name: SpecOps Lightsaber
subject: I can't sell these any longer.
body:
I may be sold out by tonight...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22324/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/21092e844af033c6a03b8b7548701f23c08c4c76). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.

[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22324/6374453/60becfe5319a0ecced321ee10a1e5e109856f318/21092e844af033c6a03b8b7548701f23c08c4c76)

I can't sell these any longer because simply too many people are buying them. Plus, not sure how legal they are in some states. I may be sold out by tonight... I didn't need to give you a chance to grab **the most BRUTAL laser on the market.**_(so strong it ignites fires -_[_take a look._](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22324/6374453/60becfe5319a0ecced321ee10a1e5e109856f318/21092e844af033c6a03b8b7548701f23c08c4c76)_)_ However, my goal is to prepare you immediately and for years to come... _while the world is getting more violent and unpredictable._ [**THIS TOOL DOES THAT.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22324/6374453/60becfe5319a0ecced321ee10a1e5e109856f318/21092e844af033c6a03b8b7548701f23c08c4c76) I'm unsure if you still have a chance to grab one of the 97 I _smuggled_ in... **_...but I can only do my part._** [See if they are sold out right here. ](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22324/6374453/60becfe5319a0ecced321ee10a1e5e109856f318/21092e844af033c6a03b8b7548701f23c08c4c76)
~National Gun Owner
---

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Last week made something very clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
And it should worry all of us.

| |
---
Team, I want you to take a moment and look at who is actually running our country right now. Last week, Stephen Miller went on national television and fumbled the answer to a basic question: whether sovereign countries get to decide what happens to their own resources. In short, his answer was no. According to him, if the United States wants another country’s resources, we are entitled to them. According to him, we should use military force to secure “our interests” in “our hemisphere.” According to him, sovereignty only applies when it’s convenient for American power. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123526689/595740113/2090747700?refcode=260117_sm_running_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzYxYjc3ZS1kOWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C9fOIaVZSbcE7ELbI87eJ084V27EwS6_szfFBolnYJw=) He clearly represented how this administration views the world. And it doesn’t stop there.

Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has started formal proceedings against Senator Mark Kelly for doing his job. Kelly criticized the firing of senior military leaders and warned about surrounding the Pentagon with “yes men.” For that, Hegseth issued a formal letter of censure and even raised the possibility of reviewing Senator Kelly’s military rank and pension. Kelly is a sitting U.S. Senator. He serves on the Senate Armed Services Committee. Oversight is literally his responsibility. At the same time, officials like Kristi Noem are publicly calling people “terrorists” without evidence or due process. That’s dangerous language. When people in power use words like that loosely, real people pay the price. This administration treats oversight as disloyalty, disagreement as punishable, and raw power as something that should go unchecked, whether abroad or here at home. That’s not how a democracy is supposed to work. **While those in power are focused on the wrong things, Americans are struggling to afford the basics: housing, groceries, health care, and child care. That’s where our focus needs to be. ** I’m running for the United States Senate because we need leaders who are willing to say that out loud, and then actually do something about it. **[If you’re able, I hope you’ll chip in today to help keep this campaign moving forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123526690/595740114/2090747700?refcode=260117_sm_running_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzYxYjc3ZS1kOWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C9fOIaVZSbcE7ELbI87eJ084V27EwS6_szfFBolnYJw=)** | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123526691/595740115/1375639745?amp;refcode=260117_sm_running&refcode=260117_sm_running&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzYxYjc3ZS1kOWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C9fOIaVZSbcE7ELbI87eJ084V27EwS6_szfFBolnYJw=)
