name: Chris Pappas HQ
subject: We cannot sleep on New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Did you see this?
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=4626%2E582294%2EbMmKtO)
Did you see this? 👇
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260117_1.OJtvAt&refcode=em20260117-1&t=2&akid=4626%2E582294%2EbMmKtO)
**If Democrats are going to have any shot at taking back the Senate, we cannot sleep on New Hampshire.** Here’s why:
🚨 Moments after John Sununu jumped into this Senate race, **Roll Call downgraded our chances of winning, making this seat a top pickup opportunity for Republicans.**
🚨 John Sununu isn’t just any Republican. **He’s backed by the entire Washington establishment.** He comes from a political dynasty, has national name recognition, and brings a fundraising machine.
🚨 **Recent polls show Chris Pappas and John Sununu TIED,** and it’s only a matter of time until GOP billionaires and special interests start dumping money into New Hampshire.
**[We can’t afford to fall behind in this moment. That’s why your support, right now, is more critical than ever. If you’re all in for Chris Pappas and for keeping New Hampshire blue, chip in $5 now.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260117_1.OJtvAt&refcode=em20260117-1&t=3&akid=4626%2E582294%2EbMmKtO)**
**Chris Pappas is a fighter for Granite Staters, and he can win.** He’s a proven public servant who’s won his purple Congressional district in New Hampshire four times. **But this race will be more expensive, more competitive, and more dangerous for Democrats now that we’re TIED with Sununu.**
**[That’s why we’re telling you: Do not sleep on New Hampshire. Now is the time to build the resources and infrastructure we need to win this November. Chip in any amount to elect Chris Pappas and keep New Hampshire blue. 🔵](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260117_1.OJtvAt&refcode=em20260117-1&t=4&akid=4626%2E582294%2EbMmKtO)**

Chris Pappas HQ

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Hoping to hear from you
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Friend,

When I go to work in Washington and fight for Northern Ohio, I'm fighting for my lifelong home too. I'm fighting for my friends and neighbors, my family members, and the community that raised me.

So when I say that your opinion matters to me, I mean it. Making your voice heard in Congress is the purpose of my work.

Right now, my team and I are making plans for 2026, and we need your input to guide our goals. With the most radical members of the GOP in control in Washington, our work is more urgent than ever.

Friend, what are the most important issues you'd like to see us focus on in 2026? Please take our 2026 Priorities Survey to let us know — it will only take two minutes! [http://secure.ngpvan.com/4X3q0CH3f0-ef9u2v9gvrg2]

TAKE THE SURVEY → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4X3q0CH3f0-ef9u2v9gvrg2]

My team and I will read every response, and your opinion will shape our priorities for the year ahead. Thanks for being part of this movement, friend.

— Marcy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.

name: Schrier HQ
subject: Your input is crucial here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Just circling back before we lock in our plans for the year ahead, Peter.

This election year will move fast, and Kim's campaign needs to be crystal clear about what matters most to the people of WA-08. The best way to do that is simple: _Hear directly from you about what you'd like our campaign to prioritize._

[**If you haven't yet, please take a moment to complete our quick, 3-question priorities survey before we share your responses with Kim. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123526791/595740476/888197107?ms=em26_260117_surtwo_fndd_gq_act___SHQ_ettx&refcode=em26_260117_surtwo_fndd_gq_act___SHQ_ettx&source=em26_260117_surtwo_fndd_gq_act___SHQ_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260117_surtwo_fndd_gq_act___SHQ_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=xgqBzA/6qI0JPZVd76qmqBvzLRBfr6S2U9cRpwK0OOHHu4pfOuyCTZwuV+jN1dyKO5x2d1lUdImO0L+u6W6XFFNPEwny3BdYGmKYM3q9ur9Bb3PQvfG0cKN1nchrcuk9ox/aNodVVpZ+Qvz1aguy6HP+TRHLzMpA0BEHOA6c4fg=&refcode2=c8d6c2a3-daf3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGQ2YzJhMy1kYWYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vPg4Bp6WtyAfANYRteQCkVPBDAIFcY_g0zGnPZCoN4=&emci=0cac0c31-3bf2-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=c8d6c2a3-daf3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&ceid=15820338)

Kim wants to know exactly what issues you're most worried about right now. What do you want her to focus on in Congress? And what kind of leadership do you want for our country? These are all critical questions that will outline our focus as the election season starts to ramp up.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Grassroots momentum is winning momentum. Your support — today — gives us the fuel we need to ensure we can limit the damage Donald Trump gets away with.It’s that simple! Thank you so much, — Heather The Voter Protection Project 878179 | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. subject: Trump loves how you ignore us!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72306?t=3&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN) We’re heartbroken 💔

When we reminded you the Electoral College handed Trump the White House in 2016? [**_Nothing._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72306?t=4&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN)

When we told you Top Democrats like Robert Reich are calling for the Electoral College to be abolished? [**_Nothing._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72306?t=5&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN)

And when we asked you to sign our emergency petition demanding the Electoral College be abolished once and for all? [**_Still nothing._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72306?t=6&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN)

This is just too important, so we’re reopening our petition for 1 day – only for you, team.

[**Before our deadline closes at 11:59 PM, sign to demand the Electoral College finally be abolished — you're the LAST signature in your area that we need! >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72306?t=7&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN) | [ADD MY NAME TO THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72306?t=8&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN)
---
We won’t be opening this petition again, so please sign ASAP.

_Fight for Reform_

\----------FORWARDED MESSAGE----------
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72306?t=9&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN)
[ **So, Robert Reich is calling on Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to abolish the Electoral College! We need 50,000 signatures from EVERY STATE before midnight to prove the public is behind him!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72306?t=10&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN)
[ADD MY NAME TO THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72306?t=11&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN)
---
* * *
If you were thinking of ignoring our urgent petition, here’s why you SHOULDN’T:
[**→ Donald Trump only became President in 2016 because of the outdated Electoral College.

→→ Hillary Clinton won the popular vote by nearly 2.9 million.

→→→ But the Electoral College overruled her victory!! **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72306?t=12&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN)
We can’t let something like that happen again! That’s why Robert Reich is SOUNDING THE ALARM:
[**“Twice in the last generation, the Electoral College has handed the presidency to someone who lost the popular vote.”** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72306?t=13&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72306?t=14&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN)
---|---
The Electoral College is a BROKEN system, and that’s exactly why we need you to sign today, team.
[ **If every Democrat reading this signs our petition, we will reach our 125,OOO signature goal within minutes and gain traction for this urgent legislation in Congress. Please add your name immediately:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72306?t=15&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN)
[ADD MY NAME TO THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72306?t=16&akid=23834%2E4449941%2EgQe7nN)
---
Trump is going to hate this!

Fight For Reform

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

name: John Fetterman
subject: *real* fixes for Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?refcode=jtk375-su-fl-header&t=1&akid=10540%2E434096%2EbwyzkW)
| | |
---
Derek, it's John. I’m reaching out because I need to hear from you.
The GOP is out here talking about gutting Social Security to fund tax cuts for the wealthiest dudes in America – so there's a lot at stake.
It’ll only take a minute to share your thoughts, **[so will you please take my Social Security survey now?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52569?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk375-su-fl&t=2&akid=10540%2E434096%2EbwyzkW)** 🙏
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52569?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk375-su-fl&t=3&akid=10540%2E434096%2EbwyzkW)
---
Hardworking people in Pennsylvania and across this country have paid into Social Security their entire lives.
They've earned this benefit, so it's only right they see those checks come through after they retire – it's their money!
The current administration is already throwing things into chaos by closing Social Security Administration offices, cutting staff, and making it harder for seniors to get help over the phone.
**So while I will ALWAYS fight to protect Social Security, I need to know yinz are with me –[click here to take the survey now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52569?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk375-su-fl&t=4&akid=10540%2E434096%2EbwyzkW)**
Thanks for your response,
John ❤️
| |

| | [Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2026?refcode=jtk375-su-fl-footer&t=5&refcode2=10540_434096_bwyzkW&akid=10540%2E434096%2EbwyzkW)
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://X.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
[Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
[Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=10540%2E434096%2EbwyzkW)

As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington |

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5fa76cc11e004e809ef5ec8c413d6aad&_e=8MZWoDf3dyYS7HaRdsj5dAITitFDi6YR6OKWCs60CP5JCb8thU7r56QfPHkmLtWE-Tj4IHoTTcWd4Ecf2QThqTFwWO1lCRZN9Aj-BznNaUUD9CTXbpE4yV1uQ8qxqXqbR6UqiVSbZS2DDOds2QgB8dLfSsOV1P7LjLpT3dLsi8l45GrwTK6E3Ojr0-1VbUce-ELKyi_CEDiQrI7-m1ur8xXmXBCfpVYcYnCQbXvtoqZic0OG4i-cuIxfpYbIATxjgo2gJS9au1Mf6hMDs3SKvaAeblLZaeWcLULtGroi7VKQR8h-_2ATszxsKzO3pS3h02yIdz2v7xSaKcLT8o_snciqVNsG_NuEOkreyM1TfcvgjhXtcpFcX0m37JNnaJpy_TnSMLi9S-KK17NoxphcJ5HApMOfbSpbKB-cuHzUinPY-a3Lj2EPE14-aE9MyGLHSjZwYZRlI0r2ior1uUgFdEIncObl8msxleVbHGpFHPJTHC7PD4uba4zvED2yZjdAkSGvefEazfWVVzic3XeiD3FX-DVg4SKRqo__0MWLPSWAesv_hjUxKHbwWe2NlBHKGx7ZQ9jwDszyX7jqw_IZ3ot7UJnaZzCNKtGpeB-iFampBDHIiOkKHZvLwgsu1fnshG4SbHwbld2bwjzUWihBt_3icej4sFyGKibWN4saWmGO4xttJumVnRg2lEpdkV_poP7O21sArzkn15-YegpUN6rqWFpPcuSxyLfGtrsT5HdRXtZKOCL7FssG9KljBhX1sVOfBtp4T6QRFWYXzfBSMsioxI1fiaSIHzDHqnwdsFg%3D)

* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5fa76cc11e004e809ef5ec8c413d6aad&_e=8MZWoDf3dyYS7HaRdsj5dAITitFDi6YR6OKWCs60CP5JCb8thU7r56QfPHkmLtWE-Tj4IHoTTcWd4Ecf2QThqTFwWO1lCRZN9Aj-BznNaUUD9CTXbpE4yV1uQ8qxqXqbR6UqiVSbZS2DDOds2QgB8dLfSsOV1P7LjLpT3dLsi8l45GrwTK6E3Ojr0-1VbUce-ELKyi_CEDiQrI7-m1ur8xXmXBCfpVYcYnCQbXvtoqZic0OG4i-cuIxfpYbIATxjgo2gJS9au1Mf6hMDs3SKvaAeblLZaeWcLULtGroi7VLtcuHEoyAIkCAF6HTDFJdq6GC6ZMgbiVg0xa_ejEfPT-TiKqOy8pDdeHj8W6Xa0oOG9JCHzc1Q3GjQiv6iaOa9VtKdcqoxRAjgdh6G3LCNKnUPk5iJENgwAYauY3p_rD942mVxwSHMTH0HCPascpf1Xp30B-Nj99srvr2Vz7F7rjt4WFkX5lkxEtD43dy7x-wf8eVUuGEhxAXngWfqooVXI810ZAu2DBFAxOLaRSo4Gy1R_9K4syrlodiDlUFNtrL5DGtWQ0gBMqZEa181HkqEaefp3u9KFzUODk95cP60AQ6AZoRiL4Frwkgz_JDU0Tvl6xwMFdZST4TvOecwJI5fm3Fl5uIUHaOI2Zth26bFumvmuNBTEvyCieUpSZGBXzJJNeHli3IEtkbDl_YeMF6-xYCFw7L0L5XYcl-X0DU3PUohTtrFWWUqrA1TzV5b_qAL31qIKws5dJOb_TdgftdSfRw0srDDKPtgUcTvmgj58ZuFmu5usmh0lzvfzZj4JeI%3D)**.

**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

**If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity.**

_**That’s not who my opponent is. **_

We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But **as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington.**

Here’s what I stand for:
* Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime.
* Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses.
* Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty.
* Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values.
* Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love.

You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. clean_body: As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss. I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways: 1.) . 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am. I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, defunded our police , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves. If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity. That’s not who my opponent is. We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. As a Republican, I know the odds are tough in a state that hasn’t voted red in a presidential election since 1976. But as a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington. Here’s what I stand for: Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Three years ago today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
The day I was sworn in as Pennsylvania’s Governor

Derek, I want to share the note I sent you three years ago today, on the day I was sworn in as Pennsylvania’s 48th Governor. It’s no secret that Pennsylvania has changed since that day. Our country has changed, our communities have changed — and the challenges we face as a nation have never been more palpable. But I believe these words are evergreen, Derek. They ring just as true today as they did three years ago. [_**I hope you’ll take a minute to read my note below — and if these words inspire you to forge ahead and fight for Pennsylvania’s future, then I have a humble request: Will you chip in to help me keep up the good work?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123528272/595745632/1156619579?refcode=email_011726_threeyears&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGRmZWVlYi1lMGYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yiEX53hsScRwIlvxYunS00dGIzBQVw7e8m77rF6iIDk=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123528273/595745633/1156619579?refcode=email_011726_threeyears&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGRmZWVlYi1lMGYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yiEX53hsScRwIlvxYunS00dGIzBQVw7e8m77rF6iIDk=)

–––––– Begin Forwarded Message ––––––
From: Josh Shapiro
Date: January 17, 2023
Subject: The honor of a lifetime
Derek,
This morning, I took the oath of office and was sworn in as Pennsylvania's 48th Governor.
As I addressed the people of our Commonwealth, I talked about some of the stories I heard as I traveled across Pennsylvania these last two years. Stories of people who inspired me, who taught me. Stories that have driven me to serve.
Stories from people like the grandmom in Lawrence County who told me not to let us go back to what it was like before Roe.
Stories from people like Tim, who did backbreaking work on our roadways, just to have company executives steal his hard-earned benefits.
I’m mindful of the fact that folks shared those stories — thousands of you, all across our Commonwealth — because you believe I can make a difference for you.
Derek, I’m truly humbled that the people of Pennsylvania have entrusted me with that responsibility. Not just the responsibility to serve as your 48th Governor, but the responsibility to stand up for what’s right, to bring people together, and to get real things done.
The people have given us a clear mandate. Not just by virtue of the historic number of votes for our campaign, but by the way we all came together — by what that number represents. Democrats, Republicans, Independents, rural, urban, and suburban voters from across the Commonwealth.
You sent a clear message when you came together to resoundingly reject extremism.
Together, hope defeated fear.
Unity triumphed over division.
We proved that we value our freedoms, and we’re willing to do the hard work necessary to protect our fundamental rights.
And so, with my faith firmly rooted in we the people of Pennsylvania, with my heart open to others and my eyes fixed ahead, I am prepared to do my part to move our Commonwealth forward.
Thank you for all the support you’ve provided along the way, my friend. Together, we’re going to build on this historic coalition and get big things done for Pennsylvania.
With gratitude,
Josh Shapiro
Governor of Pennsylvania

Together, hope defeated fear. Unity triumphed over division. We proved that we value our freedoms, and we’re willing to do the hard work necessary to protect our fundamental rights. And so, with my faith firmly rooted in we the people of Pennsylvania, with my heart open to others and my eyes fixed ahead, I am prepared to do my part to move our Commonwealth forward. Thank you for all the support you’ve provided along the way, my friend. Together, we’re going to build on this historic coalition and get big things done for Pennsylvania. With gratitude, Josh Shapiro Governor of Pennsylvania | = | By participating, you consent to receive donation asks, voter contact, and informational messages from Shapiro for Pennsylvania. name: Janet Mills
subject: I love Maine with all that I am
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
What Donald Trump is doing is not business as usual

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1946%2E49239%2EBOfaUS)
| | |
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11825?t=2&akid=1946%2E49239%2EBOfaUS)
null – It’s Janet Mills, Governor of Maine.

Just months ago, I did something no one does: When Donald Trump tried to intimidate me and Maine people, I looked him in the eyes and told him _I’d see him in court._ And guess what? I did. **We took him to court – and won.**
I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins because Maine deserves a senator who isn’t afraid of going toe-to-toe with a bully.

**Trump is putting Maine and our country in danger every single day, and Susan Collins is refusing to do anything about it.**
**[null, this is going to be one of the most expensive races in the country. MAGA Republicans will spend whatever it takes to defeat me. I’m ready to fight and win – but I can’t do it without your help. So please, split a donation of $10 or $15 bucks between my campaign and Haley Stevens' campaign, and let’s get to work>> ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11825?t=3&akid=1946%2E49239%2EBOfaUS)**
| | [Donate $10](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11826?t=4&akid=1946%2E49239%2EBOfaUS)
---
| | [Donate $15](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11827?t=5&akid=1946%2E49239%2EBOfaUS)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11825?t=6&akid=1946%2E49239%2EBOfaUS)
---
I love Maine with all that I am, null.

Trust me when I say I wouldn't be running otherwise.
**As Maine’s first woman District Attorney, Attorney General, and Governor – I’ve dedicated my life to this state. But when I was deciding what was next for me ... I knew I could never live with myself if I didn’t take on our biggest fight yet.
**
I know better than anyone how much more harm is going to fall on Maine people if we keep allowing Susan Collins to fail us.
What Donald Trump is doing is not business as usual. This moment is not a difference of political opinions – our country is at a tipping point that demands real leadership.

[**So please, split a donation between my campaign and Haley Stevens' campaign to help me show Donald Trump and Susan Collins that we’re ready to fight like hell to win in Maine and flip the Senate majority >> **](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11825?t=7&akid=1946%2E49239%2EBOfaUS)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Janet Mills and Haley Stevens will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11828?t=8&akid=1946%2E49239%2EBOfaUS)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11829?t=9&akid=1946%2E49239%2EBOfaUS)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11830?t=10&akid=1946%2E49239%2EBOfaUS)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11825?t=11&akid=1946%2E49239%2EBOfaUS)
---
Together,

Janet Mills
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11831?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=12&akid=1946%2E49239%2EBOfaUS) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11832?t=13&akid=1946%2E49239%2EBOfaUS)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

Fellow Patriot,

[**Can you chip in before midnight before our January mid-month deadline?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=18a26192b41f47cc841948814554691c&_e=_-0HmaMdoVknOfjS9DI6or2q0fgkh9wWQGRijP6PLm_Vf108xbZagoPPhvt_5aS3_djG46HmifkJZU0VwLQVFM-u9aQ9YVYKNM7LfdCwyOUiYErGyuYkCnsmxXN79xokHUQKk8laxGNjy_qiFbj4UtJwpWG1WGL6O9XCNLcLjVZn7-F8o3e3twtTz9GKLC0neaaiJuzvdxSNT8kEciWmuFVGiF47bd-dqvzXlAwVDRVlXjUeUwT1wzYl5ewFkKZUebGDd8xFx1Ev4iDoy6VV1aynrVairQQEEtmliCiptFGwDONTDWNmDWYyGz6FpJFIcHfAYtTsG1ZymXTze3vllkBC-2SEX_iu9BMIWsaRi-3piOe5SU99CAQmZM7Kbc_Ir-qMRsqXTUq9fR4pijlXnqLRuLuJ6QkVUOsL-v7E7fkMiVai33XXOOGv-tS2Huo5htj1e7im44TePHLwo5nvereUxzU_XS7PY6BCm2rUaOtA4VzoW2_VvSiadY-AmWaygOtfTCv_6K-2sXvhRyPyLFkedcEHRizkqLaza-mnxveGdv4xQAHySVGTwF1Rnmxq8CUuvxlYr7VAixe-j-TOmNUUSDZj_c9uPOKFl1eLOOl2Vlirbu6emsIBFZW3QAHmJCeTum8cBiywI7FpTunj3u_Xc2ZuGKOYiCUwbHWUlmA%3D)

It finally happened.

Anonymous **Dark Money Democrat** **groups** are officially spending money in AZ-05 to attack me. The radical left is promising **Trump’s IMPEACHMENT** if they flip the House this fall. And now, they’re making renewed calls to abolish ICE and law enforcement.

On top of all that, fellow Patriot, donations have slowed to a halt. I get it. It’s January. People are less engaged. People are recovering from the holidays.

[**But the urgency of this particular moment in the year can not be understated. Our January mid-month deadline is critical for two reasons:**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=18a26192b41f47cc841948814554691c&_e=_-0HmaMdoVknOfjS9DI6or2q0fgkh9wWQGRijP6PLm_Vf108xbZagoPPhvt_5aS3_djG46HmifkJZU0VwLQVFM-u9aQ9YVYKNM7LfdCwyOUiYErGyuYkCnsmxXN79xokHUQKk8laxGNjy_qiFbj4UtJwpWG1WGL6O9XCNLcLjVZn7-F8o3e3twtTz9GKLC0neaaiJuzvdxSNT8kEciWmuFVGiF47bd-dqvzXlAwVDRWCN230_iyHRUFq-Ta_V8mg3KH66_Z0Bupz8ncd8WtT4LNP1YWp3LToDC7kzlml49zis9wIvzPai59pbG2VW7QXTbuxCQGRyPeFIGHgokM8V9wU9xFEbB8uPpFJktJjRmGQcekmhOZVcDxQzQTejimjuFRuKW_SAgQj3jFua_O8AhrOQvR9CcKEt6eRvej-iiHHkUHgw3WwfpYoYzRAy9M8jwUraV5L4fixmjUjoRdA2jZWmuSYkDwkCPxcz2c0TlgJxwXj4bbFdOloVJ1pEucPa1LWwwtltKaSJrebI3zFS3-aqebXQqXuUkZ3dRidlG8rdQ0OSmkGxeOStGwY8ZD3cxpf6L5T3_mv9arWf4kt79PJELdbtMhx8P9RYoQ8njUHXIt_1WIbmrIjlP6en7a_sUuKFUQBkYGfgzEFA0-PNCYyYDQ4klo4eBuFcy6yHCw%3D)

1. We have the opportunity to start the year off strong with momentum to carry us to victory, and that takes financial resources.
2. My campaign team is planning our budget this years budget around ground game operations, media ad buys, and get out the vote efforts.

[**With so much going on, with so much at stake, I’m counting on you, fellow Patriot, to get us over the finish line tonight and hit our critical mid-month goal.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=18a26192b41f47cc841948814554691c&_e=_-0HmaMdoVknOfjS9DI6or2q0fgkh9wWQGRijP6PLm_Vf108xbZagoPPhvt_5aS3_djG46HmifkJZU0VwLQVFM-u9aQ9YVYKNM7LfdCwyOUiYErGyuYkCnsmxXN79xokHUQKk8laxGNjy_qiFbj4UtJwpWG1WGL6O9XCNLcLjVZn7-F8o3e3twtTz9GKLC0neaaiJuzvdxSNT8kEciWmuFVGiF47bd-dqvzXlAwVDRXYe4EwSipxfIRb5K_6TYYLW7pdAD3pExzdjWw1OnHo2YUJuMl_xg3BAxSUcu6pUEFC7zJQ7piSFQ2q9l0yltP_huO9crjPreGRrlSVsuaNNf4p48FwiM6VXKBuXN3Wcl5yjVopRLGIOKRjP1T6TxCZHWJ4wV4rEpV81rpP20M3zSFQnazrhJAOFoB-3pmk3Om-4i9VxrKKD58PAHuk5Lb0Wky_aH_JBmuQXf4m9Tpewh6_pqkstaN1CkHV1RzOlQ9yKpsA0LBMkAXeQ6MqCoq7bqXad1zZbdAl5PHOPfq-q2aGH9lfiwRIv_x0PCjwHErycJlbv84fiArMavwVyouaxfVEpSo1inG-rZDB-0mYg7KuLdftvMdRyn1SIPIE_f_3ti4nuPYk93QWXZLKGvm-c2TETNuSpayLBPaGQNOaopYoGwGGHpSPsXUdYPo10Ro%3D)

For a lot of folks, it’s the high cost of housing or groceries. Or skyrocketing healthcare premiums. Or the lack of affordable access to child care or higher education. Or maybe it’s working multiple jobs and still not being able to get by. And this list could go on.
As a working class guy who’s had every job from dishwasher to bartender to warehouse worker, I’ve lived a lot of these challenges personally. I know how tough it is out there.
**The truth is that the career politicians in DC have let us down. Too many of them (like my opponent Ryan Mackenzie) have sold working people out to support a corporate agenda.**
I finally said enough was enough. Now I’m running for Congress to unrig this messed up political system. Let’s make Washington work for us, not a small group of billionaires. [**I encourage you to check out our full platform here if you haven’t yet seen it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123528459/595746544/72583136?refcode=email_011726_priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjAxOTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzlkZmYxZDctZTNmMy1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAwZDNhNTRiNTYwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DuqjRxDDNAbYirBS0ubhguqDLU1fNCA5lXm3KdwUCFo=&emci=29d0f56f-baf3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&emdi=79dff1d7-e3f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&ceid=19805167)

clean_body: Peter, Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate. But here's the thing... ... None of that matters unless EVERY Republican completes and verifies their Voter Profile for 2026. We can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we 'll lose to the Democrats. Thank you, Voter Verification Questionnaire 2026 Polling Team ********** ** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

body:
| | | **Former President Biden is battling cancer - a target Trump can’t resist.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQspAbPSpPuaj1jgwGWpjiBAgePscIpYXv9ygB3e1J1-ofldDfPIzOIMQlLP18Jn8YfPrSiKcHWzFOI4FSzpp06aOSSDszvH7KlnsDbuG1H15P9MnEFNqjj5QG7k3gDcAs8dad8WnF1rqQcGTh9u_TdcIvyipF0L4wrm-JimkHDwwyWIl70MFIcyOUS7w6Cc756nc7rjUsEpAE7o5fPny6qDTp7d0kAgnP-UVJzx9IU1HM8xYvDUyG9eHe2iY2-QCCc7ZEwhGyMyqoDfL1Gz87Cq24VACwl-k6fgFIdHO1oU8k8P5oRG7auvjIebirWRTBYHqgE3GkQH2HOq9hXxFkvfJBAUOSsswFMQXifgl4aUIaihsZyG4LjErNkUO9_DSHuwV4u5jesX0p24l5VNYkJ-E/4nd/MFd6nViWRhmRg_Wx6uDUMw/h0/h001.OUpFNPX1r-2wRgRIyKhaCXSakLG_vM3xRZl0Vii2VlQ)**[Pitch in today to STOP this ableist creep.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQshfxOMHBXLnsHYw0j60qSdRgDiMik5t7pSMY0qu0aw9THQ9bGsQR8G2U9-_AZkLFcQMlSqXuT9MhLKVGHE6w0nTFTq3q_ZZsADLU_zY9yWFnNG825nfyVVsvK4EwvwfRgoEzik2T5UlXOxgH7mPGs0_aYXwXd9jEvY4blvwdKfDRqv-0libfKQP5XoC8s8p5ZfIDgQ2TFweHsxreIFKDWE0HYXgblxZoaiB3GrXJXrfCUtZm_XLiggc4aQfHAmHp9C3vwmSeU4sWHvhJlOO-2o2rHL4ai5ruwpQB-kFiTIMBH3xB9B6c1uSobfKowBCUJd-x_DBnWLTEM05dV44wTyJZBGrWHk49eB20BIz-sVtblf0Kk78NjsVhk3gS9XQHzXbMmpz76zxEF9wH-Hm2X3w/4nd/MFd6nViWRhmRg_Wx6uDUMw/h1/h001.AD70EPHSBYrzn28aC7XNZqxoFjcz28WO3JV0lMWm538)**
* * *
We’ve seen it before, and we’re seeing it again. At a recent rally, Donald Trump mocked former President Joe Biden, who is currently battling cancer, with a cruel impression and baseless claims. For the millions of us living with disabilities or facing serious illness, this rhetoric is more than just an insult; it’s a direct attack on our dignity. **Do we really think Donald Trump and his administration will help our community when he laughs at and belittles us at every opportunity?** From mocking reporters and disparaging those with health challenges to cutting programs we rely on to survive, Trump’s brand of ableism has no place in leadership. At Able Dems, we believe disability is not a punchline, it is a perspective that belongs in the halls of power. **We are building a bench of leaders who lead with empathy and policy, not derision. But we cannot fight back against this ableist machine alone.** **Will you chip in $10 or more today to help us elect candidates who will end this cycle of hate?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | Former President Biden is battling cancer - a target Trump can’t resist. We’ve seen it before, and we’re seeing it again. At a recent rally, Donald Trump mocked former President Joe Biden, who is currently battling cancer, with a cruel impression and baseless claims. For the millions of us living with disabilities or facing serious illness, this rhetoric is more than just an insult; it’s a direct attack on our dignity. Do we really think Donald Trump and his administration will help our community when he laughs at and belittles us at every opportunity? From mocking reporters and disparaging those with health challenges to cutting programs we rely on to survive, Trump’s brand of ableism has no place in leadership. At Able Dems, we believe disability is not a punchline, it is a perspective that belongs in the halls of power. We are building a bench of leaders who lead with empathy and policy, not derision. But we cannot fight back against this ableist machine alone. Will you chip in $10 or more today to help us elect candidates who will end this cycle of hate?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Let’s prove our community is stronger than his mockery. \- Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Robert Garcia
subject: Epstein Files
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
I’m done waiting for the truth
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123529241/595749116/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzk5MjI0ZS1lOGYzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zZgy7qM5uYZLOOFACvBlUXIxHWEmFlIIolBcdMIQ1FA=)
The Department of Justice is slow-walking the truth — and we’re done waiting.
Last week, my colleagues on the House Oversight Committee and I formally demanded that Attorney General Pam Bondi testify before Congress.
Why? _**Because the DOJ is refusing to comply with the law.**_
Congress passed the Epstein Files Transparency Act to ensure the public finally gets answers. The Oversight Committee issued a subpoena months ago. And yet the DOJ has released less than 1% of what they admit are millions of documents — while offering shifting explanations about what even exists and why it hasn’t been produced.
**That’s not transparency. That’s obstruction.**
Every day the DOJ keeps these files hidden is another day the law is being ignored and survivors are being disrespected. So we’re escalating.
We’ve already moved to subpoena key Epstein associates. And now we’re demanding that Pam Bondi come before Congress, under oath, to explain why her department is failing to follow the law.
But make no mistake — this fight isn’t easy. The forces working to bury this are powerful, well-funded, and counting on the public to lose interest.

clean_body: I’m done waiting for the truth = The Department of Justice is slow-walking the truth — and we’re done waiting. Last week, my colleagues on the House Oversight Committee and I formally demanded that Attorney General Pam Bondi testify before Congress. Why? Because the DOJ is refusing to comply with the law. Congress passed the Epstein Files Transparency Act to ensure the public finally gets answers. The Oversight Committee issued a subpoena months ago. And yet the DOJ has released less than 1% of what they admit are millions of documents — while offering shifting explanations about what even exists and why it hasn’t been produced. That’s not transparency. That’s obstruction. Every day the DOJ keeps these files hidden is another day the law is being ignored and survivors are being disrespected. So we’re escalating. We’ve already moved to subpoena key Epstein associates. And now we’re demanding that Pam Bondi come before Congress, under oath, to explain why her department is failing to follow the law. But make no mistake — this fight isn’t easy. The forces working to bury this are powerful, well-funded, and counting on the public to lose interest. = = We’re not backing down. And we’re not letting this disappear. Robert Garcia = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

name: Team Mallory
subject: What climate action means for Michigan
body:
[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?t=1001&akid=3826%2E898137%2E0xWW0T ][IMG]

Hi friend,

We’re bringing back our Mallory on the Issues series — starting with
climate.

This isn’t abstract or theoretical. It’s about jobs, manufacturing, and
the future of communities across Michigan. And Michigan just took a real
hit:

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-202601-Endorse/?refcode=AU_MAM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&t=1002&akid=3826%2E898137%2E0xWW0T ][IMG]

As a result of these canceled grants, Michanders will lose out on real
jobs and major investments in projects designed to make our communities
more climate-resilient.

Mallory knows that we can take on the climate crisis and grow Michigan’s
economy at the same time, and she has been one of the strongest voices on
climate in any statehouse in the country.

In Mallory’s view, climate isn’t just environmental — it’s economic. She
has:

* Helped secure passage of the Clean Energy & Jobs Act, positioning
Michigan with the strongest clean energy legislation in the Midwest.
* Led on policies that have made Michigan #6 in the nation for clean
energy jobs.
* Introduced “polluter pay” legislation to hold bad actors and
corporations accountable for egregious pollution of Michigan’s water
and air.
* Increased funding for the removal of lead service lines throughout the
state to protect Michigan’s water and keep residents healthy.

This is the kind of work that doesn’t make headlines every day, but it
makes a real difference to families in every corner of this state.

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-202601-Endorse/?refcode=AU_MAM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=3826%2E898137%2E0xWW0T ]If you’re with Mallory in this fight to build a cleaner and more
climate-resilient Michigan, will you sign on to endorse her campaign
today?

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-202601-Endorse/?refcode=AU_MAM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=3826%2E898137%2E0xWW0T ]ENDORSE MALLORY

Thank you!

— Team Mallory

PS: If you have a story to share with our campaign about how this is
impacting you, Mallory would like to hear it. [ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-202601-Endorse/?refcode=AU_MAM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=3826%2E898137%2E0xWW0T ]You can share your story
here.

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-jan2026.Z4k7f1&refcode=AU_MAM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=3826%2E898137%2E0xWW0T ]DONATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3826%2E898137%2E0xWW0T

body:
They came for my father. Then they took Charlie.| | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6a04063b8c564685b750406e08bdc018&_e=oK1-BOWqmoBUpdZtb38FJp8vsDJGtNv_eUiCbvM19ETtuYVuDb_VjUv2bCGXrB1yNScwr66VoP1bJkaeuDYUvlXdou3f5I7mzbdYjUy-7-ZT9tsptqGLcoYg3YOOuqaijzPr8RSDJBQ7mfE8qQe4dMWhHgggKorYkFohvYkYLkqbg0D9H-KtHngpG69WyP3CPN5zaYxJbaXDLUYaVmmtA5xJ1XyeGtwoe_futHX2eC03xGXFlXu_j7njDsk18Nt-Y5W2mdSqrCHhfrcA-v0dW40MID5tK_Ilti6cGtOdqd9iUb_ZBqvBcS34X2B-V423v5ZYe4zEiFBU9BrHIgdnBCKW8d-bg3p2pHh2XIGyDQo4ePaeOVD4m-NM3oDbtKalR4ndZIr17LRlKV7P8Bd-oIOKj-XZr9od_ZAnSAdaTSjoVzQPyds58eEl7tknPFS0b16WznAqa4Zr8twM6OdA_98IAomskQaa8-7Nd3CN7q4F_8vTGF3yyYETQbQAJ3RdKZvYbbhNSzIpYL9oZOGdKZc8vRvA33LQebt2GMxb7xqlBU78gPSkqFdLiVwmPr-wGeFs3umcQXSulYLA_99opjQdwZbUpp_1R5v3CHijnzEIPVJb36YybBFkgMJy3irJCcMR-xmPPjEzdxdqrUknN67zEesP3lq_JbsNz4DHcRRG5iN0hIi1by1VtZTzMNOSfmS0Ornnj34x_Wvroo8B2lUx0RWgJMDRo9jQvQAx1hA%3D)
---
Patriot, In the wake of the assassination attempt on my father's life - and the assassination of my friend Charlie Kirk - the opposition has made things clear:

**Violence is all they have left.** They don't want to talk. Or debate. Because they know they'll lose. So how do we as patriots live in an America where so many people openly despise us... and wish us harm? Well, that's something the Trump family knows a lot about. In fact, I've had so many people ask me how our family has endured living under constant attack for a decade that I decided to write a book about it. **It 's called _Under Siege: My Family 's Fight to Save Our Nation._**_ _
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6a04063b8c564685b750406e08bdc018&_e=oK1-BOWqmoBUpdZtb38FJp8vsDJGtNv_eUiCbvM19ETtuYVuDb_VjUv2bCGXrB1yNScwr66VoP1bJkaeuDYUvlXdou3f5I7mzbdYjUy-7-ZT9tsptqGLcoYg3YOOuqaijzPr8RSDJBQ7mfE8qQe4dMWhHgggKorYkFohvYkYLkqbg0D9H-KtHngpG69WyP3CPN5zaYxJbaXDLUYaVmmtA5xJ1XyeGtwoe_futHX2eC03xGXFlXu_j7njDsk18Nt-Y5W2mdSqrCHhfrcA-v0dW8tJKQ3SW-qz0xaQM8S7KNHQn5uYHQBM2ZcXZRnwXvAnPtiJ2cClVzkF_dtiGdt7050E5c6Yrng6mGBDXfDcxuV85CLTcgEWniBaVt0KNJW7bplFr8pgtTzTmNOiqbLDDKjSW_CiH_M-a1Kew-3yHtZeZEIMvC-xdMPFV3Xdxtfy_lJjxWsJt-a0dZxTtomp4uEWXE-Wr9LIYGeCZRRWDojLJXv7SVnf3uDPNsx62pIN_BXd05zsxzjDB68CJ7PDOmCM8XpgNMtvrONik3i494svFqOi118QELW45QzsEoXv767476EI1VhCNWCXSaZRghq-nt9OtKhJmmoWUsZomXbaeotC2C7cC9WrAal-P7lwSt0SLbCdfiKFlX9hadJf7mOboKKpiz8OtuOGKyxArxPIRqSIztNt7l-uIeH1_VRjmzxVcsfUwo3H-TyhmyNN2O3dYYEeYjwDmsL8vE5TlWI%3D)
---
Written before Charlie was taken from us, this book already highlighted that America is truly under siege. Now with him gone, I believe it's more relevant than ever. I'd like to send you a copy, Patriot. Because we all need to know how to look evil in the eye - and overcome it.
---
[ **Yes, Eric! Send Me Your Book >>**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6a04063b8c564685b750406e08bdc018&_e=oK1-BOWqmoBUpdZtb38FJp8vsDJGtNv_eUiCbvM19ETtuYVuDb_VjUv2bCGXrB1yNScwr66VoP1bJkaeuDYUvlXdou3f5I7mzbdYjUy-7-ZT9tsptqGLcoYg3YOOuqaijzPr8RSDJBQ7mfE8qQe4dMWhHgggKorYkFohvYkYLkqbg0D9H-KtHngpG69WyP3CPN5zaYxJbaXDLUYaVmmtA5xJ1XyeGtwoe_futHX2eC03xGXFlXu_j7njDsk18Nt-Y5W2mdSqrCHhfrcA-v0dW-aLWG6mkCWYB7a7Lieh1X5BbI8-lfDVRksxkLRZ0503Wix45Dv34xvAWxVKBFA_kVq244pul7-4j2Jy7O1rNe1N0RCjKhw0LJB0s5-GqjtKmkSNLh3k6-uaaHsTUnoZCSnuVoVn1Mzo13cn9ZMbn79Ejpj9lnj-zqVgXweLXYt997nTMvyP4Fxqd2P0xTyX3IlJJNmRgDWUC0GdYVTeE65EqHyVKnXrcX6NW-I2EndvUjnZDvBkmRo1Jp-gET_2YF0T0PDuBdz9_Pct07UsqAK-zEss-UhkwXd6G8uckSeJS5GwssGVTYAkQGdiRmd7mAA6Nunry_mZYwAdjlP9v5aA1YcNlF3AhGSREGdLFWL6aMIPwE_6QcBXsadmutFyzxES4hmdjXaVxBTWTtHjTKVEM0wGdZgJTSHJNya7fbFJOEzWI3eturo3t1sTtC6Dai4Qov_l1N06kFzf2ceeXWU%3D)
---
That's what patriots did in the days and weeks after Charlie's murder. And it's what my family did after my father was almost assassinated last year in Butler, Pennsylvania. That day I was watching the rally at home. Both my 4-year-old daughter and my 6-year-old son were sitting on my lap. We stared in shock at the TV as "Grandpa" dropped to the ground behind the podium. I remember thinking that he was gone. But the worst attacks on my dad have resulted in his greatest triumphs. **When he stood up with blood running down his face, pumped his fist in the air, and challenged us to "Fight! Fight! Fight!" you and I witnessed a "turning point" in American history.** Sometimes I can't believe what we've all been through. Not just my dad and the entire Trump family... but all of us patriotic Americans. Think about it: _The millions of illegals dumped off in our small towns and cities..._ _The "mail-in ballots" and rigged census numbers..._ _Billions of our tax dollars laundered through fake "USAID" programs to rig elections and fund left-wing propaganda..._ It was all designed to break us. Demoralize us. **And silence us.** We watched as Steve Bannon and Peter Navarro were marched off to prison... As our schools and churches were shut down. **Members of the Legacy Media repeatedly call us "fascists" and "Nazis" for supporting my dad. ** But you know, when he stood up after that assassin's bullet tore through his ear, I think it clicked for millions of people: Donald Trump will fight with his last breath to save this nation. It was a moment of true courage and true leadership. And it spurred a generation of young men and women who've been told their whole lives that there's nothing good about this nation to suddenly stand up a little taller and say, "Donald Trump is right. America is worth fighting for." **Charlie Kirk reached millions of Americans with the same message. A message of courage, hard work, and Christian values that cost him his life.** Under Charlie's leadership, **Turning Point Action** became the top group, training, and organizing conservatives to promote freedom across the country. And that's not going to stop. Charlie's wife, Erika, has vowed to make sure that Turning Point Action will become stronger, bolder, louder, and greater than ever before. _Charlie 's voice will become millions of voices._ I'm proud to be one of them. That's why I'm writing you on behalf of Turning Point Action today. Thirteen years ago when Charlie looked at our college campuses, he saw teenagers from good, Christian, conservative homes being indoctrinated with leftist contempt for America. And he realized, just like my dad did, that America was going to be destroyed from the inside out unless our young people were taught to love this country again... the way our grandparents were. **Turning Point Action is inspiring a new wave of conservatism across our country.** It's why my dad believes in Turning Point Action. Because Donald Trump knows that one administration alone can't save this nation. We need millions of Americans to have their own "turning point" moment and realize that our country will survive only if citizens value freedom more than left-wing Socialism and race-baiting politics. The attacks on my father and Charlie are proof that the Left wants to destroy this nation. **Patriot will join with me in supporting Turning Point Action by sending a one-time gift of any amount today?** Just as light pushes back darkness, a stronger Turning Point Action will defeat the America haters. [**I’ll send you a hardback copy of Under Siege as my personal thanks for your gift of $50 or more today.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6a04063b8c564685b750406e08bdc018&_e=oK1-BOWqmoBUpdZtb38FJp8vsDJGtNv_eUiCbvM19ETtuYVuDb_VjUv2bCGXrB1yNScwr66VoP1bJkaeuDYUvlXdou3f5I7mzbdYjUy-7-ZT9tsptqGLcoYg3YOOuqaijzPr8RSDJBQ7mfE8qQe4dMWhHgggKorYkFohvYkYLkqbg0D9H-KtHngpG69WyP3CPN5zaYxJbaXDLUYaVmmtA5xJ1XyeGtwoe_futHX2eC03xGXFlXu_j7njDsk18Nt-Y5W2mdSqrCHhfrcA-v0dW-EgGzOFC1tTBqcssUiJyzex9fjJss67RLZRuLwesa_v3zLGmj7_3e3Ufm3qxhEpHUbBAklqjQmEhYdZklTcNLTJmw8sHqE1owoZXGl1WApZq-iPneJUJQ00R1RA80kqW2ir-0Vxxpa8Jts_W3ZGetA7zCJrTmsclN-kc0PkZMbroCeey0ZObGNixyYzT9AcukwDYf1aw9lFaXaCy1-63XNrfQHHJC8ZD-TL-H9BHXTqPYqyocT91taJLOk6r7QxOOdvT-2d0TRXMQWt_acRhRcdlxUOSqo_EG_scws1sj3Ku5zbEJ0-qFvaQ47IUVAY2d5xHAUFMzievSO10gLmmzdMx8qPpusiGyNd2WABy1KL32i4r0Pls29Hh2zYxDsVwHq2iP0QHwydVgz6iOQf8oaud18B98NRWENEA2I8I5RCs6tgQbB8lzkxwvDlpcngmp07aXop-r2RNAX7Ji2uBYA%3D)
---
[ **Support Turning Point Action &
** **Claim Your Copy of “Under Siege”**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6a04063b8c564685b750406e08bdc018&_e=oK1-BOWqmoBUpdZtb38FJp8vsDJGtNv_eUiCbvM19ETtuYVuDb_VjUv2bCGXrB1yNScwr66VoP1bJkaeuDYUvlXdou3f5I7mzbdYjUy-7-ZT9tsptqGLcoYg3YOOuqaijzPr8RSDJBQ7mfE8qQe4dMWhHgggKorYkFohvYkYLkqbg0D9H-KtHngpG69WyP3CPN5zaYxJbaXDLUYaVmmtA5xJ1XyeGtwoe_futHX2eC03xGXFlXu_j7njDsk18Nt-Y5W2mdSqrCHhfrcA-v0dWyLoD-WBivsVCLcvYxc8Rva6q7VTumqasg99GJqMraqqzau3O5nLqRKejGxg4WvNkOUH51-Sw8HHZ7VJoRFjysBFKr2Hg5P2vRKdX-1SM8Lf4lkRfyHQ0MTfXV1Y5rvlYNmgYX_UWH-bzhG3snNQFF5SWyrUlPQfHlZceW4Xyuso840-ydG0ygw2CFIK_SpuaoR9FdjcI9FYaGVT26SUcwzRGtkpghtRKoAA4POFaQCcfM03wQl1IDHhoRpTQz1Pz_TshTAOzqOhR8H8p3Q5BFGF1pJQmXRjElkbqedLb3xXDYNaqAan8r9b4FmmUyJ2AI37EKxqFnNn195xzbrvlBgZ3LQqFHIa1_dsMFYev_DbGCtB2eOqX-SlLQjKyRSrdZGXugPag4fMGPeOGHijo84Yh3ijsBR07a8sTUdVc1Pdba2Pf8eJJ27cB4lfCERmiFBd3F3ulHPfZULPL4F_qoI%3D)

Charlie was taken from us - **but**** ****his**** mission****lives on in us****.** His courage is an example to all of us. So is his patriotism. Thank you for helping Turning Point Action ensure that everything he fought for - and everything our forefathers fought for - will endure for future generations.
---
**For Charlie & America,****Eric Trump**
On behalf of Turning Point Action
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6a04063b8c564685b750406e08bdc018&_e=oK1-BOWqmoBUpdZtb38FJp8vsDJGtNv_eUiCbvM19ETtuYVuDb_VjUv2bCGXrB1yNScwr66VoP1bJkaeuDYUvlXdou3f5I7mzbdYjUy-7-ZT9tsptqGLcoYg3YOOuqaijzPr8RSDJBQ7mfE8qQe4dMWhHgggKorYkFohvYkYLkqbg0D9H-KtHngpG69WyP3CPN5zaYxJbaXDLUYaVmmtA5xJ1XyeGtwoe_futHX2eC03xGXFlXu_j7njDsk18Nt-Y5W2mdSqrCHhfrcA-v0dW3xBKW4P8ph72TSlNeFyqM8sknCdhNCb4uNLDlHHprenEBvoPR_WbqmpnKtm9SiXGInkfXLeDw6dRXYo6jdGosjYbi8OGN5ny2CWfigvyHVACYZ3yqkUeU2TpkABXkICqAyqwKnF7goGnfMG2ZWP1K7jGejRvkA54gF20_8_6-6lF2d3o3bFd7d4J0W8N4Yzu1HQ2tdN4dWXhbnaGi4tY3gnLPTMYfCuw4__Tej-YQxhhdwk3KpeTUlAVr4dNqXn8m93BEtL93WAAQKdk7zmnO-7UH9gFFeNlfYdqErQ-RRatrzGHQIb_3KOP6e-kWVKp6r2qD-whOSxs-r4LxDYQ2puODXUx1IhhnlNxx2NWb51bCpVdSY4SEJpIvskuiSHxleTi9zAg-FVFyLDrL_RG-ORuGz9I0mZo238oA7PucYa3fCrdWNsKGpkoucfGYmqjgf7NK7Me8GDk9Ywr0xp5bs%3D)

**P.S.** We were all under siege. And I hope my book reminds you that evil will not prevail when patriots stand together. clean_body: They came for my father. Then they took Charlie.| | | Patriot, In the wake of the assassination attempt on my father's life - and the assassination of my friend Charlie Kirk - the opposition has made things clear: Violence is all they have left. They don't want to talk. Or debate. Because they know they'll lose. So how do we as patriots live in an America where so many people openly despise us... and wish us harm? Well, that's something the Trump family knows a lot about. In fact, I've had so many people ask me how our family has endured living under constant attack for a decade that I decided to write a book about it. It 's called Under Siege: My Family 's Fight to Save Our Nation. Written before Charlie was taken from us, this book already highlighted that America is truly under siege. Now with him gone, I believe it's more relevant than ever. I'd like to send you a copy, Patriot. Because we all need to know how to look evil in the eye - and overcome it. That's what patriots did in the days and weeks after Charlie's murder. And it's what my family did after my father was almost assassinated last year in Butler, Pennsylvania. That day I was watching the rally at home. Both my 4-year-old daughter and my 6-year-old son were sitting on my lap. We stared in shock at the TV as "Grandpa" dropped to the ground behind the podium. I remember thinking that he was gone. But the worst attacks on my dad have resulted in his greatest triumphs. When he stood up with blood running down his face, pumped his fist in the air, and challenged us to "Fight! Fight! Fight!" you and I witnessed a "turning point" in American history. Sometimes I can't believe what we've all been through. Not just my dad and the entire Trump family... but all of us patriotic Americans. Think about it: The millions of illegals dumped off in our small towns and cities... The "mail-in ballots" and rigged census numbers... Billions of our tax dollars laundered through fake "USAID" programs to rig elections and fund left-wing propaganda... It was all designed to break us. Demoralize us. And silence us. We watched as Steve Bannon and Peter Navarro were marched off to prison... As our schools and churches were shut down. Members of the Legacy Media repeatedly call us "fascists" and "Nazis" for supporting my dad. But you know, when he stood up after that assassin's bullet tore through his ear, I think it clicked for millions of people: Donald Trump will fight with his last breath to save this nation. It was a moment of true courage and true leadership. And it spurred a generation of young men and women who've been told their whole lives that there's nothing good about this nation to suddenly stand up a little taller and say, "Donald Trump is right. America is worth fighting for." Charlie Kirk reached millions of Americans with the same message. A message of courage, hard work, and Christian values that cost him his life. Under Charlie's leadership, Turning Point Action became the top group, training, and organizing conservatives to promote freedom across the country. And that's not going to stop. Charlie's wife, Erika, has vowed to make sure that Turning Point Action will become stronger, bolder, louder, and greater than ever before. Charlie 's voice will become millions of voices. I'm proud to be one of them. That's why I'm writing you on behalf of Turning Point Action today. Thirteen years ago when Charlie looked at our college campuses, he saw teenagers from good, Christian, conservative homes being indoctrinated with leftist contempt for America. And he realized, just like my dad did, that America was going to be destroyed from the inside out unless our young people were taught to love this country again... the way our grandparents were. Turning Point Action is inspiring a new wave of conservatism across our country. It's why my dad believes in Turning Point Action. Because Donald Trump knows that one administration alone can't save this nation. We need millions of Americans to have their own "turning point" moment and realize that our country will survive only if citizens value freedom more than left-wing Socialism and race-baiting politics. The attacks on my father and Charlie are proof that the Left wants to destroy this nation. Patriot will join with me in supporting Turning Point Action by sending a one-time gift of any amount today? Just as light pushes back darkness, a stronger Turning Point Action will defeat the America haters. Charlie was taken from us - but his missionlives on in us. His courage is an example to all of us. So is his patriotism. Thank you for helping Turning Point Action ensure that everything he fought for - and everything our forefathers fought for - will endure for future generations. For Charlie & America,Eric Trump On behalf of Turning Point Action P.S. We were all under siege. And I hope my book reminds you that evil will not prevail when patriots stand together. Thank you again for standing with the Trump family and all the patriots at Turning Point Action. And with Charlie. | | TURNING POINT ACTION, INC. name: Team Cooper
subject: Why is it SO HARD to get health care??
body:
We don’t have to live like this.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=360%2E124072%2EDARX5g)
Costs that keep going up. Claims that get denied. Surprise bills that derail your entire budget. Even just trying to see a doctor can be tough. **[Peter, we don’t have to live like this. If we work together, we can fix our broken health care system. And Roy is ready to be part of the solution in the U.S. Senate. So now, we want to hear from YOU — please tell us about your experiences trying to access health care.](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_HealthCareRoundtable_011726/?source=em_RC_PET_HealthCareRoundtable_011726&t=7&akid=360%2E124072%2EDARX5g)** At a recent health care roundtable, Roy discussed some of the issues Americans face when trying to get the care they need. Roy understands that just seeing a doctor can be a challenge. It’s why he worked so hard as governor to pass North Carolina’s Medicaid Expansion, which has now helped hundreds of thousands of working North Carolinians access health insurance. **Meanwhile, Michael Whatley proudly said he would have voted to gut Medicaid “in a heartbeat.”** **[We don’t need another band-aid on a broken system — we need a champion for health care in the Senate. So will you tell Roy about what it’s been like trying to get care?](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_HealthCareRoundtable_011726/?source=em_RC_PET_HealthCareRoundtable_011726&t=8&akid=360%2E124072%2EDARX5g)** | [SHARE YOUR STORY](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_HealthCareRoundtable_011726/?source=em_RC_PET_HealthCareRoundtable_011726&t=9&akid=360%2E124072%2EDARX5g)
---
Thank you for trusting us with your stories,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=360%2E124072%2EDARX5g)**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GmG8X-FQqH4GGeMLNMKa5d5QVfid0Z_Cw7ElxE22qrziJ7w5vcMYmUjNJQgoHnl9A6CVZtFe8tnWQs-8mDIHNq7ZexcnsFf4Tps1JKnkzUIjZw7K6zmWrO7IulDEvwZQ-VPnDJFxHQKX7FLT0tAmp0tPrIs9dRa7N3PMgN_YOLkxGLn0gTb9Jcfir_Sxc_uG7wlolqIbxkJBjv0knVOV8mOoe-pGq_En-hAMdlWK7D4=&c=6kNmLXV-cH-HYbHNzcWNB3bR81CLJwH-6Zbd06BYZE0UOOir7u2qCQ==&ch=FCpkCSu2UN2hKtUoTPqNu-0TpkqB2kVhnFOIf8rV1X-PI8gJ-uio-g==)
---
| Peter,
The first major election of 2026 is here and it is in Wisconsin...again.
After last year's blowout, Democrats hold a 4-3 majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. Now, another seat is open this April. If Democrats win, we expand that to a 5-2 majority and lock down the court until at least 2030.
MAGA knows what is at stake. In 2025 they tried to seize control of the courts in Wisconsin and Pennsylvania because those courts have the final say over election laws and election results. If they had succeeded, they would have had the power to rig 2026 and 2028 in their favor.
This April we can make sure Trump never has a chance to get his tiny, discolored hands on Wisconsin again.
MAGA's candidate in this election is Maria Lazar, and she's made her career pushing MAGA's most extreme policies. She fought for gerrymandering, voter ID, and abortion bans while working inside Wisconsin's DOJ.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GmG8X-FQqH4GGeMLNMKa5d5QVfid0Z_Cw7ElxE22qrziJ7w5vcMYmUjNJQgoHnl9A6CVZtFe8tnWQs-8mDIHNq7ZexcnsFf4Tps1JKnkzUIjZw7K6zmWrO7IulDEvwZQ-VPnDJFxHQKX7FLT0tAmp0tPrIs9dRa7N3PMgN_YOLkxGLn0gTb9Jcfir_Sxc_uG7wlolqIbxkJBjv0knVOV8kjdtVO-vAY3MrozbkY8X1g=&c=6kNmLXV-cH-HYbHNzcWNB3bR81CLJwH-6Zbd06BYZE0UOOir7u2qCQ==&ch=FCpkCSu2UN2hKtUoTPqNu-0TpkqB2kVhnFOIf8rV1X-PI8gJ-uio-g==)
---
Anti abortion. Pro gerrymandering. Pro voter suppression. A nightmare for democracy. This is a must win election for Democrats.
That's why Defend Our Courts is gearing up to make a major impact in this election. Last year MAGA tried to buy the Pennsylvania Supreme Court. We stopped them. Democrats won by 30 points and in Philly where we concentrated a majority of our efforts, turnout surged 34 percent, the biggest jump in the state.
Now we are taking the same winning formula to Wisconsin.
But we are worried. This race is flying under the radar and MAGA is already moving. We emptied our war chest to win Pennsylvania and now we have just four months to get ready for April. We cannot let Republicans sneak in and take control of a court that decides who gets to vote and whose votes count.
[If you believe in fair elections, reproductive freedom, and stopping Trump's power grab, we need you in this fight right now. Will you rush a donation of $25, $15, or whatever you can spare to help Defend Our Courts start strong in Wisconsin?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GmG8X-FQqH4GGeMLNMKa5d5QVfid0Z_Cw7ElxE22qrziJ7w5vcMYmUjNJQgoHnl96uGFBiDXUyXUO87TNhEcvSfXHhevSxaLQ-GDzkKwjA3vyRocOlsPuf4qyTxlyrL8TtVeR-RshZXa8mAZdg2YWnQ0gt5YasCMEbfQVqi0SVRe75xVoww_NjgXsidrUNzbbUV1VlNbU2ziFagoy5hnjVbg6g0BgeVntXfX6a96PPBcnnb2OkU1Jw==&c=6kNmLXV-cH-HYbHNzcWNB3bR81CLJwH-6Zbd06BYZE0UOOir7u2qCQ==&ch=FCpkCSu2UN2hKtUoTPqNu-0TpkqB2kVhnFOIf8rV1X-PI8gJ-uio-g==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, The first major election of 2026 is here and it is in Wisconsin...again. After last year's blowout, Democrats hold a 4-3 majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. Now, another seat is open this April. If Democrats win, we expand that to a 5-2 majority and lock down the court until at least 2030. MAGA knows what is at stake. In 2025 they tried to seize control of the courts in Wisconsin and Pennsylvania because those courts have the final say over election laws and election results. If they had succeeded, they would have had the power to rig 2026 and 2028 in their favor. This April we can make sure Trump never has a chance to get his tiny, discolored hands on Wisconsin again. MAGA's candidate in this election is Maria Lazar, and she's made her career pushing MAGA's most extreme policies. She fought for gerrymandering, voter ID, and abortion bans while working inside Wisconsin's DOJ. | == Anti abortion. Pro gerrymandering. Pro voter suppression. A nightmare for democracy. This is a must win election for Democrats. That's why Defend Our Courts is gearing up to make a major impact in this election. Last year MAGA tried to buy the Pennsylvania Supreme Court. We stopped them. Democrats won by 30 points and in Philly where we concentrated a majority of our efforts, turnout surged 34 percent, the biggest jump in the state. Now we are taking the same winning formula to Wisconsin. But we are worried. This race is flying under the radar and MAGA is already moving. We emptied our war chest to win Pennsylvania and now we have just four months to get ready for April. We cannot let Republicans sneak in and take control of a court that decides who gets to vote and whose votes count. == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | | | | == | Thank you for your support, Team Defend our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE.

| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

President Trump's Border Czar,**Tom Homan** , says:
"The Heritage Foundation is the one truly patriotic organization I trust to fight for America's borders." Now, Heritage is working alongside the Trump team to implement a **policy blueprint for mass deportations** -- but we need proof that the American people stand behind it.

Your response to the **Official 2026 Mass Deportation Ballot** will show Washington that citizens want action -- not more excuses.

This is your chance to:
* Support President Trump's plan to deport illegal immigrants
* Demand an end to open borders
* Restore law and order across America

Make your voice heard before the deadline.

body:
Winning starts today
The outcome of 2026 will be decided by what happens right now -- in the opening weeks, when momentum is set and lines are drawn.

| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4d31e984d1e2490d9e9b6902b1c2798b&_e=QnvnGQ8GhdqxMFOopNbyGn3CssEO28xTVS3d-iWgyOPrbKpaWz0Q9a6m8ZcQcDUh8ySML1SZFbDXzObudqh1HTWDlOTdbiFpH_6hQ4XXKtTE6dP-oLLFlehAh9WNVlAz7CO0hePte2ZF-C1S-GLgLpb4RSGUq6S6PxF_Sq_P9wXtbVjfVSzrCrj4yHQInNr1w_EAOq0MJ0CVcUiaG39_AOFpoS8EySR6889YC8ISJg_ipI2xyv0Eze33sH6cRH9CU6yJMBe8DzkDwgN7-VTrIe12XRM2KQ3QFJFCSquZWFzMFhFaPlxxDT8x_q0D3LhRUX1aw9tzXx96cp6xgPZLkilBCwlOC23W7pSSlCG26pY-hc4mjV7wmLwOiL4pjd-FMGYcyav3C6HFpj0JHzwFDWNK9bOHdOIhC8MPMdDhgbeddThwk4dVXs8JhAATUrCBShTV3hk67ln7wTYrZzFU3LVPETUuSRrxE2-UDDjCUzEiSwh1_tp38ofWvRyxc1JKqjQeIRRj_mU4LKrEujnbWYW5-fINBZnmQCDhzyR3bMr1izPVc68OE1KdlL5FOsq4H2ve3cvYQ0emGddS6XeDl4hcwwBS91_CqcvI4XjV5HnEJ97fJln98K-YsqoXzwUf)

Patriot,

This is not a planning year... This is THE year - **Election Year.** The outcome of 2026 will be decided by what happens **_right now_** -- in the opening weeks, when momentum is set and lines are drawn. Charlie understood that election years don't reward hesitation. They reward movements that start strong, stay disciplined, and build early pressure while others are still catching their breath. **[That’s why Turning Point PAC is focused on hitting the ground running in 2026.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4d31e984d1e2490d9e9b6902b1c2798b&_e=QnvnGQ8GhdqxMFOopNbyGn3CssEO28xTVS3d-iWgyOPrbKpaWz0Q9a6m8ZcQcDUh8ySML1SZFbDXzObudqh1HTWDlOTdbiFpH_6hQ4XXKtTE6dP-oLLFlehAh9WNVlAz7CO0hePte2ZF-C1S-GLgLpb4RSGUq6S6PxF_Sq_P9wXtbVjfVSzrCrj4yHQInNr1w_EAOq0MJ0CVcUiaG39_ABtlC_L4Xnlvd_xROK1PJxFFTk5B9HgWuRC_j3l775LX-h3aca492IrQnS8vjqpShnp1WLUn1u5GULtmPH7g42G89zvcsaCBZQt8kmDBHvCcghptHSqi6tJc9R74HzDiBlmMEib_OHpiwViqka0lt_ppu2hoZcuNQm-g8pmcZn7TR4d0oaTwwTbbC8pE9ZREd8e50dPC7XakcOvc-B9FIdLTHFV7dvrBTt-zPaVf4ND2S8jgv4bE4N3FrKFkDLLPQPAWfwjUqeXCfqqyqWKhYhVOvh10AGOk4tpj3PzeWhcV_VzetI33s0G-QJoWE_5rUlQb1rSxfh17T_km5rSx0u8Wli_we2r70xEBzDkMOT4T5ykJwKTFcZNctddksQmQEI3Ah_pQJxc5qireHg6YaR8YLQ2-MZyStCKkfZ8rtw1H)**

Your support at the start of this year goes directly toward the work that will help win some of the most competitive races for the House and Senate:
---
* Expanding ballot-chasing operations in battleground states

* Deploying door knockers and voter-contact teams early, not late

* Locking in data, turnout infrastructure, and ground operations that can't be built at the last minute

---
**This is the work that separates winning movements from reactive ones.** The support received and decisions made now determine how much ground we cover, how effectively we compete, and whether the America First movement is setting the pace or trying to catch up. Strong starts **win **election years.
Weak starts _cost _them. **[Patriot, will you help us start the year off with strength and momentum by making your first New Year’s contribution of 2026 today?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4d31e984d1e2490d9e9b6902b1c2798b&_e=QnvnGQ8GhdqxMFOopNbyGn3CssEO28xTVS3d-iWgyOPrbKpaWz0Q9a6m8ZcQcDUh8ySML1SZFbDXzObudqh1HTWDlOTdbiFpH_6hQ4XXKtTE6dP-oLLFlehAh9WNVlAz7CO0hePte2ZF-C1S-GLgLpb4RSGUq6S6PxF_Sq_P9wXtbVjfVSzrCrj4yHQInNr1w_EAOq0MJ0CVcUiaG39_AFMFCON5-e2el48xGlk6Kfn31eLCQGAnj4K9QrYdyn_o-JVIhTz488fn3wx168UfXi-A749xuA6-VkfdGIiQy40O6hBNq5vGgKooieAZSNtXEusmSFGckUIxDM9qh-xNHo20esIArpfAWHY_yEVxAqb2evS5hcXefwhw3day0J3HWFVO9mduENgIVCxQ_rWanzIlu_gs3NpXFtJJw71hykD7HGJfGq6BJVh4dxPcZh9lc3LVEDdRoN6U9rmOByhi1Vx6RIcV3CWc6jGsY4ZzpSjHrkhM2a1jBrvF6wsnpnHCb2nN8uZZP6Iu_8UxDuAJkF6Vw2N1baKILtJr9_rutp4WatUfNvjXmSMFhzlJyuR7D4BWfCycAQ66N9JEi1bh_VCBK9mlxTgOw3LwlmWa9CRcw8jhWlJ27VSjZe6XxZBd)**

Your donation right now fuels the operations that matter most _in this election year_ -- while they can still shape the outcome. But let me be clear - **the right moment is ****_right now._** **[Please make your New Year’s donation today to help Turning Point PAC begin 2026 focused, fully engaged, and determined to win.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4d31e984d1e2490d9e9b6902b1c2798b&_e=QnvnGQ8GhdqxMFOopNbyGn3CssEO28xTVS3d-iWgyOPrbKpaWz0Q9a6m8ZcQcDUh8ySML1SZFbDXzObudqh1HTWDlOTdbiFpH_6hQ4XXKtTE6dP-oLLFlehAh9WNVlAz7CO0hePte2ZF-C1S-GLgLpb4RSGUq6S6PxF_Sq_P9wXtbVjfVSzrCrj4yHQInNr1w_EAOq0MJ0CVcUiaG39_AAeIWV5BPaCoxg0zHLUWcMsprkkIerL1D32fHcHbiBqVAWw-yCFRwp6x0ZZs6FwSKst5OklACMNtogUsOd_9wYmkuDbGjZwzC2OaVngN5mKfd9aQh_yBCRrf5MSqRP_Ogv-kDqDhlyBvgUcVljmlHOdhnNEUd5rFxdTndVvoaqNiKOiVM8ZpjR_zdeKiklybNOOYhr58UUY3adoReL4TFQEC0xssZz2iXdGuibJKhFa9Qbq3t1T1dgZY9RKcdLs6q1NsSFfkpxPZ5_O_FKONPLDDWDbKM-FgVuJugiid9zHhONQcd8-6_lKpeReF9P0Ux9KW6ViWxy3Oue9fkeqxVp7sASdJSZZKQnNMK57S1DEGNSBQCeetgy6SEh_Nvlj3Q49X395qIvR3H-1RQGZmLxMpGY_nKF6K7Ekg6ENVdxNQ)**

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than DirectContributions to Federal Committees) As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
