name: VAP Electoral College Team
subject: This system sucks and needs to be replaced
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
New Yorker: The Case for Dumping the Electoral College [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=011726_1&amount=25]
The Electoral College has been described as “ a loaded pistol pointed at our system of government. ” They warned that it created “a game of Russian roulette” because the way it distorts the will of the people could threaten our democracy.
We've already seen the popular vote loser win the White House five times, including twice in the last twenty years .
And this obtuse system of choosing a national leader led directly to the former President -- one of those five who lost the popular vote ( in 2016 ) but still won the office -- attempting to subvert the will of the people by twisting the Electoral College into a mess and when that didn't work, fomented a literal insurrection with supporters breaking into the Capitol Building to disrupt certification of the election.
Opponents of voting rights have shown they'll bend these rules and go to any length in order to win. RUSH $35 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=011726_1&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=011726_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=011726_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=011726_1&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=011726_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=011726_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=011726_1&amount=35]
The same anti-democracy forces that stormed the Capitol are back in power. The actions they are already taking are threatening our elections and our fundamental right to vote.
We MUST stop them from rigging the game in a handful of states and cementing their grip on power through this outdated system that prioritizes empty land and lines drawn on a map over equally counted votes and makes a vote in Montana worth more than a vote in California.
We're getting close to ending this once and for all! Put us over the top by supporting our efforts to end the Electoral College forever with $35 or more today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=011726_1&amount=35]
Onward,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] New Yorker: The Case for Dumping the Electoral College [] The Electoral College has been described as “ a loaded pistol pointed at our system of government. ” They warned that it created “a game of Russian roulette” because the way it distorts the will of the people could threaten our democracy. We've already seen the popular vote loser win the White House five times, including twice in the last twenty years . And this obtuse system of choosing a national leader led directly to the former President -- one of those five who lost the popular vote ( in 2016 ) but still won the office -- attempting to subvert the will of the people by twisting the Electoral College into a mess and when that didn't work, fomented a literal insurrection with supporters breaking into the Capitol Building to disrupt certification of the election. Opponents of voting rights have shown they'll bend these rules and go to any length in order to win. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Donald Trump refuses to accept the most basic principle of democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The people decide our leaders. Not the other way around.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260117-5823-footer&t=1&akid=5823%2E420207%2E2HbdTo)
Peter,
**This week Donald Trump doubled down on his disdain for democracy, claiming that “we shouldn’t even have an election” this November.**
And in recent weeks, he’s signed executive orders attempting to ban voting by mail — one of the most common ways that people cast their ballots, with some states (including my home state of WA!) voting almost _exclusively_ by mail.
Over and over again, Donald Trump has refused to accept the most basic principle of democracy: the _people_ decide our leaders. Not the other way around.
🗳️ **Mail-in ballots let people safely vote** without Trump’s thugs intimidating them in long lines.
🗳️ **People can vote on their schedule** — and still go to work, care for family, and live their lives.
🗳️ **Universal vote-by-mail raises voter turnout** by putting a ballot directly into every voter’s hands.
That’s why Trump hates it. I’m doing everything I can to continue holding Trump accountable for his actions on January 6th while also defending our democracy right now. But that work takes resources, and I’m counting on this people-powered movement — not billionaires or corporate PACs — to help me keep going.
[**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $3 or whatever you can to help me fight back against Trump’s authoritarian agenda, defend voting rights, and protect our democracy.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20260117.S8fwJ6&refcode=em20260117-5823&amount=3&t=2&akid=5823%2E420207%2E2HbdTo)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20260117.S8fwJ6&amount=3&refcode=em20260117-5823&t=21&akid=5823%2E420207%2E2HbdTo)**
Your contributions help me keep fighting in Congress, organize nonviolent resistance nationwide, and make it unmistakably clear that our democracy is not negotiable.
So thank you, Peter, for your support. Together, we will defend our democracy — and we will win.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260117-5823-footer&t=22&refcode2=5823_420207_2HbdTo&akid=5823%2E420207%2E2HbdTo)**

If you'd prefer, you can . Read below for a message from Marcy Kaptur's team. She's running in one of the closest races in Congress, and MAGA is seriously targeting her for defeat. Now that the No. 2 official at ICE is running against her, she needs your support to hold this critical seat. * Peter, This just happened. = = | | = A new Republican opponent has entered the race. She's the No. 2 official at ICE. She's as close an ally to Kristi Noem as it gets. Now, national Republicans are lining her up for Congress — in a district they just gerrymanded again last fall to try and tilt the playing field in their favor. That means outside GOP money is about to pour into this race. They see our district as a pickup opportunity, and they think they can buy this seat with MAGA cash while Republicans fight through a messy primary of their own making. Marcy has spent decades fighting for Northwest Ohio, not Washington insiders. While they focus on political games, she's focused on delivering real results: lowering costs for working families, protecting access to affordable health care, and bringing transformative investments home = | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for helping us take on what’s coming and defend Northwest Ohio. 1. Yesterday I opened [@EpochTimes ](https://substack.com/redirect/b53d5103-9c64-4529-846c-456316d33101?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and froze. They published my article--in print. Grateful. Humbled. Ready to keep going.
By Kathy Barnette
2. If the first week of 2026 is any indication of what lies ahead, we are in for a wild and bumpy ride - one that may prove to be among the most consequential years of our lives.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bbb82b12-d92e-4248-b43d-917ddcfb030f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
3. If you have health insurance, you know it's very expensive. One of the major drivers of health insurance costs is the complex "paperwork," or administrative burden of our system.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dba1ae00-ef76-43a7-a311-6ddc59e06ee8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
4. Kari Lake To Congress: Please Don't Give Us the Money
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dbb18579-2644-4411-9b21-58248e468cc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In this interview, Kari Lake said something I've never heard a bureaucrat say out loud: "Please don't give us the money." She's talking about shrinking government, not growing it -- and it's a direct challenge to the "more funding fixes everything" mindset.
5. What's really breaking MAGA apart -- and is the chaos organic or engineered?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ff3e7532-6677-480e-b06f-45890222fc01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
6. The CROWN Act Is a Scam: Josh Shapiro Gave Himself $4M and Gave Black Pennsylvanians Optics
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/200212a1-d542-43e0-900a-088f39e81122?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
7. I went on _The Sean Spicer Show_ with the fabulous [Batya Ungar-Sargon](https://open.substack.com/users/12423170-batya-ungar-sargon?utm_source=mentions) to speak some basic Truth. WATCH FULL VIDEO: **[HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/576d7ea4-a69f-404b-857f-6c881b3891cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Trump’s DOJ is coming after me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Folks, the Trump Administration sent the Department of Justice after me.**

Let that sink in. The president is weaponizing the DOJ against me and several of my colleagues—apparently because they don’t like their political opponents speaking up and stating the law.

He’s already called for us to be arrested, jailed, and even hanged. Now he’s sending the DOJ after us in this latest escalation of his growing intimidation campaigns against political rivals.

I first swore an oath to the Constitution as a 17-year-old at the Naval Academy. That oath is sacred, and I will honor it without hesitation. [**No matter what Trump says or does, no matter who he sends after me, I will not be intimidated and will not back down, but I need you with me. Stand with the Voter Protection Project and me by pitching in to help me continue fighting back to defend our democracy and our Constitution from Trump’s cowardly attacks →**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101371?t=6&akid=22615%2E878179%2EZruk_I) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Chris Deluzio and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101372?t=7&akid=22615%2E878179%2EZruk_I)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101373?t=8&akid=22615%2E878179%2EZruk_I)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101374?t=9&akid=22615%2E878179%2EZruk_I)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101375?t=10&akid=22615%2E878179%2EZruk_I)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101371?t=11&akid=22615%2E878179%2EZruk_I)
Here’s what happened: My colleagues and I released a video reaffirming a basic constitutional truth and the law: no service member is required to follow an illegal order.

That simple truth was enough to send Trump into a blind rage. He’s tried again and again to bully me and my colleagues into backing down—because that’s how he operates when he’s challenged.

_It won’t work._

I first took my oath to the Constitution when I entered the Naval Academy at 17 at the start of my military service. I took it again when I was elected to represent the people of Western Pennsylvania in Congress. That oath is lifelong. It doesn’t expire, and it doesn’t bend to threats or tantrums.

**And I sure as hell won’t let Donald Trump— _the guy who tried to overthrow our government on January 6, 2021, after LOSING an election_ —intimidate me or deter me from upholding my oath.**

So Trump can threaten me, call for my arrest, try to incite violence against me, and even send the DOJ after me. But it won’t stop me from upholding my oath and doing my job for Pennsylvanians and my fellow Americans.
[**I’ve always believed that our country is worth fighting for, and I’m in this fight for the long haul. Stand with the Voter Protection Project and me in this critical moment by making a donation today to help defend our democracy, our Constitution, and our freedoms from Donald Trump →**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101371?t=12&akid=22615%2E878179%2EZruk_I)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Chris Deluzio and VPP will go through immediately:

---

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101371?t=17&akid=22615%2E878179%2EZruk_I)
Don’t Give Up the Ship!

Chris Deluzio

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Peter, your support means the WORLD.
body:
I’m honored to have you on my team.

| | | | Hey, Peter, it's Marsha Blackburn.
Thanks for taking a moment to read my message - it means the WORLD to me.
I know you're bombarded with emails and messages just like this one every day, but I want to cut through the noise and talk to you from the heart.
Trust me, I know what it means to work hard and fight for what's important.
That's why I'm so grateful when someone like you makes a contribution. It's not just about the money - it's about trust, it's about believing in our shared values, and it's about joining a team that's fighting for America's future. | [ CHIP IN NOW >> ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-w)
---
So today, I would like to express my sincere appreciation to each and every one of you. Your support means everything to me, and I'm honored to have you on my team -

THANK YOU!

But I also want to be clear: our fight is far from over. The Democrats are pouring money into every state in the nation, trying to take back Congress and implement their radical agenda.

That's why we need your help today. Whether you've given before or you're considering it for the first time, please know that every single gift - no matter the size \- fuels this must-win fight.

[President Trump is counting on us to hold the line in the fight to Make America Great Again as we start out this election year, and I'm counting on you to help me make it happen.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)

If you can spare even $1 today, we’d be so grateful for your support.

PLEASE, help us start the new year out strong!
[ CHIP IN NOW >> ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
---
Thank you for standing with us,

Marsha Blackburn
| |
---
| | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account.

name: Carmela Conroy
subject: A few 2026 campaign updates
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=f0ed905085&e=a7b299e420)
| | | | | |
Peter, now that we’re officially in an election year, I wanted to reach out and share a few exciting updates with you.

**First and foremost: thank you.** Since launching our campaign for Washington’s 5th District, we’ve seen incredible support from every corner of Eastern Washington. I couldn’t be more grateful. And because of you, we didn’t just meet our end-of-year goal – _we surpassed it_ , and we’re hitting the ground running in 2026.

**I wanted to let you know what your support is already making possible.**

We’ve rolled out updated campaign branding and a brand-new website [(check it out here!)](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=c173b3f037&e=a7b299e420), are preparing to open our Conroy for Congress headquarters in Spokane, and we’re hard at work building out our team and expanding our grassroots outreach to deliver a historic victory in November.

**As we move into this next phase of this campaign, I also wanted to invite you to a few exciting upcoming events:**

**Sunday, January 18** – Indivisible Spokane’s Vets POP is hosting a listening session that’s especially for veterans’ issues, but the public is welcome. [**Sign up here.**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=434d54fd29&e=a7b299e420)

**Thursday, January 29** – I’ll be a featured storyteller at Pivot Spokane. Come out at 7:00 PM for a night of connection and celebration, and to hear more of my story directly from me. [**More information here.**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=15b37171b4&e=a7b299e420)

**Saturday, February 7** – Come help us warm up our new HQ at our first campaign office hours! Stop by, see the space, meet the team, and learn more about how to get involved in the campaign. [**More information here.**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=30887f3551&e=a7b299e420)

Change is in the air, Peter. Team Eastern Washington is growing every single day, and none of this would be possible without supporters like you.

Once again, thank you – I'm looking forward to seeing you soon!

Carmela Conroy
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
**Victory is within reach! A monthly recurring donation helps us build the momentum to win. **[**Will you take the next step and become a recurring supporter today?**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=36a5bafa62&e=a7b299e420)

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: How we will win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JASMINE FOR TEXAS Jasmine for Texas
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123530177/595752492/-1529437191?refcode=260117_E1A2_JC_WinningPathRS&refcode2=0e258d93-f7f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&contactdata=eGTfOuDhPg3TdoJ8MtQpGcL6D5ZUE8ywlUPdr3CxI/jrdqYCYfqeIBzzP0rnbF87&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTI1OGQ5My1mN2YzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5SqLYQ9VKiCecOT6sEeOnBbM7XpHJi0HED--iCznIU=) | | Y’all, I know the winning path in Texas. It isn’t pretending to be something we’re not. It isn’t soft-pedaling our values. And it definitely isn’t asking Democrats to settle for a leap of faith in an unprecedented moment. **The winning path is putting forward someone people already believe in — someone they know will fight for them.** That’s the work I’ve been doing for years. As a former state legislator and now in my second term in Congress, I’ve delivered for Texans across this state — on health care, on civil rights, on standing up to Donald Trump when it mattered most. People know where I stand, and they know I don’t back down. [**If you believe Texas can flip this seat by energizing Democrats, turning out new voters, and building real excitement — then I need you with me today. Chip in right now to help us build the turnout machine it will take to win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123530178/595752493/-1529437191?amount=10&refcode=260117_E1A2_JC_WinningPathRS&refcode2=0e258d93-f7f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&contactdata=eGTfOuDhPg3TdoJ8MtQpGcL6D5ZUE8ywlUPdr3CxI/jrdqYCYfqeIBzzP0rnbF87&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTI1OGQ5My1mN2YzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5SqLYQ9VKiCecOT6sEeOnBbM7XpHJi0HED--iCznIU=) | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123530179/595752494/-879695014?amount=10&refcode=260117_E1A2_JC_WinningPathRS&refcode2=0e258d93-f7f3-f011-8d4c-000d3a54b560&contactdata=eGTfOuDhPg3TdoJ8MtQpGcL6D5ZUE8ywlUPdr3CxI/jrdqYCYfqeIBzzP0rnbF87&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTI1OGQ5My1mN2YzLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDBkM2E1NGI1NjAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v5SqLYQ9VKiCecOT6sEeOnBbM7XpHJi0HED--iCznIU=)
---
I didn’t jump into this race because it was easy. I jumped in because this moment demands experience, courage, and a proven fighter. Texans have seen what happens when we try to win by watering ourselves down. It doesn’t work.
_**What does work is showing voters exactly who we are — and inviting them to be part of something bold enough to win.**_
I’ve built national support. I’ve brought people into the process who’ve never felt represented before. And together, we can create the kind of upswell in turnout that overcomes the odds and finally changes Texas.

clean_body: = | | Y’all, I know the winning path in Texas. It isn’t pretending to be something we’re not. It isn’t soft-pedaling our values. And it definitely isn’t asking Democrats to settle for a leap of faith in an unprecedented moment. The winning path is putting forward someone people already believe in — someone they know will fight for them. That’s the work I’ve been doing for years. As a former state legislator and now in my second term in Congress, I’ve delivered for Texans across this state — on health care, on civil rights, on standing up to Donald Trump when it mattered most. People know where I stand, and they know I don’t back down. = | = I didn’t jump into this race because it was easy. I jumped in because this moment demands experience, courage, and a proven fighter. Texans have seen what happens when we try to win by watering ourselves down. It doesn’t work. What does work is showing voters exactly who we are — and inviting them to be part of something bold enough to win. I’ve built national support. I’ve brought people into the process who’ve never felt represented before. And together, we can create the kind of upswell in turnout that overcomes the odds and finally changes Texas. Should we take the hint and assume you aren't interested in these messages? That would be truly shocking to me since you've always been such a steadfast supporter of mine and President Trump's mission to save America, so I'm giving you one more chance! Really, that's it! Our midmonth deadline is here and we cannot come up short.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: First Texas, now Virginia.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240612%2E444211%2Eus7Vjr)
Hey, I’m reaching out to you because what’s happening right now with redistricting demands our attention — and our action.
**We’ve seen this playbook before. In my home state of Texas, Trump and Greg Abbott rammed through a gerrymandered congressional map that attempts to steal five Democratic seats. And it didn’t stop there.**
Trump knows how deeply unpopular his agenda is. He knows that this means he’s going to lose his majority in the House of Representatives. And he knows that when he does, there will finally be a check on his lawlessness, accountability for his crimes and corruption, and real hope for a better future for this country.
But instead of changing course, he’s trying to cling to power by rigging the system itself. That’s what these attacks on free and fair elections are really about.
Across the country, Trump’s Republicans are trying to choose their voters instead of the other way around. We can’t stand by while that happens.
**That’s why Virginia matters so much right now.**
Virginians for Fair Elections is leading the fight to level the playing field by advancing a **temporary, emergency** redistricting amendment — one that puts voters first and gives the people of Virginia the final say.
This amendment would allow for updated congressional maps for the upcoming elections, and Virginians will be able to see the proposed maps for themselves before casting a vote.
This is what democracy _should_ look like.
That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me and support Virginians for Fair Elections today. [**A split contribution of any amount right now will help fuel the organizing and outreach needed to pass this critical amendment and protect fair representation.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260117-2.1NJeJL&refcode=ema20260117-240612&t=3&akid=240612%2E444211%2Eus7Vjr)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260117-2.1NJeJL&refcode=ema20260117-240612&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=240612%2E444211%2Eus7Vjr)**
Thank you for stepping up.
— Beto
P.S. **[If you want to learn more about the amendment or the work Virginians for Fair Elections is doing, you can find more details on their website.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67463?t=23&akid=240612%2E444211%2Eus7Vjr)**

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20260117-240612-footer&t=24&refcode2=240612_444211_us7Vjr&akid=240612%2E444211%2Eus7Vjr)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/update-contact-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=240612%2E444211%2Eus7Vjr)

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Real, commonsense leadership...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260117_2.7ySv4e&refcode=em20260117-2&t=1&akid=4609%2E582294%2E3ab0an)
Hi, it’s Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear.
The Senate seat in New Hampshire is too important to be lost in the shuffle of 2026 races. Chris Pappas has a strong opponent, which changes everything. **We have to do all that we can to elect Chris Pappas and bring real, commonsense leadership to the Senate.**
I support Chris Pappas because he understands that the path forward in this country is about showing up, doing the work, and delivering for all families — no matter who they voted for. **That’s the kind of leader Chris will be in the Senate.**
**[If you’re with me, you support Chris Pappas, and you’re ready to help hold this crucial swing seat, chip in any amount today.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260117_2.yUoo_r&refcode=em20260117-2&t=2&akid=4609%2E582294%2E3ab0an)**
Kentucky and New Hampshire may be very different states, but the challenges we face are the same. Chris knows that public service is about lifting people up, not tearing each other down — and he’ll never stop fighting for the people he represents.
I’ve seen how hard Chris works to protect health care, defend reproductive rights, and stand up for small businesses and working families. I couldn’t be prouder to support his run for the U.S. Senate — but this won’t be an easy win.
**National Republicans are targeting this race and after recruiting their dream candidate, John Sununu, they believe they can flip this seat.** Chris can win, but he will need all of us stepping up to overcome the millions of dollars that national Republicans are planning to spend against him.
**[Chris can’t win without us. So please, will you chip in any amount today to help elect Chris Pappas?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260117_2.yUoo_r&refcode=em20260117-2&t=3&akid=4609%2E582294%2E3ab0an)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260117_2.yUoo_r&amount=5&refcode=em20260117-2&t=22&akid=4609%2E582294%2E3ab0an)**
Chris’s opponent and the GOP and Wall Street money machine that comes with him will make this one of the most competitive elections this year. **[Every dollar you can chip in will help make sure Chris can win.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260117_2.7ySv4e&refcode=em20260117-2&t=23&akid=4609%2E582294%2E3ab0an)**
Let’s do what’s necessary to get Chris across the finish line.
Thank you,
Andy Beshear
Governor of Kentucky
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260117-2&t=24&refcode2=4609_582294_3ab0an&akid=4609%2E582294%2E3ab0an)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=25&akid=4609%2E582294%2E3ab0an)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=26&akid=4609%2E582294%2E3ab0an)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=4609%2E582294%2E3ab0an)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

clean_body: Joe Rogan is SPOT ON| | | Friend, , he said something on his podcast that millions of Americans have felt in their gut for years: I was there. I saw it firsthand. And I refused to stay silent. While Washington worshiped Anthony Fauci like a hero, I challenged him under oath. I asked the questions no one else would ask. I exposed his lies about gain-of-function research. I confronted him about natural immunity. I forced him to answer for his flip-flopping on masks and his censorship of real scientists. And for it, they tried to destroy me. They called me dangerous. They called me reckless. They said I had “ blood on my hands. ” But today, even my fiercest critics quietly admit what Joe Rogan said out loud:I was right! We knew early on that kids were not at serious risk. We knew natural immunity was real. We knew lockdowns would cause massive harm. We knew masks were never proven to stop a respiratory virus. And we knew Fauci was protecting his power, NOT your health! While schools were closed, children suffered...While churches were shut, liquor stores stayed open...While small businesses died, Big Pharma made BILLIONS. And Fauci? He walked away with a million-dollar prize, a government limousine, and a free pass from accountability. 😡 I sent criminal referrals for Fauci for lying to Congress. I uncovered emails showing he told people to “read this and destroy it.” I exposed how taxpayer money flowed to dangerous research in Wuhan. And still, the establishment protects him. Why? Because if Fauci falls, the entire COVID narrative falls with him. And they WON’T allow that to happen. Friend, this fight is not over. The same people who silenced Americans, censored dissent, forced mandates, and attacked liberty are STILL in power. They are STILL writing the rules. They are STILL protecting their own. And they are still afraid of one thing:the truth! That’s why they hate me, friend, and that’s why I need you with me. | | | | | I won’t bow down. I won’t be silent. And I won’t let them rewrite history. But I can’t do it alone, friend. In liberty, Rand Paul | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | Contribution rules: I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). name: Adam Schiff
subject: This is a real issue — and we have real solutions at our disposal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9421%2E5257348%2ER13cNR)
Far too many Americans are struggling to make rent or find a home they can afford, Derek.
One of the key reasons is that there just isn’t enough affordable housing — not in California and not around the country. This nation needs a housing boom — housing that is affordable, that meets the needs of working families; middle-income housing, low-income housing — we need it all.
That’s why I introduced the _Housing BOOM Act_. We don’t need incremental policy changes. **We need a massive investment. We need another housing boom in America.**
This bill would make a huge new investment in building affordable homes for middle-income and lower-income families, to make it possible for young people to own a home or be able to pay their rent.
We need to bring urgency to the construction of vast numbers of new homes. And ensure that the workers who build that housing can live in the communities where they work. Nothing less will address the crisis of housing unaffordability in America.
**I’m going to keep working to make California — and the country — affordable, especially so that families can have a place to live and call home.[If you support my work to expand the supply of affordable housing, please pitch in to power this type of work.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12026_abs_em.43HrbP&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260117_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=9421%2E5257348%2ER13cNR)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

This is the type of bold, pragmatic legislation we need to be passing to make a real difference for families across the country. And Democrats need to lead the way — while Republicans fight amongst themselves.
With your support, we’ll make it happen.
Let’s do this!
